---
title: "Amacrine OrthoType analysis"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    keep_md: true
params:
  biomart: FALSE
  prep_ortho: FALSE
  batch_int: FALSE
  harmony: FALSE
  save: FALSE
  bigmatrix: FALSE
  shuffling: FALSE
  StopCheckPoint1: FALSE
  StopCheckPoint2: TRUE
  StopCheckPoint3: TRUE
  expr_corr: FALSE
  FindCorrectedGenes: FALSE
  merge: FALSE
  cores: 5
  
---

Load necessary libraries for analysis

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev = 'png', dpi = 300, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 9, 
#                       root.dir = '/clusterfs/kslab/Evolution/paper_2/projects/AC') # set output device to svg
source("../../utils/dario_functions.R")
LoadLibraries(load.lisi = FALSE)
SourceFiles()

BATCH_INT = params$batch_int
SAVE = params$save
HARMONY = params$harmony
LOCAL = TRUE
```

# Orthology

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
# Mouse as reference species
# mart1 = as.data.frame(fread("../BC_RGC/mart_Hum_Maca_Mar_Pero_Sqr_v2.txt"))
# mart2 = as.data.frame(fread("../BC_RGC/mart_shrew_opo_cow_sheep_lamp_anole_v3.txt"))
# mart3 = as.data.frame(fread("../BC_RGC/mart_Pig_Chick_Fer_v2.txt"))
# mart4 = as.data.frame(fread("../BC_RGC/mart_MouseLemur_Rat_Zebrafish_Goldfish.txt"))

# Human as reference species
mart1 = as.data.frame(fread("../../Orthology/mart_mouse_macaque_marmoset_peromyscus_squirrel_v2.txt"))
mart2 = as.data.frame(fread("../../Orthology/mart_treeshrew_opossum_cow_sheep_lamprey_anole_v2.txt"))
mart3 = as.data.frame(fread("../../Orthology/mart_pig_chicken_ferret_v2.txt"))
mart4 = as.data.frame(fread("../../Orthology/mart_mouselemur_rat_zebrafish_goldfish_v2.txt"))
```

Check mouse genes

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
dim(mart1)
dim(mart2)
dim(mart3)
dim(mart4)

genes1 = unique(mart1$`Gene name`)
genes2 = unique(mart2$`Gene name`)
genes3 = unique(mart3$`Gene name`)
genes4 = unique(mart4$`Gene name`)

message("Mart 1 has ", length(genes1), " genes")
message("Mart 2 has ", length(genes2), " genes")
message("Mart 3 has ", length(genes3), " genes")
message("Mart 4 has ", length(genes4), " genes")
```

## Subset all the marts to their common mouse gene symbols

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
common_genes = intersect(intersect(intersect(genes1, genes2), genes3), genes4)
message("There are ", length(common_genes), " common genes")

mart1_subset = mart1[mart1$`Gene name` %in% common_genes,]
mart2_subset = mart2[mart2$`Gene name` %in% common_genes,]
mart3_subset = mart3[mart3$`Gene name` %in% common_genes,]
mart4_subset = mart4[mart4$`Gene name` %in% common_genes,]
```

## Merge marts

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
mart2_sorted = mart2_subset[match(mart1_subset$`Gene name`, mart2_subset$`Gene name`),]

# Check that all reference genes are the same
message("Are all the reference genes identical? ", all(mart1_subset$`Gene name` == mart2_sorted$`Gene name`))

# Check for NAs
message("Are any of the symbols NAs? ", any(is.na(mart2_sorted$`Gene name`)))

merge_1_2 = cbind(mart1_subset, mart2_sorted[,-c(1:2)])
```

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
mart3_sorted = mart3_subset[match(mart1_subset$`Gene name`, mart3_subset$`Gene name`),]

# Check that all reference genes are the same
message("Are all the reference genes identical? ", all(mart1_subset$`Gene name` == mart3_sorted$`Gene name`))

# Check for NAs
message("Are any of the symbols NAs? ", any(is.na(mart3_sorted$`Gene name`)))

merge_1_2_3 = cbind(merge_1_2, mart3_sorted[,-c(1:2)])
```

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
mart4_sorted = mart4_subset[match(mart1_subset$`Gene name`, mart4_subset$`Gene name`),]

# Check that all reference genes are the same
message("Are all the reference genes identical? ", all(mart1_subset$`Gene name` == mart4_sorted$`Gene name`))

# Check for NAs
message("Are any of the symbols NAs? ", any(is.na(mart4_sorted$`Gene name`)))

merge_1_2_3_4 = cbind(merge_1_2_3, mart4_sorted[,-c(1:2)])
```

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
# We change Cow SLC6A9 orthology to one2one to keep it for downstream analysis
merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4$`Gene name` == "SLC6A9" , "Cow homology type"] = "ortholog_one2one"
merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4$`Gene name` == "SLC6A9" , "Cow gene name"] = "SLC6A9"

# We change Rat CHAT orthology to one2one to keep it for downstream analysis
merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4$`Gene name` == "CHAT" , "Rat homology type"] = "ortholog_one2one"
merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4$`Gene name` == "CHAT" , "Rat gene name"] = "CHAT"

# Find opossum GJD2

# Find marmoset SLC17A8; ENSCJAG00000002141

# Find sheep SYT2

# Find treeshrew and opossum TH

saveRDS(merge_1_2_3_4, "../../Orthology/martMergeRefHuman.rds")
fwrite(merge_1_2_3_4, file = "../../Orthology/martMergeRefHuman.csv")
```

# Analyze intersections

```{r, eval = params$biomart}
speciesList = c("Mouse", "Crab-eating macaque", "White-tufted-ear marmoset", "Mouse Lemur", 
                "Northern American deer mouse", "Rat", "Squirrel", "Pig", 
                "Chicken", "Ferret", "Tree Shrew", "Opossum", "Cow", 
                "Sheep", "Lamprey", "Green anole", "Zebrafish", "Goldfish")

# speciesList = c("Human", "Crab-eating macaque", "Marmoset", "Mouse Lemur", 
#                 "Northern American deer mouse", "Rat", "Squirrel", "Pig", 
#                 "Chicken", "Ferret", "Tree Shrew", "Opossum", "Cow", 
#                 "Sheep", "Lamprey", "Green anole", "Zebrafish", "Goldfish")

oneToOneList = lapply(speciesList, function(species){
                  return(merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4[[paste0(species, " homology type")]] == "ortholog_one2one",]$`Gene name`)
                })
names(oneToOneList) = speciesList

# Build the gene orthology matrix
all_orthologous_genes = Reduce(union, oneToOneList)
sortedOrthoList = lapply(oneToOneList, function(geneList) ifelse(is.na(geneList[match(all_orthologous_genes, geneList)]), 0, 1))
OrthoMatrix = do.call(cbind, sortedOrthoList)
rownames(OrthoMatrix) = all_orthologous_genes

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ComplexHeatmap))
comb_intersect = make_comb_mat(OrthoMatrix, mode = "distinct") 
```

## Upset plot

```{r, eval = FALSE, fig.width=30, fig.height=5}
UpSet(comb_intersect, set_order = c("Crab-eating macaque", "White-tufted-ear marmoset", "Mouse Lemur", "Tree Shrew", 
                                      "Mouse", "Northern American deer mouse", "Rat", "Squirrel",
                                      "Cow", "Sheep", "Pig", "Ferret", "Opossum",
                                      "Green anole", "Chicken", "Zebrafish", "Goldfish", "Lamprey"))

# c("Human", "Crab-eating macaque", "Marmoset", "Mouse Lemur", "Tree Shrew", 
                # "Northern American deer mouse", "Rat", "Squirrel", 
                # "Cow", "Sheep", "Pig", "Ferret", "Opossum",
                # "Green anole", "Chicken", "Zebrafish", "Goldfish", "Lamprey")
```

## Converting to human symbols

```{r}
# ze2hs = BlastOrthologyTable(file1 = "maps_from_blast_v4/zech/ch_to_ze.txt", 
#                             file2 = "maps_from_blast_v4/zech/ze_to_ch.txt", 
#                             keyfile1 = "Keys/Chicken_key.csv",
#                             keyfile2 = "Keys/Zebrafish_lyu_key.csv")

setwd('../cones')

li2hs = BlastOrthologyTable(file1 = "maps_from_blast_v4/lihs/hs_to_li.txt",
                            file2 = "maps_from_blast_v4/lihs/li_to_hs.txt",
                            keyfile1 = "Keys/Human_key.csv",
                            keyfile2 = "Keys/Lizard_key.csv")

ch2hs = BlastOrthologyTable(file1 = "maps_from_blast_v4/chhs/hs_to_ch.txt",
                            file2 = "maps_from_blast_v4/chhs/ch_to_hs.txt",
                            keyfile1 = "Keys/Human_key.csv",
                            keyfile2 = "Keys/Chicken_key.csv")

# ax2hs = BlastOrthologyTable(file1 = "maps_from_blast_v4/chhs/hs_to_ch.txt",
#                             file2 = "maps_from_blast_v4/chhs/ch_to_hs.txt",
#                             keyfile1 = "Keys/Human_key.csv",
#                             keyfile2 = "Keys/Chicken_key.csv")


li2hs = as(li2hs, "sparseMatrix")
ch2hs = as(ch2hs, "sparseMatrix")

saveRDS(li2hs, "orthology_graphs/li2hs.rds")
saveRDS(ch2hs, "orthology_graphs/ch2hs.rds")
```

## Subset to 1:1 orthologs for mammals, all species, and all species minus lamprey

```{r}
merge_1_2_3_4 = readRDS("../../Orthology/martMergeRefHuman.rds")
```

```{r}
# Add 1:1 orthologs from blast for chicken and lizard
ch2hs = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/ch2hs.rds')
li2hs = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/li2hs.rds')

# Compare to ensembl
# mart_human_chicken = merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4$`Chicken homology type` == "ortholog_one2one" & 
#                                      merge_1_2_3_4$`Gene name` != '' & 
#                                      merge_1_2_3_4$`Chicken gene name` != '', c("Gene name", "Chicken gene name")] %>% unique

# Modify orthology table
ch2hs.df = reshape2::melt(as.matrix(ch2hs)) %>% filter(value > 0) %>% setNames(c("Human", "gene", "homology"))
ch2hs.df$homology = "ortholog_one2one"
sorted = ch2hs.df[match(merge_1_2_3_4$`Gene name`, ch2hs.df$Human),]
sorted$homology[is.na(sorted$homology)] = "other"
merge_1_2_3_4$`Chicken homology type` = sorted$homology %>% as.character
merge_1_2_3_4$`Chicken gene name` = sorted$gene %>% as.character

li2hs.df = reshape2::melt(as.matrix(li2hs)) %>% filter(value > 0) %>% setNames(c("Human", "gene", "homology"))
li2hs.df$homology = "ortholog_one2one"
sorted = li2hs.df[match(merge_1_2_3_4$`Gene name`, li2hs.df$Human),]
sorted$homology[is.na(sorted$homology)] = "other"
merge_1_2_3_4$`Brown anole gene stable ID` = sorted$gene %>% as.character
merge_1_2_3_4$`Brown anole gene name` = sorted$gene %>% as.character
merge_1_2_3_4$`Brown anole homology type` = sorted$homology %>% as.character

saveRDS(merge_1_2_3_4, '../../Orthology/martMergeRefHuman_modified.rds')
```

# Prepare ortholog count matrices

```{r}
# Object list
objectList = mclapply(speciesList.liz, function(species) readRDS(paste0("../../Species_Objects/", species, "AC_v6.rds")), mc.cores = 1)
names(objectList) = speciesList.liz

objectList$Mouse = readRDS('../../Species_Reference/MouseACref_v4.rds')
objectList$Mouse$species = 'Mouse'
# objectList$Axolotl$species = 'Axolotl'
```

```{r, eval = params$prep_ortho}
# Generate the ortholog seurat object for each species
speciesOrthoList = lapply(objectList, function(species) OrthologSeurat(species, oneToOneMart))
names(speciesOrthoList) = speciesList.liz

# Subset each matrix to common genes
# common.genes = Reduce(intersect, sapply(speciesOrthoList, function(x) rownames(x)))
# speciesOrthoList = lapply(speciesOrthoList, function(x) SubsetSeuratGenes(x, features = common.genes))
# names(speciesOrthoList) = speciesList
```

## Downsample each species type to 100 cells

```{r, eval = params$prep_ortho}
# For species used in SAMap subset, we will use the same cells -> edit: this was causing a bug, use whatever cells and then match later for samap before export
# Correction: this was not a bug, the behavior was caused by removal of the poorly integrated cluster, which was enriched for chicken and lizard cells
samap = fread('samap/pmzechliopsqhs_ac_seed_0_leiden_4.0.csv')
samap$cell = sub("-[^-]+$", "", samap$cell)
samap_subset = c('Human', 'Squirrel', "Opossum", 'Chicken', 'Lizard')

for(species in samap_subset){
  speciesOrthoList[[species]] = subset(speciesOrthoList[[species]], cells = samap$cell)
}

# Subset
speciesSubsetList = lapply(speciesOrthoList, function(speciesAC) {
  speciesAC = AssignName(speciesAC) # this is where they were renamed
  speciesAC = subset(speciesAC, cells = WhichCells(speciesAC, downsample = 100, seed = 12345))
})

# Print the number of cells for each species 
unlist(lapply(speciesSubsetList, ncol))
```

## Remove any residual low quality clusters

```{r}
# Lizard horizontal cells snuck in; removing these
speciesSubsetList$Lizard = subset(speciesSubsetList$Lizard, seurat_clusters %in% c(9,30), invert = TRUE)
```

## Merge objects

```{r, eval = params$prep_ortho}
# Merge
vertebrateAC <- merge(speciesSubsetList[[1]], y = speciesSubsetList[2:length(speciesSubsetList)], add.cell.ids = speciesList.liz)

# Keep features in at least 3 cells
vertebrateAC <- CreateSeuratObject(GetAssayData(vertebrateAC), min.cells = 3)

# Add species name
vertebrateAC$species = factor(rep(speciesList.liz, unlist(lapply(speciesSubsetList, ncol))), levels = speciesList.liz)

# Add cell type information
vertebrateAC$species_type = as.character(unlist(lapply(speciesSubsetList, function(speciesAC) speciesAC$type)))
vertebrateAC$species_cluster = as.character(unlist(lapply(speciesSubsetList, function(speciesAC) speciesAC$seurat_clusters)))
# vertebrateAC$species = factor(vertebrateAC, speciesList)
```

Save object

```{r, eval = SAVE}
dir.create("../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/")
saveRDS(vertebrateAC, "../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/tetrapodAC_v1.rds")
```

### Calculate integration metrics

Check for batch effects using integration LISI and celltype LISI

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_unintegrated.rds")
vertebrateAC$species_littype = str_split_fixed(vertebrateAC$species_type, "_", 2)[,2]
vertebrateAC$species_littype[vertebrateAC$species_littype == "AII"] = "A2"
vertebrateAC_iLISI = ComputeIntegrationLISI(vertebrateAC)
vertebrateAC_cLISI = ComputeLittypeLISI(vertebrateAC, types.to.consider = c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"))
saveRDS(vertebrateAC_iLISI, '../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_iLISI.rds')
saveRDS(vertebrateAC_cLISI, '../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_cLISI.rds')
```

## Tabulate batches used for integration

```{r}
t(t(table(vertebrateAC[["species"]])))
```

## Seurat integration

```{r, eval = BATCH_INT}
vertebrateAC = ClusterSeurat(vertebrateAC, integrate.by = "species", cluster_resolution = 1.2)
vertebrateAC$species = factor(vertebrateAC$species, levels = speciesList)
saveRDS(vertebrateAC, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_seurat.rds")
```

### Calculate integration metrics

Check for batch effects using integration LISI and celltype LISI

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_seurat.rds")
vertebrateAC$species_littype = str_split_fixed(vertebrateAC$species_type, "_", 2)[,2]
vertebrateAC$species_littype[vertebrateAC$species_littype == "AII"] = "A2"
vertebrateAC_seurat_iLISI = ComputeIntegrationLISI(vertebrateAC)
vertebrateAC_seurat_cLISI = ComputeLittypeLISI(vertebrateAC, types.to.consider = c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"))
saveRDS(vertebrateAC_seurat_iLISI, '../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_seurat_iLISI.rds')
saveRDS(vertebrateAC_seurat_cLISI, '../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_seurat_cLISI.rds')
```

# Controls

## Ortholog shuffling

```{r, eval = params$shuffling}
vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_seurat.rds")

# Find genes that are expressed in every species
species_expr = AverageExpression(vertebrateAC, assay = 'RNA', group.by = 'species')$RNA
common.genes = rownames(species_expr)[apply(species_expr, 1, function(x) all(x != 0))]

# Split by species
vertebrateAC = SubsetSeuratGenes(vertebrateAC, common.genes)
vertebrateAClist = SplitObject(vertebrateAC, 'species')

# Get counts
countlist = lapply(vertebrateAClist, function(object) object@assays$RNA@counts)

# Shuffle the rows for each count list except for reference species (human)
shuffledlist = countlist
shuffledlist[2:length(shuffledlist)] = lapply(shuffledlist[2:length(shuffledlist)], function(x) {
  new = x[sample(1:nrow(x), nrow(x)),]
  rownames(new) = rownames(shuffledlist[[1]])
  return(new)
})

shuffled_counts = do.call(cbind, shuffledlist)

# shuffledObjects = lapply(shuffledlist, CreateSeuratObject)
# shuffledObject = merge()
# seurat <- merge(shuffledObject, y = shuffledObject[2:length(shuffledObject)], add.cell.ids = samples)

# Column sums remain the same since e_ik was shuffled for each column k 
all(colSums(shuffled_counts) == colSums(vertebrateAC@assays$RNA@counts)) # TRUE

# Row sums change because e_ik was shuffled for each column k 
all(rowSums(shuffled_counts) == rowSums(vertebrateAC@assays$RNA@counts)) # FALSE

shuffledAC = CreateSeuratObject(shuffled_counts)
shuffledAC@meta.data = cbind(shuffledAC@meta.data, vertebrateAC@meta.data[,!colnames(vertebrateAC@meta.data) %in% c("nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA")])

# Integrate
shuffledAC = ClusterSeurat(shuffledAC, integrate.by = "species", cluster_resolution = 1)
saveRDS(shuffledAC, "../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_shuffled_orthologs_common.rds")
```

### Calculate integration metrics

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
shuffledAC_iLISI = ComputeIntegrationLISI(shuffledAC, plot = TRUE)
shuffledAC$species_littype = str_split_fixed(shuffledAC$species_type, "_", 2)[,2]
shuffledAC$species_littype[shuffledAC$species_littype == "AII"] = "A2"
shuffledAC_cLISI = ComputeLittypeLISI(shuffledAC, types.to.consider = c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"))
```

### Check confusion matrix

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=15}
shuffledAC = readRDS("../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_shuffled_orthologs_common.rds")
shuffledAC$species = factor(factor(shuffledAC$species, levels = phylogenetic_order2))
shuffledAC$species_littype = ifelse(shuffledAC$species_littype %in% c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3'), shuffledAC$species_littype, NA)
DimPlot(shuffledAC, group.by = 'species') | DimPlot(shuffledAC, group.by = 'species_littype') | DimPlotLabeled(shuffledAC) 
```

```{r, fig.width=30, fig.height = 5}
# shuffledAC$seurat_clusters = as.character(as.numeric(shuffledAC$seurat_clusters))

widths = sapply(levels(shuffledAC$species), function(x) length(unique(shuffledAC$species_cluster[shuffledAC$species == x])))
SplitJaccardMatrix(shuffledAC, ident.1 = 'seurat_clusters', ident.2 = 'species_cluster', row.order = 0:26, widths = widths)
```

## Shuffle row values of expression matrix

```{r, eval = params$shuffling}
vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_seurat.rds")

# Shuffling expression values for each gene (row) 
shuffled_counts = apply(vertebrateAC@assays$RNA@counts, 1, function(x) sample(x))
shuffled_counts = t(shuffled_counts)
colnames(shuffled_counts) = colnames(vertebrateAC@assays$RNA@counts)
head(shuffled_counts[,1:6], 10)
head(vertebrateAC@assays$RNA@counts[,1:6], 10)

# Column sums remain the same since e_ik was shuffled for each column k 
all(colSums(shuffled_counts) == colSums(vertebrateAC@assays$RNA@counts)) # Should be FALSE

# Row sums change because e_ik was shuffled for each column k 
all(rowSums(shuffled_counts) == rowSums(vertebrateAC@assays$RNA@counts)) # Should be TRUE

shuffledAC = CreateSeuratObject(shuffled_counts)
shuffledAC@meta.data = cbind(shuffledAC@meta.data, vertebrateAC@meta.data[,!colnames(vertebrateAC@meta.data) %in% c("nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA")])

# Integrate
shuffledAC = ClusterSeurat(shuffledAC, integrate.by = "species", cluster_resolution = 1.5)
saveRDS(shuffledAC, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_shuffled_row_entries.rds")
```

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=15}
shuffledAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_shuffled_row_entries.rds")
shuffledAC$species = factor(factor(shuffledAC$species, levels = phylogenetic_order2))
# shuffledAC$species_littype = ifelse(shuffledAC$species_littype %in% c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3'), shuffledAC$species_littype, NA)
DimPlot(shuffledAC, group.by = 'species') | DimPlotLabeled(shuffledAC)
```

```{r, fig.width=30, fig.height = 5}
# shuffledAC$seurat_clusters = as.character(as.numeric(shuffledAC$seurat_clusters))

widths = sapply(levels(shuffledAC$species), function(x) length(unique(shuffledAC$species_cluster[shuffledAC$species == x])))
SplitJaccardMatrix(shuffledAC, ident.1 = 'seurat_clusters', ident.2 = 'species_cluster', row.order = levels(shuffledAC$seurat_clusters), widths = widths)
```

### Calculate integration metric

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=6}
shuffledAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_shuffled_row_entries.rds")
shuffledAC$species_littype = str_split_fixed(shuffledAC$species_type, "_", 2)[,2]
shuffledAC$species_littype[shuffledAC$species_littype == "AII"] = "A2"
shuffledAC_iLISI = ComputeIntegrationLISI(shuffledAC, plot = TRUE)
shuffledAC_cLISI = ComputeLittypeLISI(shuffledAC, types.to.consider = c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"))
saveRDS(shuffledAC_iLISI, '../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/shuffledAC_iLISI.rds')
saveRDS(shuffledAC_cLISI, '../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/shuffledAC_cLISI.rds')
```

# Figure 2A

```{r}
types.to.consider = c('A2', 'SAC', 'VG3')
vertebrateAC_unintegrated = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_unintegrated.rds")
vertebrateAC_unintegrated$species_littype = str_split_fixed(vertebrateAC_unintegrated$species_type, "_", 2)[,2]
vertebrateAC_unintegrated$species_littype[!vertebrateAC_unintegrated$species_littype %in% types.to.consider] = "Other"
vertebrateAC_unintegrated$species_littype = factor(vertebrateAC_unintegrated$species_littype, levels = c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3', 'Other'))

vertebrateAC_integrated = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_seurat.rds")
vertebrateAC_integrated$species_littype = str_split_fixed(vertebrateAC_integrated$species_type, "_", 2)[,2]
vertebrateAC_integrated$species_littype[!vertebrateAC_integrated$species_littype %in% types.to.consider] = "Other"
vertebrateAC_integrated$species_littype = factor(vertebrateAC_integrated$species_littype, levels = c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3', 'Other'))

vertebrateAC_shuffled = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_shuffled_row_entries.rds")
vertebrateAC_shuffled$species_littype = str_split_fixed(vertebrateAC_shuffled$species_type, "_", 2)[,2]
vertebrateAC_shuffled$species_littype[!vertebrateAC_shuffled$species_littype %in% types.to.consider] = "Other"
vertebrateAC_shuffled$species_littype = factor(vertebrateAC_shuffled$species_littype, levels = c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3', 'Other'))

ortho_path = '../../Ortho_Objects/'
vertebrateAC_iLISI = readRDS(paste0(ortho_path, 'vertebrateAC_iLISI.rds'))
vertebrateAC_seurat_iLISI = readRDS(paste0(ortho_path, 'vertebrateAC_seurat_iLISI.rds'))
shuffledAC_iLISI = readRDS(paste0(ortho_path, 'shuffledAC_iLISI.rds'))
vertebrateAC_cLISI = readRDS(paste0(ortho_path, 'vertebrateAC_cLISI.rds'))
vertebrateAC_seurat_cLISI = readRDS(paste0(ortho_path, 'vertebrateAC_seurat_cLISI.rds'))
shuffledAC_cLISI = readRDS(paste0(ortho_path, 'shuffledAC_cLISI.rds'))

pdf('figures/raw_clusters.pdf')
for(cluster in levels(vertebrateAC_integrated$seurat_clusters)){
  print(DimPlot(vertebrateAC_integrated, cells.highlight = WhichCells(vertebrateAC_integrated, expr = seurat_clusters == cluster)))
}
dev.off()

table(vertebrateAC_integrated$seurat_clusters)

VlnPlot(vertebrateAC_integrated, 'nFeature_RNA', pt.size = 0) | stackedBarGraph2(vertebrateAC_integrated, 'seurat_clusters', 'species')

# table(subset(vertebrateAC_integrated, species == 'Human')$seurat_clusters, vertebrateAC_integrated$species_type)
SplitJaccardMatrix(vertebrateAC_integrated, ident.1 = 'seurat_clusters', ident.2 = 'species_type', row.order = 0:43)
ggsave('figures/raw-clusters-jaccard.pdf', height = 5, width = 70, limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=7.5}
                      integrated = vertebrateAC_seurat_iLISI$normalized.iLISI, 
                      shuffled = shuffledAC_iLISI$normalized.iLISI)

cLISI.df = data.frame(unintegrated = subset(vertebrateAC_cLISI, species_littype %in% c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"))$normalized.cLISI, 
                      integrated = subset(vertebrateAC_seurat_cLISI, species_littype %in% c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"))$normalized.cLISI, 
                      shuffled = subset(shuffledAC_cLISI, species_littype %in% c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"))$normalized.cLISI)

boxplots = plot_grid(
  NULL,
  ggplot(reshape2::melt(iLISI.df), aes(x = variable, y = value, color = variable))+
    geom_boxplot(linetype = "dashed", outlier.shape = NA) +
    stat_boxplot(aes(ymin = ..lower.., ymax = ..upper..), outlier.shape = NA) +
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymin = ..ymax..), width = 0.5) +
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymax = ..ymin..), width = 0.5) +
    ylab("Species mixing (iLISI)")+
    # ggtitle("Mixing of species")+
    theme_cowplot()+
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", axis.title.x = element_blank()),
  NULL,
  ggplot(reshape2::melt(cLISI.df), aes(x = variable, y = value, color = variable))+
    geom_boxplot(linetype = "dashed", outlier.shape = NA) +
    stat_boxplot(aes(ymin = ..lower.., ymax = ..upper..), outlier.shape = NA) +
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymin = ..ymax..), width = 0.5) +
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymax = ..ymin..), width = 0.5) +
    ylab("Cell type mixing (cLISI)")+
    xlab(NULL)+
    # ggtitle("Mixing of cell types")+
    theme_cowplot()+
    theme(legend.position = "none")+
    RotatedAxis(), 
  nrow = 4, rel_heights = c(0.2,1,0.2,1.25), align = "v"
)

lisi_summary = plot_grid(
  LISI_umap,

  NULL,
  boxplots,
  ncol = 3,
  rel_widths = c(6,0.2, 1))

lisi_summary
```

## Merge clusters

```{r, eval = params$merge}
# vertebrateAC$old_seurat_clusters = vertebrateAC$seurat_clusters
# merged = suppressWarnings(mergeClusters(vertebrateAC))

nDEGs(FindMarkersFast(vertebrateAC, ident.1 = 14, ident.2 = 43), log2FC.threshold = 1, p_val_adj.threshold = 0.001)
vertebrateAC = MergeClusters(vertebrateAC, idents = c(14,43), refactor = TRUE)
vertebrateAC = DendroOrder2(vertebrateAC)

library(dendextend)
dendro = as.dendrogram(vertebrateAC@tools$BuildClusterTree)
desired_order <- c(setdiff(levels(vertebrateAC$dendro.order), '7'), '7') # Move SAC to other side for visualization purposes
desired_order[c(which(desired_order == '11'), which(desired_order == '18'))] <- desired_order[c(which(desired_order == '18'), which(desired_order == '11'))] # Move SEG and A8 
desired_order[c(which(desired_order == '23'), which(desired_order == '25'))] <- desired_order[c(which(desired_order == '25'), which(desired_order == '23'))] # Move 19_CRH and 12_nNOS
desired_order
dend_custom_order <- rotate(dendro, order = desired_order)
plot(dend_custom_order, main = "Custom Ordered Dendrogram")

saveRDS(dend_custom_order, '../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.v2.rds')
# vertebrateAC@tools$BuildClusterTree = ape::as.phylo(dendro)
# vertebrateAC$dendro.order = factor(vertebrateAC$dendro.order, levels = desired_order)

# Update order
BIGSEURAT$type = factor(BIGSEURAT$type, levels 
                        = c("22_A2", "27_VG3", "18_TRHDE", "41_TRHDE", "34", "26_A8", "24_SEG", "2_NNgly", "15", "17_ROBO3", "29_SLC35D3",
                           "35", "30_A17", "32_A17", "9", "1_MAF*", "3*", "4_nNOS", "14_CA2", "6_NPY", "10_MAF*", "11*",
                           "25*", "13", "40*", "42", "38", "7", "20", "21_PDGFRA", "28", "5", "36_VIP",
                           "23_RXRG", "39", "16_NNgaba*", "19_CRH*", "12_nNOS*", "33_CA1*", "31_nNOS", "37", "8_SAC*"))
BIGSEURAT$type
```

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=12}
  ac.ortho@meta.data[[x]] = factor(ac.ortho@meta.data[[x]], levels = levels(js$data$col))
```

## Number of species experiment

```{r}
source("../../utils/dario_functions.R")
LoadLibraries(load.lisi = FALSE)
SourceFiles()

vertebrateAC = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v2_100.rds')
dir.create('integration_experiments')

species.options = levels(vertebrateAC$species)
n.iterations = 5

lapply(seq(2, 16, by = 2), function(k) {
  
  lapply(seq_len(n.iterations), function(i){
    this.species = sample(species.options, k)
    
    message('Working on species: ', paste0(this.species, collapse = ' '))
  
    # randomly select k species
    object = subset(vertebrateAC, species %in% this.species)
  
    # run integration
    object = ClusterSeurat(object, integrate.by = 'species', cluster_resolution = 1.2)
    
    # save object
    saveRDS(object, paste0('integration_experiments/', paste0(this.species, collapse = '_'), '_', k, '_', i, '.rds'))
  
  })
  
})
```

Precision and recall require good clusters and that's hard to do (merging and what not)
Just do iLISI and cLISI
Or could do a resolution sweep and report max precision and max recall

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
exp.data = data.frame(filename = list.files('integration_experiments'))
exp.data$num_species = as.numeric(ExtractString(sub("^_", "", gsub('.rds', '', substrRight(exp.data$filename, 8))), after = '_'))
exp.data$iteration = as.numeric(ExtractString(sub("^_", "", gsub('.rds', '', substrRight(exp.data$filename, 8))), before = '_'))
exp.data = exp.data %>% arrange(num_species, iteration)
exp.data

# Extract metrics for each object
summary.stats = lapply(exp.data$filename, function(filename){
  object = readRDS(paste0('integration_experiments/', filename))
  object$species = factor(object$species)
  seurat_iLISI = ComputeIntegrationLISI(object, plot = FALSE)
  # mean(MeanMetadata(seurat_iLISI, feature.1 = 'species', feature.2 = 'normalized.iLISI'))
  seurat_cLISI = ComputeLittypeLISI(object, types.to.consider = c("A2", "SAC", "VG3"), plot = FALSE)
  mean_clisi = mean(MeanMetadata(seurat_cLISI, feature.1 = 'species_littype', feature.2 = 'normalized.cLISI')[c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3')])
  median_clisi = mean(MeanMetadata(seurat_cLISI, feature.1 = 'species_littype', feature.2 = 'normalized.cLISI', FUN = median)[c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3')])
  data.frame(mean_ilisi = mean(seurat_iLISI$normalized.iLISI), 
             median_ilisi = median(seurat_iLISI$normalized.iLISI), 
             mean_clisi = mean_clisi,
             median_clisi = median_clisi)
})
summary.stats.df = do.call(rbind, summary.stats)
```


```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
exp.data2 = cbind(exp.data, summary.stats.df)

head(exp.data2)
tail(exp.data2)

ggscatter(exp.data2 %>% mutate(iteration = as.character(iteration)), x = 'num_species', y = 'mean_ilisi', color = 'iteration') | ggscatter(exp.data2 %>% mutate(iteration = as.character(iteration)), x = 'num_species', y = 'mean_clisi', color = 'iteration')

ggscatter(exp.data2 %>% mutate(iteration = as.character(iteration)), x = 'num_species', y = 'median_ilisi', color = 'iteration') | ggscatter(exp.data2 %>% mutate(iteration = as.character(iteration)), x = 'num_species', y = 'mean_clisi', color = 'iteration')
```

## Benchmark error in clustering

```{r, fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
vertebrateAC = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
# vertebrateAC = subset(readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds'), species == 'Ferret', invert = TRUE) # remove ferret
vertebrateAC = AssignAnnotations(vertebrateAC, list(SAC = 8, A2 = 22, VG3 = 27), use = 'type_no')

KNOWNTYPES = c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3')

# Raw tabulation
lit_types = vertebrateAC$lit_type
lit_types[is.na(lit_types)] = 'other'

raw_tables = lapply(KNOWNTYPES, function(type) {
  raw_table = table(lit_types == type, vertebrateAC$species_littype == type)[2:1,2:1]
  return(raw_table)
})

lapply(raw_tables, EvaluateModel)
```

## DEGs are conserved

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6}
# vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v2_100.rds")
# vertebrateAC$clusters = factor(as.numeric(vertebrateAC$seurat_clusters), levels = 1:nClusters(vertebrateAC))
vertebrateAC = ac.ortho #readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')

# Scale data for heatmap
PrimateAC = DownsampleSeurat(subset(vertebrateAC, species %in% c("Human", "Macaque", "Marmoset", "MouseLemur")), group.by = 'seurat_clusters', size = 50)
PrimateAC = ScaleData(PrimateAC, features = rownames(vertebrateAC))
RodentAC = DownsampleSeurat(subset(vertebrateAC, species %in% c("Mouse", "Rhabdomys", "Rat", "Peromyscus", "Squirrel")), group.by = 'seurat_clusters', size = 50)
RodentAC = ScaleData(RodentAC, features = rownames(vertebrateAC))
LaurasiaAC = DownsampleSeurat(subset(vertebrateAC, species %in% c("Ferret", "Pig", "Sheep", "Cow")), group.by = 'seurat_clusters', size = 50)
LaurasiaAC = ScaleData(LaurasiaAC, features = rownames(vertebrateAC))
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6}
top_primate = TopNDEGs(PrimateAC, group.by = 'dendro.order', n = 5)
top_rodent = TopNDEGs(RodentAC, group.by = 'dendro.order', n = 5)
top_laurasia = TopNDEGs(LaurasiaAC, group.by = 'dendro.order', n = 5)

heatmap_wrapper = function(gene_list){
  h1 = SeuratHeatmap(DownsampleSeurat(PrimateAC, group.by = 'dendro.order', size = 50), 
              group.by = 'dendro.order', 
              features = gene_list, 
              rotate = TRUE,
              color = myPalette(4)[1],
              show_column_names = FALSE, show_row_names = FALSE, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE)

  h2 = SeuratHeatmap(DownsampleSeurat(RodentAC, group.by = 'dendro.order', size = 50), 
                group.by = 'dendro.order', 
                features = gene_list, 
                rotate = TRUE,
                color = myPalette(4)[3],
                show_column_names = FALSE, show_row_names = FALSE, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE)
  
  h3 = SeuratHeatmap(DownsampleSeurat(LaurasiaAC, group.by = 'dendro.order', size = 50), 
                group.by = 'dendro.order', 
                features = gene_list, 
                rotate = TRUE,
                color = myPalette(4)[4],
                show_column_names = FALSE, show_row_names = FALSE, show_heatmap_legend = FALSE)

  plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(list(h1, h2, h3), function(x) grid.grabExpr(draw(x))), 
          nrow = 1)
}

p1 = heatmap_wrapper(top_primate$gene)
p2 = heatmap_wrapper(top_rodent$gene)
p3 = heatmap_wrapper(top_laurasia$gene)
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
pdf('../../figures/my_figs/fig2_degs.pdf', height = 6, width = 6)
plot_grid(plotlist = list(p1, p2, p3), 
          ncol = 1)
dev.off()
```

## Permutation plot

```{r}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
perm.data = readRDS("permuted_clusters/vertebrateAC_v2_100_permdata.rds")

# Use new orthotype number scheme
BIGSEURAT$dendro.order.type = orthotype_no_labels(BIGSEURAT$dendro.order.type)
```

```{r}
library(WGCNA)

nCells = ncol(BIGSEURAT)
nRuns = length(perm.data$clusters)
labels = matrix(0, nRuns + 1, nCells)

# Convert to new orthotypes
ref_clusters = as.numeric(as.character(orthotype_no_labels(ac.ortho$type_no)))
# ref_clusters = as.numeric(as.character(BIGSEURAT$type_no))
ref_barcodes = Cells(BIGSEURAT)

labels[1,] = ref_clusters

for(r in 2:(nRuns+1)){
  this_barcodes = names(perm.data$clusters[[r-1]]$original)
  converted = matchLabels(as.numeric(as.character(perm.data$clusters[[r-1]]$permuted))+1, 
                          orthotype_no_labels(as.numeric(as.character(perm.data$clusters[[r-1]]$original))+1)) # -1 # for zero-base indexing
  labels[r,] = converted[match(ref_barcodes, this_barcodes),]
}

rownames(labels) = c("Ref", paste0("Perm", 1:nRuns))

# Switch to one-base indexing
# labels[labels > (-1)] = labels[labels > (-1)]+1

# Sort by dendro.order
dendro.order = levels(BIGSEURAT$dendro.order.type)
sorted.matrix = labels[,order(factor(labels[1,], levels = levels(BIGSEURAT$dendro.order.type)))]

# Relabel un-mapped cell modules to -1 (grey) but keep NAs as NAs (white)
sorted.matrix[!sorted.matrix %in% unique(ref_clusters) & !is.na(sorted.matrix)] = -1

# Account for zero based indexing
zeroIndex = length(which(sorted.matrix == 0))>0
if(zeroIndex) {
  # colors = structure(labels2colors_dt(0:(max(ref_clusters)+1), omit = "white"), names = as.character(-1:max(ref_clusters)))
  # custom_colors = c('grey', myPalette(length(colors)-1)) %>% setNames(seq(-1, nClusters(BIGSEURAT)-1))
  colors = structure(labels2colors_dt(0:(max(ref_clusters)+1)), names = as.character(-1:max(ref_clusters)))
} else {
  # colors = structure(labels2colors_dt(0:(max(ref_clusters)), omit = "white"), names = as.character(c(-1, 1:max(ref_clusters))))
  rnames = c(-1, 1:nClusters(BIGSEURAT))
  # custom_colors = c('grey', myPalette(length(rnames)-1)) %>% setNames(rnames)
  colors = structure(labels2colors_dt(0:(max(ref_clusters))), names = as.character(c(-1, 1:max(ref_clusters))))
}

# map = c(-1, as.numeric(as.character(orthotype_no_labels(levels(ac.ortho$type_no)))))
# names(map) = c(-1,levels(ac.ortho$type_no))
# new_mat <- matrix(map[as.character(sorted.matrix)], nrow = nrow(sorted.matrix))
# # new_mat[is.na(new_mat)] = -1 # Keep NAs as NA
# rownames(new_mat) = rownames(sorted.matrix)
# sorted.matrix = new_mat
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=17}

# Row and column splits
row_km = seq_along(rownames(sorted.matrix)) %>% setNames(rownames(sorted.matrix))
# col_km = factor(sorted.matrix[1,], levels = dendro.order)

# Label clusters
midpoints = sapply(dendro.order, function(cluster) floor(mean(which(sorted.matrix[1,] == cluster))))
top_ha = columnAnnotation(foo = anno_mark(at = midpoints, 
                                      labels = as.numeric(dendro.order), 
                                      labels_rot = 0, 
                                      link_height = unit(7,"mm"), 
                                      # link_width = unit(3,"mm"), 
                                      link_gp = gpar(col="black", lty = 1, lwd = 1)))

ari.df = data.frame(Permutation = names(perm.data$clusters), 
                      ARI = sapply(perm.data$clusters, function(x) adj.rand.index(x$original, x$permuted)))
right_ha = rowAnnotation(nPCs = anno_barplot(c(20, perm.data$rand.nPCs), border = FALSE, gp = gpar(fill = darken(AcPalette3(5)[1], 0.2), col = "white"), bar_width = 0.9), 
                         k = anno_barplot(c(20, perm.data$rand.k), border = FALSE, gp = gpar(fill = darken(AcPalette3(5)[2], 0.2), col = "white"), bar_width = 0.9),
                         Res = anno_barplot(c(1.5, perm.data$rand.res), border = FALSE, gp = gpar(fill = darken(AcPalette3(5)[3], 0.2), col = "white"), bar_width = 0.9),
                         nClusters = anno_barplot(c(nClusters(BIGSEURAT), sapply(perm.data$clusters, function(x) length(levels(x$permuted)))), 
                                                  border = FALSE, gp = gpar(fill = darken(AcPalette3(5)[4], 0.2), col = "white"), bar_width = 0.9),
                         ARI = anno_barplot(c(1, round(ari.df$ARI, 2)), border = FALSE, gp = gpar(fill = darken(AcPalette3(5)[5], 0.2), col = "white"), bar_width = 0.9),
                         annotation_name_rot = 45, 
                         width = unit(7, "cm"), 
                         gap = unit(2, "mm"))

# custom_colors = c('grey', colorspace::lighten(myPalette(floor(length(colors)/2)), 0.1), colorspace::lighten(myPalette(floor(length(colors)/2)), 0.3)) %>% setNames(seq(-1, length(colors)-2))

dend_custom_order = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.v2.rds')
labels(dend_custom_order) = orthotype_no_labels(as.numeric(labels(dend_custom_order)) + 1)
clusters <- cutree(as.hclust(dend_custom_order), k = 13)
clusters = clusters[as.character(labels(dend_custom_order))]
temp_cols = ClusterPalette(clusters,
  colors = c('blue', '#584B9FFF',   'deepskyblue', 'cyan', 'brown','tan', 'red', 
             'orange', 'deeppink', 'chartreuse', 'antiquewhite', 'violet', 'gold'), vary.by = 0.5, debug = F)
# labels_colors(dend_custom_order) <- temp_cols
# plot(dend_custom_order)
names(temp_cols) = names(clusters) #orthotype_no_labels(as.numeric(names(sort(clusters)))+1)
custom_colors = c(temp_cols, 'grey')
names(custom_colors) = c(names(temp_cols), '-1')

pdf('../../figures/my_figs/fig2_orthotype-reproducibility.pdf', height=7, width=17)

# Heatmap
Heatmap(sorted.matrix, name = "mat2", show_row_names = FALSE, 
        show_column_names = FALSE, na_col = "white", col = custom_colors, 
        cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, row_split = row_km, 
        # column_split = col_km, column_gap = unit(0,"mm"), 
        row_gap = unit(0, "mm"), column_title = NULL, border = FALSE, 
        show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, 
        row_title = names(row_km), row_title_rot = 0, 
        top_annotation = top_ha, right_annotation = right_ha, 
        use_raster = TRUE, 
        raster_quality = 2)

# Add horizontal bars separating rows
for(i_slice in seq_along(unique(row_km))) {
  	decorate_heatmap_body("mat2", row_slice = i_slice, {
  	  grid.lines(c(0, 1), c(0, 0), gp = gpar(lty = 1, lwd = 1))
  	})
}

decorate_heatmap_body("mat2", row_slice = 1, {
  grid.lines(c(1,0), c(1, 1), gp = gpar(lty = 1, lwd = 1))
})

dev.off()
```

# Generate genome-wide expression matrix for OrthoTypes

Find genes that are conserved in human and mouse (20394 orthologs)

```{r, eval = params$bigmatrix}
vertebrateAC = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v2_100.rds')
merge_1_2_3_4 = readRDS("../../Orthology/martMergeRefHuman_modified.rds")
oneToOneMartHumanMouse = merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4$`Mouse homology type` == "ortholog_one2one",]
oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name`[oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name` == ""] = oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene stable ID`[oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name` == ""]

# Generate the ortholog seurat object for each species
BigMatrixList = lapply(unique(vertebrateAC$species), function(species) BigOrthologMatrix(species, unique(oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name`)))
names(BigMatrixList) = unique(vertebrateAC$species)
```

Make big matrix

```{r, eval = params$bigmatrix}
library(Matrix)
BigMatrix = Matrix(do.call(cbind, BigMatrixList), sparse = TRUE) 
# BigMatrix[is.na(BigMatrix)] = 0 # make NAs zero
BigMatrix = BigMatrix[,match(str_split_fixed(colnames(vertebrateAC), "_", 2)[,2], colnames(BigMatrix))]
saveRDS(BigMatrix, "../../../storage/Ortho_Objects/VertebrateBigMatrix.rds")
# BigMatrix = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/VertebrateBigMatrix.rds")
colnames(BigMatrix) = Cells(vertebrateAC)
BIGSEURAT = CreateSeuratObject(counts = BigMatrix[rownames(BigMatrix) != "",])
BIGSEURAT@meta.data = vertebrateAC@meta.data
# BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@data = BigMatrix[rownames(BigMatrix) != "",]
BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@data[is.na(BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@data)] <- 0 # make NAs zero
BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@counts[is.na(BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@counts)] <- 0 # make NAs zero
# BIGSEURAT = RenameCells(BIGSEURAT, new.names = paste0(BIGSEURAT$species, "_", Cells(BIGSEURAT)))
# BIGSEURAT = RenameCells(BIGSEURAT, new.names = Cells(vertebrateAC))

# Add umap
BIGSEURAT@reductions$umap = vertebrateAC@reductions$umap 

# Switch from zero base to one base indexing for type number
BIGSEURAT$type = factor(as.numeric(BIGSEURAT$seurat_clusters))
BIGSEURAT$dendro.order.type = factor(as.numeric(as.character(BIGSEURAT$dendro.order))+1, levels = as.numeric(levels(BIGSEURAT$dendro.order))+1)

saveRDS(BIGSEURAT, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
```

## Type-specific score: convolution filter

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# Objects
# vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v3_100.rds")
BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
# vertebrateAC.list = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, split.by = "species")

# Test all DE markers
# features.use = nDEGs(subset(vertebrateACMarkers, group == 16), presto = TRUE, value = TRUE)
features.use = rownames(BIGSEURAT)

# Scale within each species
scaled.list = lapply(speciesList, function(this.species){
  
  # Average expression in each OT
  # average.data = AverageExpression(object, group.by = "seurat_clusters", assay = "RNA", features = features.use)$RNA
  object = subset(BIGSEURAT, species == this.species)
  
  # Average expression and then log transform
  average.data = LogAvgExpr(object, group.by = "seurat_clusters", assay = "RNA", features = features.use)
  
  # Scale each gene across OTs
  scaled.data = t(scale(t(average.data)))
  
  # Set NAs (features with no variance to 0)
  scaled.data[is.na(scaled.data)] = 0
  
  return(scaled.data)
})

# Reshape to be n_gene matrices of size n_species x n_OT
matrix.list = mclapply(features.use, function(feature) {
  do.call(gtools::smartbind, lapply(scaled.list, function(x) data.frame(as.list(x[feature,]))))
  }, mc.cores = 1)
names(matrix.list) = features.use

saveRDS(matrix.list, "../../Ortho_Objects/scaled_OT_expression_log.rds")
```

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# Objects
# vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v3_100.rds")
BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
# vertebrateAC.list = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, split.by = "species")

# Test all DE markers
# features.use = nDEGs(subset(vertebrateACMarkers, group == 16), presto = TRUE, value = TRUE)
features.use = rownames(BIGSEURAT)

# Scale within each species
scaled.list = lapply(speciesList.liz, function(this.species){
  
  # Average expression in each OT
  # average.data = AverageExpression(object, group.by = "seurat_clusters", assay = "RNA", features = features.use)$RNA
  object = subset(BIGSEURAT, species == this.species)
  
  # Average expression and then log transform
  average.data = AverageExpression(object, group.by = "seurat_clusters", assay = "RNA", features = features.use)$RNA
  
  # Scale each gene across OTs
  scaled.data = t(scale(t(average.data)))
  
  # Set NAs (features with no variance to 0)
  scaled.data[is.na(scaled.data)] = 0
  
  return(scaled.data)
})

# Reshape to be n_gene matrices of size n_species x n_OT
matrix.list = mclapply(features.use, function(feature) {
  do.call(gtools::smartbind, lapply(scaled.list, function(x) data.frame(as.list(x[feature,]))))
  }, mc.cores = 1)
names(matrix.list) = features.use

saveRDS(matrix.list, "../../Ortho_Objects/scaled_OT_expression_v4_nonlog.rds")
```

Obtain conservation score for each gene

Normalize by max z-score possible for sample size of n_OT (max z-score is $\frac{n-1}{\sqrt{n}}$)

```{r}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scaled_OT_expression_log.rds")

# Normalize
rescaled.matrix.list = mclapply(matrix.list, function(matrix) matrix/((ncol(matrix)-1)/sqrt(ncol(matrix))), mc.cores = 8)

BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
n_orthotypes = nClusters(BIGSEURAT)
n_species = length(unique(BIGSEURAT$species))

score.lists = mclapply(seq_len(n_orthotypes), function(cluster){
  
    # Make filter for OT
    filter = matrix(0, n_species, n_orthotypes)
    filter[,cluster] = 1
    
    # Test filter for each gene
    score.list = sapply(rescaled.matrix.list, function(rescaled.matrix){
      rescaled.matrix[is.na(rescaled.matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
      norm(as.matrix(rescaled.matrix - filter)) # Typo found here 12/10/24, but decided not to use F-norm, 
                                                # 1-norm works better
    })
    
    return(score.list)
}, mc.cores = 8)

# gene by OT matrix
scores.matrix = do.call(cbind, score.lists)
saveRDS(scores.matrix, "../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.F.rds")
```

Compare Frobehnius norm to the 1-norm
1-norm works better than F-norm because:

* genes with zero expression to 17 
* genes with no clear pattern to 15
* genes marking one cell type to <5
* genes marking multiple cell types to ~8.5

```{r}
scores.matrix.F = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.F.rds")
scores.matrix = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.rds")

plot(as.vector(scores.matrix.F), as.vector(scores.matrix))

scores.matrix = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.F.rds")

# Get min error
conservation.summary = data.frame(gene = rownames(scores.matrix), 
                                  best.score = apply(scores.matrix, 1, function(x) x[which.min(x)]), 
                                  OrthoType = apply(scores.matrix, 1, function(x) which.min(x)))

saveRDS(conservation.summary, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation_v2.rds")

conservation.summary.F = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation_v2.rds")
conservation.summary = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")

plot(as.vector(conservation.summary.F$best.score), conservation.summary$best.score)
```

```{r}
                                  OrthoType = apply(scores.matrix, 1, function(x) which.min(x)))

saveRDS(conservation.summary, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")

PrettyHistogram(conservation.summary$best.score, xlab = "type-specificity (error)", bins = 100)

conservation.summary %>% arrange(best.score) %>% head(100)
conservation.summary %>% arrange(best.score) %>% tail(100)
```

### Best marker for each OT

```{r}
scores.matrix = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.rds")
best.specificity.score = data.frame(gene = rownames(scores.matrix)[apply(scores.matrix, 2, which.min)], 
                                    score = apply(scores.matrix, 2, min), 
                                    OT = 1:ncol(scores.matrix))

best.specificity.score$type = Metadata(BIGSEURAT, 'type_no', 'type')$type

best.specificity.score = best.specificity.score %>% arrange(type)

# Examples of scores
# ISL1 super good, NXPH2 good, CBLN1 okay


# Reassign duplicates
getDuplicates(best.specificity.score$gene)
# best.specificity.score$gene[best.specificity.score$OT == 13] = 'NR2F2'
# best.specificity.score$gene[best.specificity.score$OT == 42] = 'POU6F2'
# best.specificity.score$gene[best.specificity.score$OT == 9] = 'SEC16B'
# getDuplicates(best.specificity.score$gene)
```

### Permutation test for determining significance cutoff

```{r}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scaled_OT_expression_log.rds")

# Normalize
rescaled.matrix.list = mclapply(matrix.list, function(matrix) matrix/((ncol(matrix)-1)/sqrt(ncol(matrix))), mc.cores = 1)

# vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v3_100.rds")
n_orthotypes = nClusters(BIGSEURAT)
n_species = length(unique(BIGSEURAT$species))

# Randomize orthotype labels across species
rescaled.matrix.list = mclapply(rescaled.matrix.list, function(matrix) ShuffleRows(matrix), mc.cores = 1)

score.lists = mclapply(seq_len(n_orthotypes), function(cluster){
  
    # Make filter for OT
    filter = matrix(0, n_species, n_orthotypes)
    filter[,cluster] = 1
    
    # Test filter for each gene
    score.list = sapply(rescaled.matrix.list, function(rescaled.matrix){
      rescaled.matrix[is.na(rescaled.matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
      norm(as.matrix(rescaled.matrix - filter, type = "F")) # using 1-norm
    })
    
    return(score.list)
}, mc.cores = 1)

# gene by OT matrix
scores.matrix = do.call(cbind, score.lists)
saveRDS(scores.matrix, "../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.shuffled.rds")
```

Shuffled computation is much faster for some reason

```{r}
system.time(lapply(1:1000, function(i) norm(as.matrix(rescaled.matrix - filter, type = "F"))))
rescaled.matrix.shuffled = ShuffleRows(rescaled.matrix)
system.time(lapply(1:1000, function(i) norm(as.matrix(rescaled.matrix.shuffled - filter, type = "F"))))
```

Plot histogram

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
scores.matrix = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.shuffled.rds")
conservation.summary = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")
top20 = head((conservation.summary %>% arrange(best.score))$gene, 20)

scores.matrix.melt = reshape2::melt(scores.matrix) %>% setNames(c("gene", "OT", "score"))
scores.matrix.melt$label = as.character(scores.matrix.melt$gene)
scores.matrix.melt$label[!scores.matrix.melt$gene %in% top20] = ""

PrettyHistogram(scores.matrix.melt$score)
```

Distributions seem equal across OTs, will compute a single FDR cutoff

```{r}
scores.matrix = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.rds")
scores.matrix.shuffled = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.shuffled.rds")

# Test for normality fail -> not normal
library(nortest)
shapiro.test(scores.matrix.shuffled[sample(1:nrow(scores.matrix.shuffled), 5000),1])
ad.test(scores.matrix.shuffled[,1])

# Any score less than 13 is very unlikely due to chance
x.min = 5
x.max = 20
(PrettyHistogram(as.vector(scores.matrix.shuffled), logY = FALSE, bins = 50) + scale_x_continuous(limits = c(x.min, x.max))) / (PrettyHistogram(as.vector(scores.matrix), logY = FALSE, bins = 50) + scale_x_continuous(limits = c(x.min, x.max)))

x.min = 15
x.max = 25
(PrettyHistogram(as.vector(scores.matrix.shuffled), logY = FALSE, bins = 50) + scale_x_continuous(limits = c(x.min, x.max))) / (PrettyHistogram(as.vector(scores.matrix), logY = FALSE, bins = 50) + scale_x_continuous(limits = c(x.min, x.max)))
```

### Manhattan plot

```{r, fig.width=20}
BIGSEURAT = smartReadRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
gene_type = fread('../../reference_files/gene-type.csv')
markers = gene_type$gene
scores.matrix = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.rds")
scores.matrix.shuffled = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scores.matrix.shuffled.rds")
conservation.summary = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")

# Normalization
scores.matrix.melt = reshape2::melt(scores.matrix) %>% setNames(c("gene", "OT", "score"))
scores.matrix.melt$rand.score = reshape2::melt(scores.matrix.shuffled)[,3]
scores.matrix.melt$normalized.score = (scores.matrix.melt$score - mean(scores.matrix.melt$rand.score))/(0 - mean(scores.matrix.melt$rand.score))
scores.matrix.melt$normalized.rand.score = (scores.matrix.melt$rand.score - mean(scores.matrix.melt$rand.score))/(0 - mean(scores.matrix.melt$rand.score))

conservation.summary$best.normalized.score = apply(reshape2::dcast(scores.matrix.melt, gene ~ OT, value.var = 'normalized.score') %>% select(-gene), 1, function(x) max(x))
saveRDS(conservation.summary, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")

# Threshold selection
specificity.threshold.low = min(scores.matrix.melt$normalized.rand.score)
specificity.threshold.high = max(scores.matrix.melt$normalized.rand.score)

# Marker selection
scores.matrix.melt$marker = scores.matrix.melt$gene %in% markers
scores.matrix.melt$significant = scores.matrix.melt$normalized.score > specificity.threshold.high
scores.matrix.melt$label_all = paste0("italic('", as.character(scores.matrix.melt$gene), "')")
scores.matrix.melt$label_marker = ifelse(scores.matrix.melt$marker & scores.matrix.melt$significant, paste0("italic('", as.character(scores.matrix.melt$gene), "')"), NA)
scores.matrix.melt$label_signif = ifelse(scores.matrix.melt$significant, paste0("italic('", as.character(scores.matrix.melt$gene), "')"), NA)
scores.matrix.melt$label_high = ifelse(scores.matrix.melt$normalized.score > 0.5, paste0("italic('", as.character(scores.matrix.melt$gene), "')"), NA)

# Top 2
scores.matrix.melt %>%
  mutate(RowIndex = row_number()) %>% 
  group_by(OT) %>%
  arrange(-normalized.score) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 2) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  pull(RowIndex) -> top2_indices
scores.matrix.melt$label_top2 = NA
scores.matrix.melt$label_top2[top2_indices] = scores.matrix.melt$label_all[top2_indices]
scores.matrix.melt$top2 = FALSE
scores.matrix.melt$top2[top2_indices] = TRUE
scores.matrix.melt$show.label = scores.matrix.melt$top2 | scores.matrix.melt$significant & scores.matrix.melt$marker

# Final labels
scores.matrix.melt$label = ifelse(scores.matrix.melt$show.label, paste0("italic('", as.character(scores.matrix.melt$gene), "')"), NA)

# Odd and even for manhattan plot
scores.matrix.melt$odd = as.logical(scores.matrix.melt$OT %% 2)

# Colors
scores.matrix.melt$color = ifelse(scores.matrix.melt$significant & scores.matrix.melt$marker, 
                                  'signif_marker', 
                                  ifelse(scores.matrix.melt$significant, 
                                  'signif', 'other'))
# scores.matrix.melt$fill = ifelse(scores.matrix.melt$top2, 'signif', 'other'))

ots.with.markers = subset(scores.matrix.melt, marker & normalized.score > specificity.threshold.high)$OT %>% unique
message('Number of OTs with specific and conserved known markers: ', length(ots.with.markers))

ots.with.anymarkers = subset(scores.matrix.melt, normalized.score > specificity.threshold.high)$OT %>% unique
message('Number of OTs with specific and conserved any markers: ', length(ots.with.anymarkers))

scores.matrix.melt$ot.with.markers = scores.matrix.melt$OT %in% ots.with.markers
scores.matrix.melt$ot.with.anymarkers = scores.matrix.melt$OT %in% ots.with.anymarkers

xmin = 1
xmax = nClusters(BIGSEURAT)
ymin = min(scores.matrix.melt$normalized.score)
ymax = max(scores.matrix.melt$normalized.score)

scores.matrix.melt$OT = factor(scores.matrix.melt$OT, levels = levels(BIGSEURAT$dendro.order.type))

scores.matrix.melt = scores.matrix.melt %>% arrange(show.label)
scores.matrix.melt$type = Metadata(BIGSEURAT, 'type_no', 'type')$type[match(scores.matrix.melt$OT, Metadata(BIGSEURAT, 'type_no', 'type')$type_no)]
```

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=3.5}
p1 = ggplot(subset(scores.matrix.melt, marker), aes(x = OT, y = score, label = label_marker, color = color))+
  annotate("rect",
            xmin = seq(xmin-0.5, xmax-0.5, by = 1), 
            xmax = seq(xmin+0.5, xmax+0.5, by = 1),
            ymin = 0, 
            ymax = 20, 
            alpha = .2, fill = rep(c('white', 'lightgrey'), nClusters(BIGSEURAT)/2))+
  ggtitle('Known markers')+
  geom_hline(yintercept = specificity.threshold.low, linetype = 'dashed', color = 'red')+
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitter(seed = 1))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c('grey', 'red', 'black'))+
  xlab('orthotype')+
  ylab('specificity score')+
  geom_text_repel(max.overlaps = 5, min.segment.length = 0.05, position = position_jitter(seed = 1), size = 3, parse = TRUE)+
  scale_y_reverse(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1,nClusters(BIGSEURAT),1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)))+
  theme_dario() + theme(legend.position = 'none')

p1
```

```{r, fig.width=11, fig.height=4, dev='cairo_pdf''}
p2 = ggplot(scores.matrix.melt, 
            aes(x = type, y = normalized.score, label = label, color = show.label, fill = color, alpha = show.label))+
  annotate("rect",
            xmin = seq(xmin-0.5, xmax-0.5, by = 1),
            xmax = seq(xmin+0.5, xmax+0.5, by = 1),
            ymin = 0, #min(scores.matrix.melt$normalized.score),
            ymax = 1, #max(scores.matrix.melt$normalized.score),
            alpha = .2, fill = rep(c('white', 'lightgrey'), nClusters(BIGSEURAT)/2))+
  # ggtitle('Orthotype markers      Known, specific markers Other specific markers  Non-specific markers')+
  # scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 21, 21))+
  # geom_bin2d()+
  # scale_fill_continuous(type = "viridis") +
  xlab('Orthotype')+
  ylab('Specificity score')+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)), limits = c(0, 1))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)))+ #breaks = seq(1,nClusters(BIGSEURAT),1), 
  ggrastr::rasterise(geom_jitter(data = subset(scores.matrix.melt, !show.label), position = position_jitter(seed = 1), shape = 21), dpi = 300)+
  geom_jitter(data = subset(scores.matrix.melt, show.label), position = position_jitter(seed = 1), shape = 21)+
  # geom_jitter(data = subset(scores.matrix.melt, !show.label), position = position_jitter(seed = 1), shape = 21)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(specificity.threshold.high), linetype = 'dashed', color = fcols[2], linewidth = 0.25)+
  # geom_jitter(data = subset(scores.matrix.melt, !significant), position = position_jitter(seed = 1), shape = 21, alpha = 0.1)+
  # geom_jitter(data = subset(scores.matrix.melt, significant), position = position_jitter(seed = 1), shape = 21)+
  scale_color_manual('', values = c('grey', 'black'), labels = c('Novel', 'Known'))+
  scale_fill_manual('', values = c('grey', 'grey', fcols[2]), labels = c('Novel', 'Novel', 'Known'))+
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(0.04, 1))+
  guides(color = 'none', alpha = 'none', label = 'none')+
  geom_text_repel(data = subset(scores.matrix.melt, show.label), max.overlaps = Inf, min.segment.length = 0.05, position = position_jitter(seed = 1), size = 2, parse = TRUE)+
  theme_dario() +
  RotatedAxis() +
  theme(legend.position = 'right')

p2

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/specificity-scores.pdf', width = 11, height = 4, device = cairo_pdf)
```

## Conservation score (mean cross-species expression correlation)

Details:

* Is expression in one species in informative of the expression in other species
* Advantage: single score for each species, rather than a score for each hypothesis

```{r}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/scaled_OT_expression_log.rds")
conservation.summary = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")
conservation.summary$cor.score = sapply(matrix.list, function(matrix){
  matrix[is.na(matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
  
  # Check that most species have non zero variance
  vars = apply(matrix, 1, var)
  if(length(which(vars == 0)) > length(speciesList)/2){
    cor.score = NA
  } else {
    cor = cor(t(matrix)) 
    
    # Remove NAs from zero variance rows
    cor.score = mean(na.omit(cor[upper.tri(cor)]))
  }
  
  return(cor.score)
})

# With shuffled OTs across species
conservation.summary$cor.score.rand = sapply(matrix.list, function(matrix){
  matrix[is.na(matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
  
  # Shuffle rows
  matrix = ShuffleRows(matrix)
  
  # Check that most species have non zero variance
  vars = apply(matrix, 1, var)
  if(length(which(vars == 0)) > length(speciesList)/2){
    cor.score = NA
  } else {
    cor = cor(t(matrix)) 
    
    # Remove NAs from zero variance rows
    cor.score = mean(na.omit(cor[upper.tri(cor)]))
  }
  
  return(cor.score)
})

# conservation.summary = subset(conservation.summary, !is.na(cor.score))
conservation.summary %>% arrange(-cor.score) %>% head(20)
PrettyHistogram(conservation.summary$cor.score)
PrettyHistogram(conservation.summary$cor.score.rand)
```

Validate new scoring scheme

```{r most-least-conserved-genes, fig.height=14, fig.width=14}
plot_grid(
  StackedPlots(lapply(conservation.summary %>% arrange(-cor.score) %>% head(5) %>% pull(gene), function(gene) geneDotPlot(vertebrateAC, gene, group.by = "type")),
    height = 1.1, remove.titles = FALSE, legend = "none"), 
  StackedPlots(lapply(conservation.summary %>% na.omit %>% arrange(-cor.score) %>% tail(5) %>% pull(gene), function(gene) geneDotPlot(vertebrateAC, gene, group.by = "type")),
    height = 1.1, remove.titles = FALSE, legend = "none"), ncol = 2)
```

```{r}
# Neuropeptides are more conserved than others
ggboxplot(conservation.summary, y = "cor.score", x = "is.neuropeptide")+
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("FALSE", "TRUE")),
    map_signif_level = TRUE
  )

# Hk genes had lower scores than other genes
ggboxplot(conservation.summary, y = "cor.score", x = "is.hk")+
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("FALSE", "TRUE")),
    map_signif_level = TRUE
  )

# TFs are slightly more conserved than other genes
ggboxplot(conservation.summary, y = "cor.score", x = "is.tf")+
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("FALSE", "TRUE")),
    map_signif_level = TRUE
  )

saveRDS(conservation.summary, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")
```

# Gene set analysis 

Download the gene2go table from NCBI

```{bash, eval = FALSE}
wget https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene/DATA/gene2go.gz -O ../../reference_files/gene2go.gz
zcat < gene2go.gz | awk 'BEGIN{FS="\t";OFS="\t"}($1==9606)' > human_gene2go.tsv

wget https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene/DATA/gene_info.gz -O ../../reference_files/gene_info.gz
zcat < gene_info.gz | awk 'BEGIN{FS="\t";OFS="\t"}($1==9606)' > human_gene_info.tsv
```

```{r, eval = FALSE}
gene2go = fread('../../reference_files/human_gene2go.tsv') %>% 
  setNames(c('tax_id', 'GeneID', 'GoID', 'Evidence', 'Qualifier', 'GoTerm', 'PubMed', 'Category'))

gene_info = fread('../../reference_files/human_gene_info.tsv') 

gene2go$Symbol = gene_info$V3[match(gene2go$GeneID, gene_info$V2)]
write.csv(gene2go, '../../reference_files/human_gene2go_symbol.csv')
```

Set up chunk

```{r}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
gene_type = fread('../../reference_files/gene-type.csv')
gene2go = fread('../../reference_files/human_gene2go_symbol.csv')

conservation.summary = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")
conservation.summary$pct.expr = PercentageExpressed(BIGSEURAT, conservation.summary$gene)

cor.score.cutoff = max(conservation.summary$cor.score.rand, na.rm = TRUE)

markers = gene_type$gene

neurotransmitter = c(gene2go[grepl("neurotransmitter", gene2go$GoTerm)]$Symbol %>% unique %>% sort, 'GAD1', 'GAD2')

# adhesion = gene2go[gene2go$GoTerm %in% c('cell adhesion', 'cell-cell adhesion', 'cell-substrate adhesion') | grepl('cell-cell adhesion', gene2go$GoTerm)]$Symbol %>% unique %>% sort
adhesion = str_split(fread('../../reference_files/KEGG_CELL_ADHESION_MOLECULES_CAMS.v2023.2.Hs.tsv')$KEGG_CELL_ADHESION_MOLECULES_CAMS[17], ',')[[1]]

connexins = sort(rownames(BIGSEURAT)[grepl('^GJA|^GJB|^GJC|^GJD|^GJE', rownames(BIGSEURAT))])

# ConservationScatter = function(df){
#   # ScatterPlot(df, x = "pct.expr", y = "cor.score", lm = FALSE, labels = TRUE, r_pval = FALSE, max.overlaps = 5, label.size = 3, min.segment.length = 0.05) + 
#   top10 = head(df %>% arrange(desc(cor.score)) %>% pull(gene), 10)
#   df$label = ifelse(df$gene %in% top10, paste0("italic('", as.character(df$gene), "')"), NA)
#   
#   ggplot(data, aes(x = pct.expr, y = cor.score, label = names))+
#     geom_point(fill = "grey", color = 'black', shape = 21)+
#     ylab('Conservation score')+
#     xlab('Percentage expressed')+
#     geom_text_repel(parse = TRUE, min.segment.length = 0.05, max.overlaps = Inf)
#     scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))+
#     geom_hline(yintercept = cor.score.cutoff, linetype = 'dashed', color = 'red')+
#     # scale_x_continuous(minor_breaks = seq(1, 40, 1)) + 
#     theme_cowplot()
#     # theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(colour=alpha('grey', 0.3), size=0.3, linetype = 'dashed'), 
#     #       panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour=alpha('grey', 0.3), size=0.3, linetype = 'dashed'))
# }

ConservationScatterFlipped = function(df, top = 10){
  # ScatterPlot(df, x = "cor.score", y = "pct.expr", lm = FALSE, labels = TRUE, r_pval = FALSE, max.overlaps = 5, label.size = 3, min.segment.length = 0.05) + 
  top10 = df %>% arrange(desc(cor.score)) %>% pull(gene) %>% head(top)
  df$label = ifelse(df$gene %in% top10, paste0("italic('", as.character(df$gene), "')"), NA)
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = cor.score, y = pct.expr, label = label))+
    xlab('Conservation score')+
    ylab('Percentage expressed')+
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,1))+
    geom_point(data = subset(df, is.na(label)), fill = "grey", color = 'grey', shape = 21)+
    geom_vline(xintercept = cor.score.cutoff, linetype = 'dashed', color = 'red')+
    geom_point(data = subset(df, !is.na(label)), fill = "grey", color = 'black', shape = 21)+
    geom_text_repel(min.segment.length = 0.05, max.overlaps = Inf, parse = TRUE)+
    # scale_x_continuous(minor_breaks = seq(1, 40, 1)) + 
    theme_cowplot()
    # theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(colour=alpha('grey', 0.3), size=0.3, linetype = 'dashed'), 
    #       panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour=alpha('grey', 0.3), size=0.3, linetype = 'dashed'))
}
```

## Gap junction coupled amacrine cells

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=4.5}
conserved.connexins = subset(conservation.summary %>% arrange(desc(cor.score)), gene %in% connexins & !is.na(cor.score))
ConservationScatter(conserved.connexins)
```

No evidence of connexin expression in GABA nGnG as suggested by Kerstein

## Transcription factors

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=4.5}
conserved.tfs = subset(conservation.summary %>% arrange(desc(cor.score)), gene %in% tf_genes & !is.na(cor.score))
ConservationScatter(conserved.tfs)
```

### GSEA

```{r}
# Z-score (need positive and negative scores)
cor.zscore = (na.omit(conservation.summary$cor.score) - mean(na.omit(conservation.summary$cor.score)))/sd(na.omit(conservation.summary$cor.score))
names(cor.zscore) = na.omit(conservation.summary)$gene

library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

# GSEA
ego2  <- gseGO(geneList    = sort(cor.zscore, decreasing = TRUE),
              OrgDb        = org.Hs.eg.db,
              ont          = "BP",
              keyType      = "SYMBOL",
              minGSSize    = 50,
              maxGSSize    = 1000,
              pvalueCutoff = 0.3,
              verbose      = TRUE, 
              scoreType    = "std")

head(ego2@result, 35)
```

```{r}
manual_annotation = list(SAC = c(8), # CHAT+
                         A17 = c(30,32), # PRKCA+, SDK1+
                         nNOS = c(31, 4, 12), # NOS+
                         CA1 = c(33), # DDC+, TH+
                         CA2 = 14, # TPBG+, SLC6A3+, TH-, DDC-
                         NPY = 6, # NPY+
                         SemiL = NA, # CALB2+ and NPY+ or CCK+
                         Sec = NA, # SCG2+; not the same as CA2
                         PDGFRA = 21, # PDGFRA+
                         Wiry = NA, # PYGB+
                         SubP = NA, # TAC1+
                         VIP = 36, # VIP+; not the same as CA2
                         VG1 = NA, # SLC17A6+; not found
                         A2 = c(22), # GDJ2+, PROX1+
                         A8 = 26, # SYT2+, SLC6A9+
                         NNgly = 2, # glycinergic nGnG
                         NNgaba = 16, # GBX2+ nGnG
                         CRH = 19, # GBX2+ CRH+
                         SEG = 24, # SATB2+, EBF3+
                         VG3 = 27, # SLC17A8+, SDK2+
                         KT2 = NA, # PVALB+, EBF3-
                         
                         # Novel types
                         MAF = c(1,10), 
                         SLC35D3 = c(29),
                         TRHDE = c(18,41),
                         RXRG = c(23),
                         ROBO3 = c(17),
                         # EOMES = c(12),
                         debris = c(NA)) 

# Add plus one to each
# manual_annotation = lapply(manual_annotation, function(x) x+1)

# Assign annotations
BIGSEURAT$type_no = BIGSEURAT$type
BIGSEURAT = AssignAnnotations(BIGSEURAT, manual_annotation, use = 'type_no')

# Concatenate cluster and lit type
BIGSEURAT = AssignName(BIGSEURAT)

t(t(table(BIGSEURAT$type)))
```

Keep separate because: 
* 30 has lower PRCKA
* Several genes distinguish these two KIRREL3, ESRRG, SLC24A2
* They are robust (see robustness analysis)
* Usually form different clusters in species

## GABAergic vs glycinergic classification

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6}
call = GabaGlyClassification2(BIGSEURAT) #sigmas1 = c(0.02, 0.1), sigmas1 = c(0.02, 0.1))
BIGSEURAT = call$object
call$plt
```

Override Gaussian mixture model

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=9}
BIGSEURAT = GabaGlyClassification(BIGSEURAT, cutoff.Gly = 0.2, cutoff.GABA = 0.2, ac.order = FALSE, group.by = 'type_no')
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/fig3_GABA-gly-classification.pdf', height=3, width=9)
```

Markers:
* SLC32A1 is transporter required for both GABA and glycine uptake into synaptic vesicles
* Slc6a1, Slc6a13,and Slc6a11 encode GABA transporter types 1, 2, and 3, respectively
* Gad1 and Gad2 encode two forms of glutamate decarboxylase
* Slc6a9 and Slc6a5 encode vesicular glycine transporters 1 and 2, respectively

## Transfer of GABA gly classification onto orthotypes

Update: 1-15-24

$U = XV, \quad \text{where } U \in \mathbb{R}^{|OT| \times |species|}, X \in \mathbb{R}^{|OT| \times |type|}, V \in \mathbb{R}^{|type| \times |species|}$
X contains the proportion of OT j that maps to type i in species k
V contains the probability of being classified as GABA- or glycinergic in species k

### Averaged over all species

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=4}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')

# Check OT presence in species
table(BIGSEURAT$species, BIGSEURAT$type)

BIGSEURAT$species_type2 = paste0(BIGSEURAT$species, '-', BIGSEURAT$species_type)
X = as.matrix(ConfusionMatrix(BIGSEURAT$type, BIGSEURAT$species_type2, plot = FALSE))

dim(X)
colnames(X)

class.meta = readRDS('metadata/GabaGlyMetadata.rds')
class.meta = lapply(seq_along(class.meta), function(i) {
  class.meta[[i]]$species_type2 = paste0(names(class.meta)[[i]], '-', class.meta[[i]]$type)
  return(class.meta[[i]])
})
names(class.meta) = names(SPECIESFILES)
Vdata = do.call(rbind, class.meta[!names(class.meta) %in% c('Zebrafish', 'Goldfish', 'Lamprey')])
dim(Vdata)

data.frame(c(colnames(X), rep(0, length(Vdata$type) - length(colnames(X)))), Vdata$species_type2)

# Two lizard clusters are missing as expected (HC contamination)
VennDiagram(colnames(X), Vdata$species_type2)

# V = as.matrix(data.frame(pGly = Vdata$Gly_posterior[match(colnames(X), Vdata$species_type2)],
#                          pGaba = Vdata$GABA_posterior[match(colnames(X), Vdata$species_type2)]))
V = as.matrix(data.frame(`Gly_score` = Vdata$Gly_score[match(colnames(X), Vdata$species_type2)],
                         `GABA_score` = Vdata$GABA_score[match(colnames(X), Vdata$species_type2)]))

# Check dimensions
dim(X)
dim(V)

U = as.data.frame(X %*% V)
U$cluster = rownames(U)
U$Subclass = 'GABA'
U$Subclass[U$GABA_score < 0.2] = 'Gly'
U$cluster_no = convert_values(U$cluster, Metadata(ac.ortho, 'type', 'type_no') %>% setNames(c('old.names', 'new.names')))

ScatterPlot(U, 'GABA_score', 'Gly_score', fill = 'Subclass', r_pval = FALSE, lm = FALSE, labels = 'cluster_no', 
            max.overlaps = 10, xlab = 'GABA score', ylab = 'Gly score') + 
  scale_fill_manual(name = 'Subclass', values = AcPalette3(2) %>% setNames(c('GABA', 'Gly')))

ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/gaba-gly-scores.pdf', width = 3.5, height = 2.5)
```

### Within each species

```{r}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')

# Check OT presence in species
tabulation = table(BIGSEURAT$species, BIGSEURAT$type)

objectList = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, 'species')
X.list = lapply(objectList, function(object) {
  object$species_type2 = paste0(object$species, "-", object$species_type)
  as.matrix(ConfusionMatrix(object$type, object$species_type2, plot = FALSE, fill.na = NULL)) # Don't fill NAs with zero
})

# Dimensions
lapply(X.list, dim)

# Check that rows sum to 1
lapply(X.list, rowSums)

class.meta = readRDS('metadata/GabaGlyMetadata.rds')
class.meta = lapply(seq_along(class.meta), function(i) {
  class.meta[[i]]$species_type2 = paste0(names(class.meta)[[i]], '-', class.meta[[i]]$type)
  return(class.meta[[i]])
})
names(class.meta) = names(SPECIESFILES)

U.list = lapply(names(X.list), function(species){
  X = as.matrix(X.list[[species]])
  V = class.meta[[species]]$Gly_score[match(colnames(X), class.meta[[species]]$species_type2)]
  X %*% V
})

U = t(do.call(cbind, U.list))
rownames(U) = names(X.list)

# Be smart when making X matrix; only include if the orthotype is robustly observed in species k (>10 cells?). 
U[tabulation < 10] = NA
col_means = colMeans(U, na.rm = TRUE)
Heatmap2(U, 
        legend.name = 'Gly\nscore',
        cluster_rows = FALSE, 
        cluster_columns = FALSE, 
        label = TRUE,
        label.size = 5,
        col = c('white', 'red'),
        na_col = 'grey',
        row_names_side = 'left',
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(mean = anno_barplot(col_means, 
                         gp = gpar(fill = "blue", col = "black"), 
                         border = TRUE)))

saveRDS(U, '../../Ortho_Objects/gly-scores.rds')
```


```{r}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')

# Check OT presence in species
tabulation = table(BIGSEURAT$species, BIGSEURAT$type)

objectList = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, 'species')
X.list = lapply(objectList, function(object) {
  object$species_type2 = paste0(object$species, "-", object$species_type)
  as.matrix(ConfusionMatrix(object$type, object$species_type2, plot = FALSE, fill.na = NULL)) # Don't fill NAs with zero
})

# Dimensions
lapply(X.list, dim)

# Check that rows sum to 1
lapply(X.list, rowSums)

class.meta = readRDS('metadata/GabaGlyMetadata.rds')
class.meta = lapply(seq_along(class.meta), function(i) {
  class.meta[[i]]$species_type2 = paste0(names(class.meta)[[i]], '-', class.meta[[i]]$type)
  return(class.meta[[i]])
})
names(class.meta) = names(SPECIESFILES)

U.list = lapply(names(X.list), function(species){
  X = as.matrix(X.list[[species]])
  V = class.meta[[species]]$GABA_score[match(colnames(X), class.meta[[species]]$species_type2)]
  X %*% V
})

U = t(do.call(cbind, U.list))
rownames(U) = names(X.list)

# Be smart when making X matrix; only include if the orthotype is robustly observed in species k (>10 cells?). 
U[tabulation < 10] = NA
col_means = colMeans(U, na.rm = TRUE)
Heatmap2(U, 
        legend.name = 'GABA\nscore',
        cluster_rows = FALSE, 
        cluster_columns = FALSE, 
        label = TRUE,
        label.size = 5,
        col = c('white', 'red'),
        na_col = 'grey',
        row_names_side = 'left',
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(mean = anno_barplot(col_means, 
                         gp = gpar(fill = "blue", col = "black"), 
                         border = TRUE)))

saveRDS(U, '../../Ortho_Objects/gaba-scores.rds')
```

### Identification of conserved dual inhibitory ACs

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
objectList = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, split.by = 'species')

tableList = lapply(objectList, function(object) {
  table(object$type, object$species_type2)
})
saveRDS(tableList, '../../Ortho_Objects/tableList.rds')

overlap.stats = lapply(tableList, OverlapStatistics)

# Gabaergic that ocassionally express glyT1
clusters.16 = as.character(CorrespondingCluster(overlap.stats, cluster = "16_NNgaba*")$ident2)
clusters.38 = as.character(CorrespondingCluster(overlap.stats, cluster = "38")$ident2)
clusters.38
clusters.16

# Glycinergic that ocassionally express Gad2
clusters.15 = as.character(CorrespondingCluster(overlap.stats, cluster = "15")$ident2)
clusters.18 = as.character(CorrespondingCluster(overlap.stats, cluster = "18_TRHDE")$ident2)
clusters.15
clusters.18

# nGnG
clusters.16 = as.character(CorrespondingCluster(overlap.stats, cluster = "16_NNgaba*")$ident2)
clusters.2 = as.character(CorrespondingCluster(overlap.stats, cluster = "2_NNgly")$ident2)


Idents(BIGSEURAT) = 'species_type2'

ggarrange(
  TitlePlot(DotPlot2(BIGSEURAT, group.by = 'species_type2', idents = clusters.15, features = c('SLC6A9', 'GAD2', 'GAD1'), coord.flip = FALSE), '15 (gly dual)'),
  TitlePlot(DotPlot2(BIGSEURAT, group.by = 'species_type2', idents = clusters.18, features = c('SLC6A9', 'GAD2', 'GAD1'), coord.flip = FALSE), '18_TRHDE (gly dual)'),
  TitlePlot(DotPlot2(BIGSEURAT, group.by = 'species_type2', idents = clusters.2, features = c('SLC6A9', 'GAD2', 'GAD1'), coord.flip = FALSE), '2 (gly nGnG)'),
  TitlePlot(DotPlot2(BIGSEURAT, group.by = 'species_type2', idents = clusters.16, features = c('SLC6A9', 'GAD2', 'GAD1'), coord.flip = FALSE), '15 (gaba nGnG)'),
  nrow = 1, common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right'
)

```

## Correlation heatmap

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=10}
vertebrateAC = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_v2_100.rds')
vertebrateAC@meta.data = BIGSEURAT@meta.data

dendro = CorrelationHeatmap(vertebrateAC, group.by = 'type_no', cluster_rows = TRUE, return.dendrogram = TRUE)
desired_order <- c(setdiff(labels(dendro), '8'), '8')
dend_custom_order <- dendextend::rotate(dendro, order = desired_order)
saveRDS(dend_custom_order, '../../Ortho_Objects/dend_custom_order.rds')
```

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=10}
pdf('../../figures/my_figs/ot-correlation-heatmap.pdf', height = 7, width = 9)

                   group.by = 'type_no', 
                   cluster_rows = dend_custom_order, 
                   cols = c('white', '#584B9FFF'), 
                   width = unit(5, "in"),
                   height = unit(5, "in"))
dev.off()
```

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=12}
saveRDS(BIGSEURAT, '../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
```
