```{r}
# save(conserved.tfs, conserved.nontfs.all, all.masks, file = "../BC/tf_analysis/conserved.tf.tables.RData")
load("../BC/tf_analysis/conserved.tf.tables.RData")
system.time({
  nontf.trees = mclapply(seq_len(10000), function(iter){
  biased.sample = sample(1:nrow(conserved.nontfs.all), nrow(conserved.tfs), prob = conserved.nontfs.all$sampling.weight)
  features.use = conserved.nontfs.all$gene[biased.sample]
  trees = BinaryTree(masks = all.masks[[2]][features.use], bootstrap = FALSE) # BinaryTree(features.use, bootstrap = FALSE)
  trees$genes = features.use
  return(trees)
  }, mc.cores = 32)
})

saveRDS(nontf.trees, "../BC/tf_analysis/nontf.trees.rds")
```

```{r}
nontf.trees = readRDS("../BC/tf_analysis/nontf.trees.rds")

# Check if OFF bipolars are monophyletic
OFFBIPOLARS = c("BC1A", "BC1B", "BC2", "BC3A", "BC3B", "BC4")
nontf.trees.summary = data.frame(iter = seq_along(nontf.trees), 
           UPGMA = sapply(nontf.trees, function(trees) is.monophyletic(trees$UPGMA, OFFBIPOLARS)), 
           NJ = sapply(nontf.trees, function(trees) is.monophyletic(trees$NJ, OFFBIPOLARS)),
           MP = sapply(nontf.trees, function(trees) is.monophyletic(trees$MP, OFFBIPOLARS))
)

# Plot a few and check visually
lapply(nontf.trees[1:10], function(x) plot(x$MP, type = "unrooted"))
```

```{r}
falses = which(apply(nontf.trees.summary[,-1], 1, function(x) any(!x)))
nontf.trees.summary[falses,]

# Plot cases
lapply(nontf.trees[falses], function(iter) {
  # plot(x$UGPMA, type = "unrooted")
  # plot(x$NJ, type = "unrooted")
  lapply(c("UPGMA", "NJ", "MP"), function(method) plot(iter[[method]], type = "unrooted"))
})
```

We can reproduce the TF tree discrepancy easily with all three methods

```{r}
tf.expr.mask = readRDS("../BC/tf_analysis/bc.tf.expr.mask.rds")
tf.tree.indval = BinaryTree(rownames(tf.expr.mask), bootstrap = FALSE)
plot(tf.tree.indval$MP, type = "unrooted")

is.monophyletic(tf.tree.indval$UPGMA, OFFBIPOLARS)
is.monophyletic(tf.tree.indval$NJ, OFFBIPOLARS)
is.monophyletic(tf.tree.indval$MP, OFFBIPOLARS)
```

## Displaced amacrine cells

Genes associated with soma displacement: 

* GAP43 is interesting as its expressed at high levels in neuronal growth cones

Without separating gaba and gly

```{r}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")

# displaced.types = c(26, 24, 31, 40, 2, 4, 35, 7, 11) # outdated
# BIGSEURAT$displaced2 = ifelse(BIGSEURAT$seurat_clusters %in% displaced.types, TRUE, FALSE)
# BIGSEURAT$order.displaced = factor(BIGSEURAT$seurat_clusters, levels = c(displaced.types, setdiff(levels(BIGSEURAT$dendro.order), displaced.types)))
table(BIGSEURAT$displaced, BIGSEURAT$type)

displaced.markers = FindMarkers(BIGSEURAT, group.by = "displaced", ident.1 = TRUE, ident.2 = FALSE)

lapply(rownames(displaced.markers)[1:10], function(gene) geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, gene, group.by = "type"))

# TENM3 does not seem to be involved
geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, "TENM3", group.by = "type")
geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, "GAP43", group.by = "type")
```


With separating gaba and gly and downsampling each type

```{r}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")

gaba.subset = subset(BIGSEURAT, classification == 'GABA')
table(gaba.subset$displaced, gaba.subset$type)
displaced.markers.sep = FindMarkersFast(DownsampleSeurat(gaba.subset, size = 1000, group.by = 'type'), group.by = "displaced", ident.1 = TRUE, ident.2 = FALSE, p_val_adj_cutoff = 1, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0)
lapply(rownames(displaced.markers.sep)[1:10], function(gene) geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, gene, group.by = "type"))

volcanoPlot(displaced.markers.sep, fc_cutoff = 0.25, labels = TRUE, max.overlaps = 10, size = 2, max_fdr = 1e-300)
```

Mouse analysis

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=20}
mouse = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/MouseAC_v6.rds')

displaced.mouse.types = c(2, 7, 17, 21, 32, 36, 37, 39, 44, 46, 48, 54)
on_sac_genes = read.csv('specificity_analysis/on_sac_genes.csv', row.names = 1)$x
off_sac_genes = read.csv('specificity_analysis/off_sac_genes.csv', row.names = 1)$x

# Genes that distinguish on and off sacs
mouse = AddModuleScore(mouse, features = list(on_sac_genes), name="ON_SAC_score")
mouse = AddModuleScore(mouse, features = list(off_sac_genes), name="OFF_SAC_score")
mouse$SAC_SCORE = mouse$ON_SAC_score1 - mouse$OFF_SAC_score1

# Subset to each one and subcluster
displaced.list = lapply(displaced.mouse.types, function(x) {
  object = subset(mouse, cluster_no == x)
  ClusterSeurat(object, cluster_resolution = 0.2)
})

plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(displaced.list, function(x) DimPlot(x, group.by = 'batch') + NoLegend()), 
          labels = displaced.mouse.types)
```

7, 39, 46 form two clear clusters

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=20}
plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(displaced.list, function(x) FeaturePlot(x, features = c('TENM3'))+NoLegend()), labels = displaced.mouse.types)
plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(displaced.list, function(x) FeaturePlot(x, features = c('FEZF1'))+NoLegend()), labels = displaced.mouse.types)
plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(displaced.list, function(x) FeaturePlot(x, features = c('GAP43'))+NoLegend()), labels = displaced.mouse.types)
plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(displaced.list, function(x) FeaturePlot(x, features = c('SAC_SCORE'))+NoLegend()), labels = displaced.mouse.types)
```

# Genes that correlate with displaced proportion

```{r, fig.height=20, fig.width=9}
prop.displaced = MeanMetadata(BIGSEURAT, 'type', 'prop.displaced')
avg.expr = LogAvgExpr(BIGSEURAT, group.by = 'type', assay = 'RNA')
avg.expr

# matrix multiplication should be the fastest way, but it wouldn't be scaled...

cor.displaced = apply(avg.expr, 1, function(x) cor(prop.displaced, x))
table(is.na(cor.displaced))
table(apply(avg.expr, 1, function(x) var(x) == 0)) # 1002 non-expressed genes

head(sort(cor.displaced), 50)
tail(sort(cor.displaced), 50)

# Top 10 negative and positive correlated genes
MultigeneDotPlot(BIGSEURAT, genes = names(head(sort(cor.displaced), 10)))
MultigeneDotPlot(BIGSEURAT, genes = names(tail(sort(cor.displaced), 10)))

# Save results
cor.results = data.frame(gene = names(cor.displaced), 
                         cor = cor.displaced, 
                         p.val = apply(avg.expr, 1, function(x) cor.test(prop.displaced, x)$p.value))
cor.results$p.adj = p.adjust(cor.results$p.val, method = 'fdr')
cor.results$log.p = -log10(cor.results$p.adj)
cor.results = cor.results %>% arrange(p.adj)
saveRDS(cor.results, '../../Ortho_Objects/prop-displaced-cor.rds')
head(cor.results, 10)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
ScatterPlot(cor.results, x = 'cor', y = 'log.p', r_pval = FALSE, lm = FALSE, 
            labels = 'gene', max.overlaps = 12, label.size = 2, ylab = '-log10 q-value', xlab = 'Pearson R') + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = 'dashed')

subset(cor.results, p.adj < 0.05)
```


```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
# RELN seems interesting
ScatterPlot(data.frame(type = names(avg.expr['RELN',]), 
                       expression = as.numeric(avg.expr['RELN',]), 
                       prop.displaced = prop.displaced), 
            'expression', 'prop.displaced', labels = 'type', title = 'RELN vs displacement')

ScatterPlot(data.frame(type = colnames(avg.expr), 
                       expression = as.numeric(avg.expr['RNF133',]), 
                       prop.displaced = prop.displaced), 
            'expression', 'prop.displaced', labels = 'type')

# Check for RELN in SACs

geneDotPlot(sac_subset, gene = 'RELN', group.by = 'lit_subtype')
VlnPlot(sac_subset, features = 'RELN', split.by = 'lit_subtype', group.by = 'species')
```

## Linear models? species, type, classification, and proportion displaced

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
ac.ortho = LoadACOrtho()
ac.ortho$type_species = paste0(ac.ortho$species, '-', ac.ortho$type)

# Filter out lowly expressed genes (expressed in at least 15 species)
pct.exp = PercentageExpressed2(ac.ortho, group.by = 'species', features = rownames(ac.ortho))
features.use = names(which(apply(pct.exp, 1, function(x) length(which(x>0)) >= 15)))
features.use # 10245 genes

datExpr = LogAvgExpr(ac.ortho, group.by = 'type_species', assay = 'RNA', features = features.use)
dim(datExpr)

# ANOVA
meta = Metadata2(ac.ortho, c('type_species', 'species', 'type', 'classification', 'prop.displaced'), sort = FALSE)
df = cbind(meta, 
           t(datExpr[,match(meta$type_species, colnames(datExpr))]))
head(df)
df[, c('type_species', 'species', 'type', 'classification', 'prop.displaced', 'GAD1')]

H0=lm(GAD1 ~ classification, data = df)
ggboxplot(df, x = 'classification', y = 'GAD1')

# Control exp: gaba gly genes
ctl.df = do.call(rbind, lapply(rownames(datExpr), function(gene){
  
  # Fit linear model with species and classification
  H0=lm(eval(parse(text = gene)) ~ species, data = df)
  
  # Fit linear model with species, classification, and proportion displaced
  H1=lm(eval(parse(text = gene)) ~ species + classification, data = df)
  
  # Find genes in which the prop.displaced is signficantly associated with expression level
  data.frame(gene = gene, 
             coef = -summary(H1)$coefficients['classificationGly', 1], 
             f.stat = anova(H0, H1)[2,5], 
             p.val = anova(H0, H1)[2,6])
  
}))
ctl.df$p.adj = p.adjust(ctl.df$p.val, method = 'fdr')
ctl.df$avg_log2FC = ctl.df$coef
ctl.df$p_val_adj = ctl.df$p.adj
TitlePlot(volcanoPlot(ctl.df, fdr_cutoff = 0.001, fc_cutoff = 0.25, labels = TRUE, name1 = 'Gly-enriched', name2 = 'GABA-enriched', anno.y = 0.2) + xlab('Regression coefficient'), 'Subclass')
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/gaba-gly-anova.pdf', height = 5, width = 7)

# Experiment: proportion displaced
res.df = do.call(rbind, lapply(rownames(datExpr), function(gene){
  
  # Fit linear model with species and classification
  H0=lm(eval(parse(text = gene)) ~ species + classification, data = df)
  
  # Fit linear model with species, classification, and proportion displaced
  H1=lm(eval(parse(text = gene)) ~ species + classification + prop.displaced, data = df)
  
  # Find genes in which the prop.displaced is signficantly associated with expression level
  data.frame(gene = gene, 
             coef = summary(H1)$coefficients['prop.displaced', 1], 
             f.stat = anova(H0, H1)[2,5], 
             p.val = anova(H0, H1)[2,6])
  
}))

res.df$p.adj = p.adjust(res.df$p.val, method = 'fdr')
head(res.df %>% arrange(p.adj), 20)

res.df$avg_log2FC = res.df$coef
res.df$p_val_adj = res.df$p.adj
TitlePlot(volcanoPlot(res.df, fdr_cutoff = 0.001, fc_cutoff = 0.25, labels = TRUE, name2 = 'GCL-enriched', name1 = 'INL-enriched', anno.y = 0.12) + xlab('Regression coefficient'), 'Displacement')
ggsave('../../figures/my_figs/prop-displaced-anova.pdf', height = 5, width = 7)
```


```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
ggscatter(df, x = 'prop.displaced', y = c('RELN', 'EOMES'), facet.by = 'species', nrow = 1, cor.coef = TRUE)

pdf('figures/displacement-scatter.pdf', width = 30, height = 2.5*20)
plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(head(res.df %>% arrange(p.adj), 20)$gene, function(gene) 
  ggscatter(df, x = 'prop.displaced', y = gene, facet.by = 'species', nrow = 1, cor.coef = TRUE, add = "reg.line")), 
  ncol = 1)
dev.off()

VlnPlot(subset(ac.ortho, species %in% c('Mouse', 'Rat')), 
        features = head(res.df %>% arrange(p.adj), 20)$gene, 
        group.by = 'type_by_dis', 
        stack = TRUE, flip = TRUE) + NoLegend()
```

## Genes associated with gaba gly identity

* We get genes involved in gaba synthesis and transport GAD1/2, SLC6A1, SLC6A11
* We get key transcription factors
* Migration genes NAV2/3
* Voltage gated calcium channels CACNA2D2 in GABA and CACNA2D3 in gly
* Cell adhesion molecule IGSF11 specific to glycinergic types (may have some clade-specific expression in rodent A8/SEG)

```{r}

# BIGSEURAT$displaced = ifelse(BIGSEURAT$seurat_clusters %in% displaced.types, TRUE, FALSE)

table(BIGSEURAT$classification, BIGSEURAT$type)

classification.markers = FindMarkers(BIGSEURAT, group.by = "classification", ident.1 = "GABA", ident.2 = "Gly")
classification.markers$pct.diff = classification.markers$pct.1-classification.markers$pct.2
classification.markers.sorted = classification.markers %>% arrange(desc(abs(pct.diff)))

lapply(rownames(classification.markers.sorted)[1:20], function(gene) geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, gene, group.by = "type"))
```

## Voltage gated sodium channels (markers of polyaxonal amacrines?)

Nav1.1 SCN1A broadly expressed
Nav1.2 SCN2A broadly expressed in gabaergic ACs
Nav1.3 SCN3A broadly expressed in gabaergic ACs
Nav1.4 SCN4A not found in most species
Nav1.5 conserved but not expressed in CA1
Nav1.6
Nav1.7 SCN7A may mark polyaxonal ACs
1.8 SCN8A ubiquitously expressed
1.9 SCN9A somewhat interesting

## Big seurat

Find genes that are conserved in human and mouse (20394 orthologs, 17113 unique human genes)

```{r, eval = params$bigmatrix}
rgc_ortho = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_types_mammals_v7.rds")
rgc_ortho$species = gsub("HumanFovea|HumanPeriphery", "Human", rgc_ortho$species)
rgc_ortho$species = gsub("MacaqueFovea|MacaquePeriphery", "Macaque", rgc_ortho$species)
rgc_ortho$species = gsub("MarmosetPeriphery|MarmosetFovea", "Marmoset", rgc_ortho$species)
table(rgc_ortho$species)

merge_1_2_3_4 = readRDS("../../Orthology/martMergeRefHuman.rds")
oneToOneMartHumanMouse = merge_1_2_3_4[merge_1_2_3_4$`Mouse homology type` == "ortholog_one2one",]
oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name`[oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name` == ""] = oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene stable ID`[oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name` == ""]

# Generate the ortholog seurat object for each species
BigMatrixList = lapply(unique(rgc_ortho$species), function(species) BigOrthologMatrix2(species, unique(oneToOneMartHumanMouse$`Gene name`), rgc_ortho))
names(BigMatrixList) = unique(rgc_ortho$species)
```

Make big matrix

```{r, eval = params$bigmatrix}
library(Matrix)
BigMatrix = Matrix(do.call(cbind, BigMatrixList), sparse = TRUE) 

# Order cells
cell.order = Cells(rgc_ortho)[Cells(rgc_ortho) %in% colnames(BigMatrix)]
rgc_ortho = subset(rgc_ortho, cells = cell.order)
BigMatrix = BigMatrix[,match(Cells(rgc_ortho), colnames(BigMatrix))]
# saveRDS(BigMatrix, "../../../storage/rgcBigMatrix.rds")

# Missing some macaque cells (probably in macaque periphery object somewhere)
# cells.macaque = Cells(subset(rgc_ortho, species == "Macaque"))
# missing.macaque = cells.macaque[!cells.macaque %in% Cells(macaque)]

BIGSEURAT = CreateSeuratObject(counts = BigMatrix[rownames(BigMatrix) != "",])
BIGSEURAT@meta.data = rgc_ortho@meta.data
# BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@data = BigMatrix[rownames(BigMatrix) != "",]
BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@data[is.na(BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@data)] <- 0
BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@counts[is.na(BIGSEURAT@assays$RNA@counts)] <- 0
# BIGSEURAT = RenameCells(BIGSEURAT, new.names = paste0(BIGSEURAT$species, "_", Cells(BIGSEURAT)))
stopifnot(all(Cells(BIGSEURAT) %in% Cells(rgc_ortho)))
Idents(BIGSEURAT) = "NOG"
BIGSEURAT$species = factor(BIGSEURAT$species, levels = c("Human", "Macaque", "Marmoset", "TreeShrew", "Mouse", "Rhabdomys", "Peromyscus", "Squirrel", "Sheep", "Pig", "Ferret", "Opossum"))
saveRDS(BIGSEURAT, "../../../storage/vertebrateRGC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
```

### Specificity score

```{r}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_expression_log1p_scaled.rds")

# Normalize
rescaled.matrix.list = mclapply(matrix.list, function(matrix) matrix/((ncol(matrix)-1)/sqrt(ncol(matrix))), mc.cores = 16)

n_orthotypes = nClusters(BIGSEURAT)
n_species = length(unique(BIGSEURAT$species))

score.lists = mclapply(seq_len(n_orthotypes), function(cluster){
  
    # Make filter for OT
    filter = matrix(0, n_species, n_orthotypes)
    filter[,cluster] = 1
    
    # Test filter for each gene
    score.list = sapply(rescaled.matrix.list, function(rescaled.matrix){
      rescaled.matrix[is.na(rescaled.matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
      norm(as.matrix(rescaled.matrix - filter, type = "F"))
    })
    
    return(score.list)
}, mc.cores = 16)

# gene by OT matrix
scores.matrix = do.call(cbind, score.lists)
saveRDS(scores.matrix, "../../Ortho_Objects/RGC.scores.matrix.rds")
```


```{r}
# Get min error
conservation.summary = data.frame(gene = rownames(scores.matrix), 
                                  best.score = apply(scores.matrix, 1, function(x) x[which.min(x)]), 
                                  OrthoType = apply(scores.matrix, 1, function(x) which.min(x)))

# saveRDS(conservation.summary, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")

PrettyHistogram(conservation.summary$best.score, xlab = "Specificity score")

subset(conservation.summary, OrthoType == '7') %>% arrange(best.score)
```

Top five conserved markers for each RGC

```{r}
rgc.top5 = conservation.summary %>% 
  group_by(OrthoType) %>% 
  arrange(best.score) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  ungroup()

rgc.top5.genes = lapply(rgc.top5 %>% split(rgc.top5$OrthoType), pull, 'gene')

# Dotplot for each
pdf('specificity_analysis/rgc_markers.pdf', height = 15, width = 8)
lapply(rgc.top5.genes, function(genes) MultigeneDotPlot(BIGSEURAT, genes, group.by = 'NOG'))
dev.off()

MultigeneDotPlot(BIGSEURAT, rgc.top5.genes[[1]], group.by = 'NOG')
```

```{r}
# Dotplot for each
pdf('specificity_analysis/bc-conserved.pdf', height = 3.5, width = 9)
lapply(subset(bc.conservation.summary, cor.score > 0.3)$gene[1:10], function(gene) geneDotPlotFast(BIGSEURAT, gene, group.by = 'NOG'))
dev.off()
```

### Specificity score

```{r}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/BC_OT_expression_log1p_scaled.rds")

# Normalize
rescaled.matrix.list = mclapply(matrix.list, function(matrix) matrix/((ncol(matrix)-1)/sqrt(ncol(matrix))), mc.cores = 16)

n_orthotypes = nClusters(BIGSEURAT)
n_species = length(unique(BIGSEURAT$species))

score.lists = mclapply(seq_len(n_orthotypes), function(cluster){
  
    # Make filter for OT
    filter = matrix(0, n_species, n_orthotypes)
    filter[,cluster] = 1
    
    # Test filter for each gene
    score.list = sapply(rescaled.matrix.list, function(rescaled.matrix){
      rescaled.matrix[is.na(rescaled.matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
      norm(as.matrix(rescaled.matrix - filter, type = "F"))
    })
    
    return(score.list)
}, mc.cores = 16)

# gene by OT matrix
scores.matrix = do.call(cbind, score.lists)
saveRDS(scores.matrix, "../../Ortho_Objects/BC.scores.matrix.rds")
```


```{r}
# Get min error
conservation.summary = data.frame(gene = rownames(scores.matrix), 
                                  best.score = apply(scores.matrix, 1, function(x) x[which.min(x)]), 
                                  OrthoType = apply(scores.matrix, 1, function(x) which.min(x)))

# saveRDS(conservation.summary, "../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")

PrettyHistogram(conservation.summary$best.score, xlab = "Specificity score")

subset(conservation.summary, OrthoType == '7') %>% arrange(best.score)
```

Top five conserved markers for each RGC

```{r}
bc.top5 = conservation.summary %>% 
  group_by(OrthoType) %>% 
  arrange(best.score) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  ungroup()

bc.top5.genes = lapply(bc.top5 %>% split(bc.top5$OrthoType), pull, 'gene')
names(bc.top5.genes) = Metadata(BIGSEURAT, 'seurat_clusters', 'NOG')$NOG

bc.top5.genes = bc.top5.genes[levels(BIGSEURAT$NOG)]

# Dotplot for each
pdf('specificity_analysis/bc_markers.pdf', height = 15, width = 8)
lapply(bc.top5.genes, function(genes) MultigeneDotPlot(BIGSEURAT, genes, group.by = 'NOG'))
dev.off()
```

## TF analysis of RGCs

### Conservation scoring

```{r}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../../storage/vertebrateRGC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
vertebrateRGC.list = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, split.by = "species")

# Scale within each species
features.use = rownames(BIGSEURAT)
scaled.list = lapply(vertebrateRGC.list, function(object){
  
  # Average expression in each OT
  # average.data = AverageExpression(object, group.by = "seurat_clusters", assay = "RNA", features = features.use)$RNA
  
  # Average expression and then log transform
  average.data = AvgExpr(object, group.by = "seurat_clusters", assay = "RNA", features = features.use)
  
  # Scale each gene across OTs
  scaled.data = t(scale(t(average.data)))
  
  # Set NAs (features with no variance to 0)
  scaled.data[is.na(scaled.data)] = 0
  
  return(scaled.data)
})

# Reshape to be n_gene matrices of size n_species x n_OT
matrix.list = mclapply(features.use, function(feature) {
  do.call(gtools::smartbind, lapply(scaled.list, function(x) data.frame(as.list(x[feature,]))))
}, mc.cores = 16)
names(matrix.list) = features.use

saveRDS(matrix.list, "../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_expression_log1p_scaled.rds")
```

Percentage expressed

```{r}
# BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../../storage/vertebrateRGC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
# vertebrateRGC.list = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, split.by = "species")

# Within each species
features.use = rownames(BIGSEURAT)
percent.list = lapply(vertebrateRGC.list, function(object){
  
  # Percentage expressed
  pct.data = PercentageExpressed(object, group.by = "seurat_clusters", features = features.use)
  
  return(pct.data)
})

# Reshape to be n_gene matrices of size n_species x n_OT
pct.list = mclapply(features.use, function(feature) {
  do.call(gtools::smartbind, lapply(percent.list, function(x) data.frame(as.list(x[feature,]))))/100 # divide by 100
}, mc.cores = 16)
names(pct.list) = features.use

saveRDS(pct.list, "../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_percent_expressed.rds")
```

```{r}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_expression_log1p_scaled.rds")
pct.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_percent_expressed.rds")

# Normalize to max z-score possible, then min max normalize
rescaled.matrix.list = mclapply(matrix.list, function(matrix) (matrix/((ncol(matrix)-1)/sqrt(ncol(matrix)))+1)/2, mc.cores = 16)
saveRDS(rescaled.matrix.list, "../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_rescaled_expr.rds")

# Element-wise multiplication of scaled and percent matrix
score.list = mclapply(seq_along(matrix.list), function(i) rescaled.matrix.list[[i]] * pct.list[[i]], mc.cores = 16)
names(score.list) = names(matrix.list)
saveRDS(score.list, "../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_expr_score.rds")
```


```{r}
rgc.conservation.summary = data.frame(
  gene = rownames(BIGSEURAT),
  is.tf = toupper(rownames(BIGSEURAT)) %in% tf_genes,
  cor.score = sapply(matrix.list, function(matrix){
    matrix[is.na(matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
    
    # Check that most species have non zero variance
    vars = apply(matrix, 1, var)
    if(length(which(vars == 0)) > nSpecies(BIGSEURAT)/2){
      cor.score = NA
    } else {
      cor = cor(t(matrix)) 
      
      # Remove NAs from zero variance rows
      cor.score = mean(na.omit(cor[upper.tri(cor)]))
    }
    return(cor.score)
  })
)

rgc.conservation.summary$cor.score.rand = sapply(matrix.list, function(matrix){
  matrix[is.na(matrix)] = 0 # Make zero to avoid NAs
  
  # Shuffle rows
  matrix = ShuffleRows(matrix)
  
  # Check that most species have non zero variance
  vars = apply(matrix, 1, var)
  if(length(which(vars == 0)) > nSpecies(BIGSEURAT)/2){
    cor.score = NA
  } else {
    cor = cor(t(matrix)) 
    
    # Remove NAs from zero variance rows
    cor.score = mean(na.omit(cor[upper.tri(cor)]))
  }
  
  return(cor.score)
})

PrettyHistogram(rgc.conservation.summary$cor.score, vline = c(max(rgc.conservation.summary$cor.score.rand, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                                             min(rgc.conservation.summary$cor.score.rand, na.rm = TRUE)))
PrettyHistogram(rgc.conservation.summary$cor.score.rand, vline = c(max(rgc.conservation.summary$cor.score, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                                                  min(rgc.conservation.summary$cor.score, na.rm = TRUE)))

# TFs have significantly higher cor.scores
ggboxplot(rgc.conservation.summary, y = "cor.score", x = "is.tf")+
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("FALSE", "TRUE")),
    map_signif_level = TRUE
  )

saveRDS(rgc.conservation.summary %>% arrange(desc(cor.score)), "../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.conservation.summary.rds")
```

Tests

```{r, eval = FALSE}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_expression_log1p_scaled.rds")
rescaled.matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_rescaled_expr.rds")

# Tests

# BinarizeExpression(score.list$EOMES, plot = TRUE)
```


```{r, eval = FALSE}
# Add gaussian noise to prevent lower variance from going to zero
full_masks = lapply(score.list[conserved.tfs$gene], BinarizeExpression, return.vector = FALSE)
names(full_masks) = conserved.tfs$gene

# If failed, use just scaled expression
failures = names(which(sapply(full_masks, function(x) is.null(dim(x)))))
print(failures)
full_masks[failures] = lapply(matrix.list[failures], BinarizeExpression, return.vector = FALSE)

masks = lapply(full_masks, function(full_mask) {
  new = apply(full_mask, 2, mean) # BinarizeExpression(x, return.vector = TRUE)
  new[new > 0.6] = 1
  new[new <= 0.6] = 0
  return(new)
})
names(masks) = names(full_masks)

# Remove failures and TFs with no variance
which(is.na(masks))
variance = sapply(masks, var)
which(variance == 0)
filtered.masks = masks[!is.na(masks)] # & variance != 0]
tf.expr.mask = do.call(rbind, filtered.masks)
colnames(tf.expr.mask) = Metadata(BIGSEURAT, "seurat_clusters", "NOG")$NOG #colnames(matrix.list[[1]])
# dir.create("../RGC/tf_analysis")
saveRDS(tf.expr.mask, "../RGC/tf_analysis/rgc.tf.expr.mask.newscore.rds")

# Check some known markers
full_masks$EOMES
masks$EOMES
score.list$EOMES
# masks$RUNX1
# masks$TFAP2D
# masks$TBX20
# masks$ONECUT3
```

Or with independent mixture modeling

```{r, eval = FALSE}
matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_expression_log1p_scaled.rds")
rescaled.matrix.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_rescaled_expr.rds")
pct.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_percent_expressed.rds")
score.list = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/RGC_OT_expr_score.rds")

expr_masks = lapply(matrix.list[conserved.tfs$gene], BinarizeExpression, return.vector = FALSE)
names(expr_masks) = conserved.tfs$gene

pct_masks = lapply(pct.list[conserved.tfs$gene], BinarizeExpression, return.vector = FALSE)
names(pct_masks) = conserved.tfs$gene

# Element wise multiplication (AND gate) to be less permissive 
full_masks = lapply(seq_along(expr_masks), function(i){
  if(!is.null(dim(pct_masks[[i]]))){
    expr_masks[[i]] * pct_masks[[i]]
  } else {
    expr_masks[[i]]
  }
})
names(full_masks) = conserved.tfs$gene
# full_masks = pct_masks[sapply(pct_masks, function(x) !is.null(dim(x)))]

masks = lapply(full_masks, function(full_mask) {
  new = apply(full_mask, 2, mean) # BinarizeExpression(x, return.vector = TRUE)
  new[new > 0.5] = 1
  new[new <= 0.5] = 0
  return(new)
})
names(masks) = names(full_masks)

# Remove failures and TFs with no variance
variance = sapply(masks, var)
which(variance == 0)
filtered.masks = masks[!is.na(masks)] # & variance != 0]
tf.expr.mask = do.call(rbind, filtered.masks)
colnames(tf.expr.mask) = Metadata(BIGSEURAT, "seurat_clusters", "NOG")$NOG #colnames(matrix.list[[1]])
# dir.create("../RGC/tf_analysis")
saveRDS(tf.expr.mask, "../RGC/tf_analysis/rgc.tf.expr.mask.andgate.rds")

# Check some known markers
# masks$EOMES
# masks$RUNX1
# masks$TFAP2D
# masks$TBX20
```

```{r, eval = FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
                  PlotBinaryMask(full_masks[[gene]], masks[[gene]]),
```

### Maximum parsimony tree construction

metrics: 
* Robustness score (bootstrap with same method/same parameters)
* Sensitivity to loss of any one TF (loo trees)
* Cross-consistency (other methods, other parameters)

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=15}
sweep = seq(20, nrow(tf.expr.mask), by = 5)
nTF.trees = mclapply(sweep, function(nTF) ConstructTrees(t(tf.expr.mask)[,1:nTF]), mc.cores = 3)
nTF.summary = do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(sweep), function(x){
  rbind(data.frame(method = "UPGMA", bootstrap = nTF.trees[[x]]$UPGMA$node.label, nTF = sweep[x], parsimony = parsimony(nTF.trees[[x]]$UPGMA, nTF.trees[[x]]$phydat)), 
        data.frame(method = "NJ", bootstrap = nTF.trees[[x]]$NJ$node.label, nTF = sweep[x], parsimony = parsimony(nTF.trees[[x]]$NJ, nTF.trees[[x]]$phydat)), 
        data.frame(method = "MP", bootstrap = nTF.trees[[x]]$MP$node.label, nTF = sweep[x], parsimony = parsimony(nTF.trees[[x]]$MP, nTF.trees[[x]]$phydat)))
  }))

# Boxplot
ggplot(nTF.summary, aes(x = as.factor(nTF), y = bootstrap, fill = method))+
    geom_boxplot(linetype = "dashed", outlier.shape = NA) +
    stat_boxplot(aes(ymin = ..lower.., ymax = ..upper..), outlier.shape = NA) +
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymin = ..ymax..), width = 0.5) +
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymax = ..ymin..), width = 0.5) +
    facet_wrap(~method)+
    theme_cowplot()+
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.title.x = element_blank())
```

45 TFs seems to be a good balance

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=5}
# trees.45 = ConstructTrees(t(tf.expr.mask)[,1:45], root = 24) # This one

sweep = seq(25, 61, by = 2)
tf.trees = lapply(sweep, function(nTF){
  this.tree = ConstructTrees(t(tf.expr.mask)[,1:nTF], bootstrap = FALSE)
  leaveOneOutSupport(t(tf.expr.mask)[,1:nTF], this.tree$MP)
})

nTF.summary = do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(sweep), function(x){
  data.frame(nTF = sweep[x], support = tf.trees[[x]]$loo.support)
}))

# Boxplot
ggplot(nTF.summary, aes(x = as.factor(nTF), y = support, fill = nTF))+
  geom_boxplot(linetype = "dashed", outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_boxplot(aes(ymin = ..lower.., ymax = ..upper..), outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymin = ..ymax..), width = 0.5) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymax = ..ymin..), width = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = myPalette(10))+
  theme_cowplot()+
  xlab("top N TFs")+
  ylab("leave-one-out support")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

Construct final tree

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
library(phangorn)
library(TreeTools)

tree.use = ConstructTrees(t(tf.expr.mask)[,1:45])
# treeUnrooted = ConstructTrees(t(tf.expr.mask)[,1:45], bootstrap = TRUE)$MP

parsimony(tree.use$UPGMA, tree.use$phydat)
parsimony(tree.use$NJ, tree.use$phydat)
parsimony(tree.use$MP, tree.use$phydat)
saveRDS(tree.use, "../RGC/tf_analysis/rgc_trees_andgate.rds")
```

### Reconstruction of developmental expression

```{r, fig.height=6.5, fig.width=6.5}
anc.acctran <- ancestral.pars(treeRooted, phydat, "ACCTRAN")
anc.mpr <- ancestral.pars(treeRooted, phydat, "MPR")

pdf("../RGC/tf_analysis/reconstruction_acctran_andgate.pdf", height = 6.5, width = 6.5)
for(gene in tf.order[1:45]){
  plotAnc(treeRooted, anc.acctran, which(tf.order == gene), type = "unrooted", cex.pie = 0.3, col = c("white", "black"), cex = 0.6, show.node.label = FALSE)
  title(gene)
}
dev.off()

pdf("../RGC/tf_analysis/reconstruction_mpr_andgate.pdf", height = 6.5, width = 6.5)
for(gene in tf.order[1:45]){
  plotAnc(treeRooted, anc.mpr, which(tf.order == gene), type = "unrooted", cex.pie = 0.3, col = c("white", "black"), cex = 0.6, show.node.label = FALSE)
  title(gene)
}
dev.off()
```

Find TF switches

```{r, fig.height=30, fig.width=20}
gained = apply(treeRooted$edge, 1, function(row){
  gained = tf.order[which(ceiling(anc.mpr[[row[2]]][,2]) - ceiling(anc.mpr[[row[1]]][,2]) > 0)] #& anc.acctran[[row[1]]][,2] == 0)] # an increase from 0 (not expressed)
  if(length(gained) > 0){
    gained = paste0(gained, "+")
    paste0(gained, collapse = "\n")
  } else {
    NA
  }
})

lost = apply(treeRooted$edge, 1, function(row){
  lost = tf.order[which(ceiling(anc.mpr[[row[2]]][,2]) - ceiling(anc.mpr[[row[1]]][,2]) < 0)] #& anc.acctran[[row[1]]][,2] == 1)] # a decrease from 1 (expressed)
  if(length(lost) > 0){
    lost = paste0(lost, "-")
    paste0(lost, collapse = "\n")
  } else {
    NA
  }
})

# Plot gained TFs
pdf("../RGC/tf_analysis/labeled_tree_gained_lost_andgate.pdf", height=30, width=20)
plot(treeRooted, show.node.label = TRUE, type = "unrooted")
edgelabels(gained, srt = 0, bg = "green")

# Plot lost TFs
plot(treeRooted, show.node.label = TRUE, type = "unrooted")
edgelabels(lost, srt = 0, bg = "red")
dev.off()

# Plot all TF switches
switches = gsub('^\n|\n$', '', gsub("NA", "", paste0(gained, "\n", lost)))
switches[switches == "\n"] = NA

pdf("../RGC/tf_analysis/labeled_tree_andgate.pdf", height = 30, width = 20)
plot(treeRooted, show.node.label = FALSE, type = "unrooted")
edgelabels(switches, srt = 0, bg = "white")
add.scale.bar()
dev.off()
```

### Mapping to mouse for comparison to Shekhar eLife

```{r}
# BIGSEURAT = readRDS("../../../storage/vertebrateRGC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
# JSHeatmap(JSMatrix(table(BIGSEURAT$NOG, BIGSEURAT$species_type)))
JSHeatmap(JSMatrix(table(BIGSEURAT$NOG, BIGSEURAT$species_type)),
          stagger.threshold = 0.03, split = FALSE, row.order = levels(BIGSEURAT$NOG))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

plot_grid(NULL, 
          JSHeatmap(JSMatrix(table(BIGSEURAT$NOG[BIGSEURAT$species == "Mouse"], 
                         BIGSEURAT$species_type[BIGSEURAT$species == "Mouse"]))), 
          rel_widths = c(0.5,10))

nog.mouse.overlap = OverlapStatistics(table(BIGSEURAT$NOG[BIGSEURAT$species == "Mouse"], 
                                            BIGSEURAT$species_type[BIGSEURAT$species == "Mouse"]))

# Non-redundant mapping of 45 RGC types
nog.mouse.cor = subset(nog.mouse.overlap, log.p > 6)
nog.mouse.cor$mouse.name = str_split_fixed(nog.mouse.cor$ident2, "_", 3)[,2]

# Tau specification times from Shekhar eLife
library(readxl)
rgc_tau = read_xlsx("../RGC/RGC_types_tau.xlsx")
nog.mouse.cor$tau = rgc_tau$tau[match(gsub("C", "", nog.mouse.cor$mouse.name), rgc_tau$`RGC type`)]

# Families
family_data = data.frame(family = unlist(mapply(rep, c('eomes', 'neurod2', 'irx3', 'foxp2', 'mafb', 'tbr1', 'tfap2d', 'bnc2', 'none'), c(7, 8, 5, 5, 4, 5, 4, 2, 5))),
  mouse.label = c(
                         40, 33, 22, 31, 7, 43, 8, 
                         26, 29, 20, 39, 19, 25, 35, 12, 
                         44, 37, 41, 27, 18, 
                         3, 4, 28, 32, 38, 
                         30, 23, 34, 45, 
                         21, 9, 5, 42, 17, 
                         16, 36, 13, 14, 
                         24, 10, 
                         11, 15, 1, 2, 6))
nog.mouse.cor$family = family_data$family[match(gsub("C", "", nog.mouse.cor$mouse.name), family_data$mouse.label)]
```

### Visualization

```{r, fig.height=14, fig.width=21}
library(ggtree)
library(treeio)

# Seed for tree layout
set.seed(1)
tree = as.treedata(treeUnrooted)

# Add metadata
metadata = as.tibble(do.call(rbind, lapply(as.character(seq_len(21)), function(x) data.frame(x, paste0(nog.mouse.cor$mouse.name[nog.mouse.cor$ident1 == x], collapse = ","))))
                     %>% setNames(c("label", "mouse.label")))
tau_data = as.tibble(do.call(rbind, lapply(as.character(seq_len(21)), function(x) data.frame(x, paste0(signif(nog.mouse.cor$tau[nog.mouse.cor$ident1 == x], 2), collapse = ","))))
                     %>% setNames(c("label", "tau")))
med_tau = as.tibble(do.call(rbind, lapply(as.character(seq_len(21)), function(x) data.frame(x, median(nog.mouse.cor$tau[nog.mouse.cor$ident1 == x]))))
                     %>% setNames(c("label", "med_tau")))
family_dat = as.tibble(do.call(rbind, lapply(as.character(seq_len(21)), function(x) data.frame(x, Mode(nog.mouse.cor$family[nog.mouse.cor$ident1 == x]))))
                     %>% setNames(c("label", "family")))
expression = as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, lapply(ancestral.pars(treeUnrooted, phydat, "MPR"), function(x) as.character(x[,2]))) %>% magrittr::set_colnames(tf.order[1:45]))
expression$label = rownames(expression)
bootstrap = data.frame(label = as.character(treeUnrooted$node.label), 
                      bootstrap = treeUnrooted$bs.support)
bootstrap$bootstrap[bootstrap$label == treeUnrooted$node.label[1] ] = NA
anno_tree = list(as.tibble(tree), as.tibble(expression), metadata, tau_data, med_tau, family_dat, bootstrap) %>% purrr::reduce(full_join, by = "label") 

# Names
anno_tree$name = anno_tree$label
anno_tree$name[(ncol(tf.expr.mask)+1):length(anno_tree$name)] = ""
saveRDS(anno_tree, "../RGC/tf_analysis/rgc_anno_tree.rds")

# Bootstrap support values
plt.bs = ggtree(as.treedata(anno_tree), layout = "equal_angle") + 
  geom_nodepoint(aes(color=bootstrap), size = 4)+
  # geom_label(aes(label = bootstrap))+
  scale_color_gradient2(low = "black", high ="red", mid = "yellow", na.value = "black")+
  geom_tiplab(geom = "text", hjust = -0.5)
  # geom_text_repel(aes(label=name), max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE, seed = 42)
  # geom_treescale(x = 1, y = 1)

# Node label
plt.node = ggtree(as.treedata(anno_tree), layout = "equal_angle") + 
  geom_label_repel(aes(label=name), max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE, seed = 42, point.size = NA)

# Families
plt.family = ggtree(as.treedata(anno_tree), layout = "equal_angle") + 
  geom_label_repel(aes(label=mouse.label, fill = family), max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = TRUE, seed = 42, point.size = NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('eomes' = 'lightgreen', 'neurod2' = 'grey', 'irx3' = 'yellow', 'foxp2' = 'orange', 'mafb' = 'burlywood', 'tbr1' = 'orchid', 'tfap2d' = 'pink', 'bnc2' = 'skyblue', 'none' = 'white'))

# Mouse labels
plt.mouse = ggtree(as.treedata(anno_tree), layout = "equal_angle") + 
  geom_label_repel(aes(label=mouse.label), max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE, seed = 42, point.size = NA)

# Mouse specification times
plt.tau = ggtree(as.treedata(anno_tree), layout = "equal_angle") + 
  geom_label_repel(aes(label=tau), max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE, seed = 42, point.size = NA)

plt.med_tau = ggtree(as.treedata(anno_tree), layout = "equal_angle") + 
  # geom_nodepoint(aes(color=bootstrap), size = 4)+
  geom_label_repel(aes(label=med_tau, fill = med_tau), max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE, seed = 42, point.size = NA)+
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "black", high ="red", mid = "yellow", na.value = "black")

plot_grid(plt.mouse, plt.tau, plt.med_tau, plt.bs, plt.node, plt.family)
```

```{r}
pdf("../RGC/tf_analysis/prettyReconstruction_andgate.pdf", height = 8, width = 8)
for(gene in tf.order[1:45]){
  print(TitlePlot(PrettyTree(anno_tree, gene), gene))
}
dev.off()
```

## RGC samap

```{r}
speciesList = c('Human', 'Squirrel', 'Opossum', 'Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish')
paths = c('/clusterfs/kslab/Evolution/storage/HahnObjects/RGCs/HumanPeriphery_RGC_ann_v2.rds', 
          '/clusterfs/kslab/Evolution/storage/HahnObjects/RGCs/Squirrel_RGC_v2.rds', 
          '/clusterfs/kslab/Evolution/storage/HahnObjects/RGCs/OpossumRGC_int_v4.rds', 
          '/clusterfs/kslab/Evolution/storage/HahnObjects/RGCs/ChickenRGC_v1.rds', 
          '/clusterfs/kslab/Evolution/storage/HahnObjects/RGCs/LizardRGC_int_v2.rds', 
          '/clusterfs/kslab/Evolution/storage/HahnObjects/RGCs/ZebrafishRGC_v1.rds')
          
objectList = lapply(paths, readRDS)
names(objectList) = speciesList

# need to check zebrafish gene symbols and transfer lizard labels to ncbi version
objectList$Zebrafish = RenameFeatures(objectList$Zebrafish, new.names = tolower(rownames(objectList$Zebrafish)))

# Add species ident
objectList = lapply(names(objectList), function(species) {
  objectList[[species]]$species = species
  return(objectList[[species]])
})
names(objectList) = speciesList

# Add annotated slot
lapply(objectList, function(object) 'annotated' %in% colnames(object@meta.data))
objectList$Human$annotated = objectList$Human$type
# objectList$Squirrel$annotated
objectList$Opossum$annotated = objectList$Opossum$type
# objectList$Chicken$annotated
objectList$Lizard$annotated = objectList$Lizard$type
# length(objectList$Zebrafish$annotated)

lapply(objectList, function(object) 'annotated' %in% colnames(object@meta.data))

table(objectList$Human$annotated)

rownames(objectList$Lizard)

lizard_full = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/Lizard_ncbi_initial.rds')
lizard_full = MapBack(lizard_full, objectList$Lizard, group.by = 'annotated', convert.barcodes = TRUE)
table(lizard_full$mapped.back)

# lizard_full = ClusterSeurat(lizard_full)
DimPlot(lizard_full, group.by = c('mapped.back', 'cell_class'), label = TRUE) + NoLegend()

lizard_full$annotated = lizard_full$mapped.back
objectList$Lizard = lizard_full[,!is.na(lizard_full$mapped.back)]
```

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=8}
samap = fread('samap/zechliopsqhs_rgc_seed_0_leiden_3.1.csv')
species = c('hs', 'sq', 'op', 'ch', 'li', 'ze')
samaps = lapply(species, function(this.species) subset(samap, species == this.species))
names(samaps) = species
plot.list = lapply(species, function(this.species) JSHeatmap2(samaps[[this.species]]$leiden_clusters,
                                                                                         samaps[[this.species]]$annotated,
                                                                                         title = paste0(this.species, '\nARI=', signif(adj.rand.index(samaps[[this.species]]$leiden_clusters, samaps[[this.species]]$annotated), 2)),
                                                                                          border.col = NA, stagger.threshold = 0.15,
                                                                                         row.order = sort(unique(samap$leiden_clusters))) +
                              theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                                              axis.title = element_blank(),
                                              axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                                              plot.margin=grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
                                              axis.ticks = element_blank()))
plot.list
ggarrange(plotlist = plot.list, 
          common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right', nrow = 1, ncol = 6, align = 'h', widths = sapply(samaps, function(x) length(unique(x$annotated)))) + 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))
```

# Non-mammal integration

```{r}
nonmammals = data.frame(species = c("Chicken", "Lizard", "Zebrafish"), 
                        path = c("Chicken_reclustered", "Lizard_ncbi", "Zebrafish"))

# Read in objects
nmList = lapply(nonmammals$path, function(path) readRDS(paste0('../../Species_Objects/', path, 'AC_v5.rds')))
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Add species ident
nmList = lapply(names(nmList), function(species) {
  nmList[[species]]$species = species
  return(nmList[[species]])
})
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Add annotated slot
nmList = lapply(nmList, function(object) {
  object$annotated = object$type
  return(object)
})

# Set gene names back to the original names
nmList = lapply(nmList, function(object) {
  if("orig.features" %in% object@misc) {
    RenameFeatures(object, new.names = object@misc$orig.features)
  } else {
    object
  }
  return(object)
})

# Zebrafish genes must be upper case
# nmList$Zebrafish = UpperCase_genes(nmList$Zebrafish)
# colnames(ze2ch) = make.unique(toupper(colnames(ze2ch)))

ze_pr = readRDS("../../Species_Objects/Cone_Objects/Lyu_Zebrafish_PR_adult.rds")
# ze_pr2 = readRDS("../../Species_Objects/Cone_Objects/Lyu_Zebrafish_PR_adult2.rds")

# intersect(rownames(ze_pr), colnames(ze2ch)) %>% length
# intersect(rownames(ze_pr2), colnames(ze2ch)) %>% length

# Zebrafish genes must match blast orthology file
nmList$Zebrafish = RenameFeatures(nmList$Zebrafish, new.names = rownames(ze_pr))
```

## Seurat integration

```{r}
ze2ch = readRDS("../cones/orthology_graphs/ze2ch.rds")
li2ch = readRDS("../cones/orthology_graphs/li2ch.rds")

# Use the same cells from SAMap integration for comparison
nmList$Chicken = nmList$Chicken[,Cells(nmList$Chicken) %in% sub("-[^-]+$", "", samap$cell)]
nmList$Lizard = nmList$Lizard[,Cells(nmList$Lizard) %in% sub("-[^-]+$", "", samap$cell)]
nmList$Zebrafish = nmList$Zebrafish[,Cells(nmList$Zebrafish) %in% sub("-[^-]+$", "", samap$cell)]

# Seurat integration
ortho = OrthotypeAnalysis2(nmList$Chicken, 
                           nmList[c("Zebrafish", "Lizard")], 
                           list(ze2ch, li2ch), 
                           downsample = 100, 
                           cluster_resolution = 0.5, 
                           reduction = "cca",
                           k.anchor = 5)

saveRDS(ortho, "../../../storage/samap/AC_objects/seurat_ortho.rds")
```


```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=15}

# A2
FeaturePlot(ortho, features = c("PROX1", "DAB1", "NFIA"))

# VG3
FeaturePlot(ortho, features = c("SLC17A8", "SDK2", "NXPH1"), order = TRUE)
```

# Seurat integration v2

```{r}
gnnm = LoadSAMapGraph('samap/graphs/pm_kf_sh_ca_ze_am_ch_li_op_mf_v1.gnnm.mtx',
                      'samap/graphs/pm_kf_sh_ca_ze_am_ch_li_op_mf_v1.gns.csv')
saveRDS(gnnm, 'samap/graphs/pm_kf_sh_ca_ze_am_ch_li_op_mf_v1.gnnm.rds')
```

```{r}
# Read in the blast graph from samap
gnnm = readRDS('samap/graphs/pm_kf_sh_ca_ze_am_ch_li_op_mf_v1.gnnm.rds')

# Load objects
objectList = list()
objectList$Chicken = OnOffBcClassification(MatchACs(readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Chicken_full_v3.rds')))
objectList$Lizard = OnOffBcClassification(MatchACs(readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Lizard_full_v7.rds')), cutoff = 10)
objectList$Zebrafish = OnOffBcClassification(readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Zebrafish_full_v3.rds'), 'isl1', cutoff = 5)

# Assign species names
objectList = dapply(names(objectList), function(name) {
 objectList[[name]]$species = name
 objectList[[name]]
})

# Get only 1:1 orthologs
li2ch = GetReciprocalBestHits(gnnm, 'ch', 'li')
# ze2li = GetReciprocalBestHits(gnnm, 'li', 'ze')
ze2ch = GetReciprocalBestHits(gnnm, 'ch', 'ze')

# Run orthotype analysis
ortho.annotated = OrthotypeAnalysis2(objectList$Chicken, 
                                     objectList[c('Lizard', 'Zebrafish')],
                                     list(li2ch, ze2ch),
                                     group.by = 'annotated',
                                     downsample = 50)
                                     # use = 'seurat',
                                     # lambda = 1e-4)

PrettyUmap2(ortho.annotated, group.by = "species", shuffle = TRUE, label = FALSE, show.legend = TRUE) | 
  PrettyUmap2(ortho.annotated, group.by = "cell_class2", label = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE, cols = cell_class3_colors)
```

Harmony doesn't work great in these species, even at low lambdas

```{r}
bcList = lapply(objectList, function(x) subset(x, cell_class == "BC"))
ortho.bc = OrthotypeAnalysis2(bcList$Chicken, 
                                     bcList[c('Lizard', 'Zebrafish')],
                                     list(li2ch, ze2ch),
                                     group.by = 'annotated',
                                     downsample = 100,
                                      use = 'seurat') 
                                      # lambda = 1e-4)

PrettyUmap2(ortho.bc, group.by = "species", shuffle = TRUE, label = FALSE, show.legend = TRUE) | 
  PrettyUmap2(ortho.bc, group.by = "cell_class2", label = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE, cols = cell_class3_colors)

ortho.bc$species_annotated = paste0(ortho.bc$species, '-', ortho.bc$annotated)
SplitJaccardMatrix(ortho.bc, ident.1 = 'seurat_clusters', ident.2 = 'species_annotated', row.order = 0:max(as.numeric(ortho.bc$seurat_clusters)))
```


```{r}
hcList = lapply(objectList, function(x) subset(x, cell_class == "HC"))
ortho.hc = OrthotypeAnalysis2(hcList$Chicken, 
                               hcList[c("Lizard")], 
                               list(li2ch),
                               group.by = 'annotated',
                              cluster_resolution = 0.1,
                               downsample = 100)

PrettyUmap2(ortho.hc, group.by = "species", shuffle = TRUE, label = FALSE, show.legend = TRUE) | 
  PrettyUmap2(ortho.hc, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE)

ortho.hc$species_annotated = paste0(ortho.hc$species, '-', ortho.hc$annotated)
SplitJaccardMatrix(ortho.hc, ident.1 = 'seurat_clusters', ident.2 = 'species_annotated', row.order = 0:5)
```

# SAMap integration

```{r}
nonmammals = data.frame(species = c("Lamprey", "Zebrafish", "Chicken", "Lizard"),# "Opossum", "Squirrel", "Human"), 
                        path = c("Lamprey_kPetMar1_initial.rds", "ZebrafishAC_v6.rds", "ChickenAC_v6.rds", "LizardAC_v6.rds"))#, "OpossumAC_v5.rds", "SquirrelAC_v5.rds", "HumanAC_v5.rds"))

# Read in objects
nmList = lapply(nonmammals$path, function(path) readRDS(paste0('../../Species_Objects/', path)))
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Make lamprey AC clusters glycinergic
nmList$Lamprey$annotated = paste0('gly', nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters)

# Make lamprey SACs as AC-0
nmList$Lamprey$annotated[nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters == 'SAC'] = 'gabaAC-0_SAC'
nmList$Lamprey$cell_class = nmList$Lamprey$peng_annotation
nmList$Lamprey$cell_class[nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters == 'SAC'] = 'AC'
# nmList$Lamprey$annotated = factor(nmList$Lamprey$annotated)

# Remove other lamprey cell classes
nmList$Lamprey = subset(nmList$Lamprey, cell_class %in% c('AC', 'RGC'))
# nmList$Lamprey$type = nmList$Lamprey$annotated

# Add species ident
nmList = lapply(names(nmList), function(species) {
  nmList[[species]]$species = species
  return(nmList[[species]])
})
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Add annotated slot
nmList[setdiff(nonmammals$species, 'Lamprey')] = lapply(nmList[setdiff(nonmammals$species, 'Lamprey')], function(object) {
  object = AssignName(object)
  object$annotated = paste0(gsub('both', 'dual', tolower(object$classification)), 'AC-', object$type)
  return(object)
})

# Set gene names back to the original names
nmList = lapply(nmList, function(object) {
  if("orig.features" %in% names(object@misc)) {
    message('Setting feature names for ', object$species[[1]])
    RenameFeatures(object, new.names = object@misc$orig.features)
  } else {
    object
  }
  return(object)
})

# Remove zebrafish HCs
nmList$Zebrafish = subset(nmList$Zebrafish, seurat_clusters %in% c(1,2,3,11,12), invert = TRUE)

# Remove lizard HCs
nmList$Lizard = subset(nmList$Lizard, seurat_clusters %in% c(9,30), invert = TRUE)

# Zebrafish genes must match blast orthology file
ze_pr = readRDS("../../Species_Objects/Cone_Objects/Lyu_Zebrafish_PR_adult.rds")
nmList$Zebrafish@misc$converted.features = rownames(nmList$Zebrafish)
nmList$Zebrafish = RenameFeatures(nmList$Zebrafish, new.names = rownames(ze_pr))

lapply(nmList, function(object) table(object$annotated))
```

```{r}
# nmList$Chicken$annotated = paste0('string123', nmList$Chicken$annotated)
updated_objects = lapply(names(nmList), function(species){ 
    SeuratToH5ad2(nmList[[species]], 
                 filepath = paste0("../../../storage/samap/AC_objects/", species, "AC_clean_v5.h5ad"), 
                 counts.only = TRUE
                 )
})
```

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=20}
ortho = readRDS("../../../storage/samap/AC_objects/seurat_ortho.rds")
samap = fread('samap/pmzechliopsqhs_ac_seed_0_leiden_4.0.csv')

lapply(c('ze', 'ch', 'li'), function(ident){
  JSHeatmap2(subset(samap, species == ident)$leiden_clusters, subset(samap, species == ident)$annotated)
})
```

### Clustering

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=10}
samap = fread('samap/pmzechli_ac_seed_0_leiden_3.7_v2.csv')
samap$species = convert_values(samap$species, key_table = data.frame(old.names = c('pm', 'ze', 'ch', 'li'), new.names = c('Lamprey', 'Zebrafish', 'Chicken', 'Lizard')))
  
key = data.frame(clusters = subset(samap, species != 'Lamprey')$leiden_clusters, 
                 annotation = MatchClusters(subset(samap, species != 'Lamprey')$leiden_clusters, ExtractString(subset(samap, species != 'Lamprey')$annotated, '_', '-')))

key$annotation[key$clusters == 10] = 'glyAC'
key$annotation[key$clusters == 18] = 'glyAC'
key$annotation[key$clusters == 19] = 'glyAC'
key$annotation[key$clusters == 27] = 'glyAC'
# key$annotation[is.na(key$annotation)] = '
key = (unique(key))
key

samap$leiden_clusters_anno = key[match(samap$leiden_clusters, key$clusters),] %>% mutate(new = paste0(clusters,'_', annotation)) %>% pull(new)
JSHeatmap2(subset(samap, species == 'Lamprey')$annotated, subset(samap, species == 'Lamprey')$leiden_clusters_anno)
```

### Jaccard analysis

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=8}
# samap = fread('samap/pmzechli_ac_seed_0_leiden_3.7_v2.csv')
species = c('Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish', 'Lamprey')
samaps = lapply(species, function(this.species) subset(samap, species == this.species))
names(samaps) = species
ggarrange(plotlist = lapply(species, function(this.species) JSHeatmap2(samaps[[this.species]]$leiden_clusters_anno, 
                                                                                         samaps[[this.species]]$annotated, 
                                                                                         title = paste0(this.species, '\nARI=', signif(adj.rand.index(samaps[[this.species]]$leiden_clusters_anno, samaps[[this.species]]$annotated), 2)),
                                                                                          border.col = NA, stagger.threshold = 0.2,
                                                                                         row.order = sort(unique(samap$leiden_clusters_anno))) + 
                              theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
                                              axis.title = element_blank(),
                                              axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
                                              plot.margin=grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"), 
                                              axis.ticks = element_blank())), 
          common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right', nrow = 1, ncol = 4, align = 'h', widths = sapply(samaps, function(x) length(unique(x$annotated)))) + 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))

ggsave('figures/nonmammal-ac-jaccard.pdf', height=3, width=8)
```

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
samap = fread('samap/pmzechli_ac_seed_0_leiden_3.7_v3.csv')[,-1] %>% setNames(c('UMAP_1', 'UMAP_2', 'annotated', 'species', 'cell', 'leiden_clusters'))
samap$species = convert_values(samap$species, key_table = data.frame(old.names = c('pm', 'ze', 'ch', 'li'), new.names = c('Lamprey', 'Zebrafish', 'Chicken', 'Lizard')))
  
key = data.frame(clusters = subset(samap, species != 'Lamprey')$leiden_clusters, 
                 annotation = MatchClusters(subset(samap, species != 'Lamprey')$leiden_clusters, ExtractString(subset(samap, species != 'Lamprey')$annotated, '_', '-')))

key$annotation[key$clusters == 10] = 'gabaAC'
key$annotation[key$clusters == 24] = 'glyAC'
key = unique(key)
key

samap$leiden_clusters_anno = key[match(samap$leiden_clusters, key$clusters),] %>% mutate(new = paste0(clusters,'_', annotation)) %>% pull(new)
JSHeatmap2(subset(samap, species == 'Lamprey')$annotated, subset(samap, species == 'Lamprey')$leiden_clusters_anno)
```

### Mapping table

```{r, fig.height=27, fig.width=27}
samap_alignment = as.matrix(read.csv('samap/amacrine-nonmammal-mappingtable_pmzechli_v1.csv', row.names = 1))

# Type palette
AC_palette = c('dualAC' = 'chartreuse3', 'gabaAC' = 'skyblue', 'glyAC' = 'orangered', 'ngngAC' = 'grey')

# Species palette
species_palette = as.character(paletteer::paletteer_d("lisa::OskarSchlemmer", 4)) %>% 
  setNames(c('Lamprey', "Zebrafish", "Chicken", "Lizard"))
species_palette2 = species_palette %>% setNames(c("pm", "ze", "ch", "li"))

pdf('samap/amacrine-nonmammal-mappingtable_pmzechli_v1.pdf', height=27, width=27)
SAMapAlignmentHeatmap2(samap_alignment, 
                       AC_palette, 
                       species_palette2, 
                       width = unit(24, "in"), 
                       height = unit(24, "in"), 
                       show_annotation_legend = TRUE, 
                       show_row_names = TRUE, 
                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                       species.use = c('ch', 'li'))
SAMapAlignmentHeatmap2(samap_alignment, 
                       AC_palette, 
                       species_palette2, 
                       width = unit(24, "in"), 
                       height = unit(24, "in"), 
                       show_annotation_legend = TRUE, 
                       show_row_names = TRUE, 
                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                       species.use = c('ze', 'ch', 'li'))
SAMapAlignmentHeatmap2(samap_alignment, 
                       AC_palette, 
                       species_palette2, 
                       width = unit(24, "in"), 
                       height = unit(24, "in"), 
                       show_annotation_legend = TRUE, 
                       show_row_names = TRUE, 
                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                       species.use = c('pm', 'ze', 'ch', 'li'))
dev.off()
```

li_gabaAC-36 maps to chicken gly 62
ze43 maps to ch gaba 7
ze 9 is VG3

### Including lamprey

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
samap = fread('samap/pmzechliopsqhs_ac_seed_0_leiden_4.0.csv')[,-1] %>% setNames(c('UMAP_1', 'UMAP_2', 'annotated', 'species', 'cell', 'leiden_clusters'))
samap$cell = sub("-[^-]+$", "", samap$cell)
samap_subset = c('Human', 'Squirrel', "Opossum", 'Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish', 'Lamprey')
samap$leiden_clusters = factor(samap$leiden_clusters)
samap$species = convert_values(samap$species, data.frame(old.names = c('hs', 'sq', "op", 'ch', 'li', 'pm', 'ze'), 
                                                         new.names = c('Human', 'Squirrel', "Opossum", 'Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Lamprey', 'Zebrafish')))
# samap$oACs = BIGSEURAT$type[match(samap$cell, str_split_fixed(Cells(BIGSEURAT), '_', 2)[,2])]

lapply(samap_subset, function(ident){
  JSHeatmap2(subset(samap, species == ident)$leiden_clusters, subset(samap, species == ident)$annotated)
})
```

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=20}
JSHeatmap(JSMatrix(table(samap$leiden_clusters, samap$annotated)))
```

### Comparison with and without lamprey

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
samap = fread('samap/zechli_ac_seed_0_leiden_3.1.csv')
samap2 = fread('samap/pmzechli_ac_seed_0_leiden_3.5.csv')

projection = ConfusionMatrix(samap$annotated, samap$leiden_clusters) %*% ConfusionMatrix(samap$leiden_clusters, samap$annotated) 
JSHeatmap(JSMatrix(projection[startsWith(rownames(projection), 'ch'), startsWith(rownames(projection), 'li')]))
```

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
projection2 = ConfusionMatrix(samap2$annotated, samap2$leiden_clusters) %*% ConfusionMatrix(samap2$leiden_clusters, samap2$annotated) 
JSHeatmap(JSMatrix(projection2[startsWith(rownames(projection2), 'ch'), startsWith(rownames(projection2), 'li')]))
```

Addition of lamprey does not change ze, li, ch clustering much

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
samap$leiden.with.lamprey = samap2$leiden_clusters[match(samap$cell, samap2$cell)]
head(samap)

ConfusionMatrix2(samap$leiden.with.lamprey, samap$leiden_clusters)
```

### Comparison to seurat

Definitely some differences between samap and seurat clustering

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
ortho = readRDS("../../../storage/samap/AC_objects/seurat_ortho.rds")
samap = fread('samap/zechli_ac_seed_0_leiden_3.1.csv')

samap$seurat_clusters = ortho$type[match(sub("-[^-]+$", "", samap$cell), Cells(ortho))]
head(samap)

ConfusionMatrix2(samap$seurat_clusters, samap$leiden_clusters)
ConfusionMatrix2(subset(samap, species == 'ze')$seurat_clusters, subset(samap, species == 'ze')$leiden_clusters)
ConfusionMatrix2(subset(samap, species == 'ch')$seurat_clusters, subset(samap, species == 'ch')$leiden_clusters)
ConfusionMatrix2(subset(samap, species == 'li')$seurat_clusters, subset(samap, species == 'li')$leiden_clusters)
```

## Evaluate integration quality

```{r}
ortho = readRDS("../../../storage/samap/AC_objects/seurat_ortho.rds")

# ortho$annotated[ortho$species == 'Zebrafish' & ortho$annotated == 9] = '9_VG3'
ortho$species_littype = str_split_fixed(ortho$annotated, '_', 2)[,2]
ortho$lit_type[is.na(ortho$lit_type)] = ''
# speciesACList = SplitObject(ortho, 'species')

KNOWNTYPES = c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3')

# Raw tabulation
raw_tables = lapply(KNOWNTYPES, function(type) {
  raw_table = table(ortho$lit_type == type, ortho$species_littype == type)[2:1,2:1]
  return(raw_table)
})

lapply(raw_tables, EvaluateModel)
```

Nonmammal integration without lamprey

```{r}
samap = fread('samap/zechli_ac_seed_0_leiden_3.1_v2.csv')

samap$species_littype = str_split_fixed(samap$annotated, '_', 3)[,3]
samap$lit_type = ''
samap$lit_type[samap$leiden_clusters == 5] = 'SAC'
samap$lit_type[samap$leiden_clusters == 26] = 'A2'
samap$lit_type[samap$leiden_clusters == 32] = 'VG3'
samap$species_littype[samap$species_littype == 'AII'] = 'A2' # 24 sq A2s are named AII

KNOWNTYPES = c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3')
species.use = c('hs', 'sq', 'op', 'ch', 'li')

# Raw tabulation
raw_tables = lapply(KNOWNTYPES, function(type) {
  raw_table = table(subset(samap, species %in% species.use)$lit_type == type, subset(samap, species %in% species.use)$species_littype == type)[2:1,2:1]
  return(raw_table)
})

lapply(raw_tables, EvaluateModel)
```

Full samap integration

```{r}
samap = fread('samap/pmzechliopsqhs_ac_seed_0_leiden_4.0.csv')

samap$species_littype = str_split_fixed(samap$annotated, '_', 3)[,3]
samap$lit_type = ''
samap$lit_type[samap$leiden_clusters == 5] = 'SAC'
samap$lit_type[samap$leiden_clusters == 26] = 'A2'
samap$lit_type[samap$leiden_clusters == 32] = 'VG3'
samap$species_littype[samap$species_littype == 'AII'] = 'A2' # 24 sq A2s are named AII

KNOWNTYPES = c('SAC', 'A2', 'VG3')
species.use = c('hs', 'sq', 'op', 'ch', 'li')

# Raw tabulation
raw_tables = lapply(KNOWNTYPES, function(type) {
  raw_table = table(subset(samap, species %in% species.use)$lit_type == type, subset(samap, species %in% species.use)$species_littype == type)[2:1,2:1]
  return(raw_table)
})

lapply(raw_tables, EvaluateModel)
```

# Fish AC types

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=10, dpi=300}
gene_pairs = fread('samap/pmzechli_ac_seed_0_gene_pairs.csv')
names(gene_pairs) = gsub('glyAC-|dualAC-|ngngAC-|gabaAC-', '', names(gene_pairs))

sac.markers = merge(
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`li_14_SAC;ze_0_SAC`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Lizard', 'Zebrafish')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`ch_2_SAC;li_14_SAC`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Chicken', 'Lizard')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      by = 'Lizard', all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% mutate(row_annotation = 'SAC')

a2.markers = merge(
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`li_17_A2;ze_13_A2`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Lizard', 'Zebrafish')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`ch_1_A2;li_17_A2`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Chicken', 'Lizard')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      by = 'Lizard', all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% mutate(row_annotation = 'A2')

pdgfra.markers = merge(
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`li_35;ze_50_nNOS`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Lizard', 'Zebrafish')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`ch_20;li_35`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Chicken', 'Lizard')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      by = 'Lizard', all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% mutate(row_annotation = 'PDGFRA')

vg3.markers = merge(
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`li_21_VG3;ze_9`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Lizard', 'Zebrafish')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      str_split_fixed(gene_pairs$`ch_40_VG3;li_21_VG3`, ';', 2) %>% as.data.frame %>% setNames(c('Chicken', 'Lizard')) %>% filter(Lizard != ''), 
      by = 'Lizard', all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% mutate(row_annotation = 'VG3')

markers.df = do.call(rbind, list(sac.markers, pdgfra.markers, a2.markers, vg3.markers))
markers.df[1:3] = apply(markers.df[1:3], 2, function(col) col = str_split_fixed(col, '_', 2)[,2]) %>% as.data.frame()

nmListModified = nmList[c('Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish')]
nmListModified$Chicken = AssignAnnotations(nmListModified$Chicken, list('PDGFRA' = 21, 'SAC' = 3, 'A2' = 2, VG3 = 41), as = 'annotated', use = 'type_no')
# nmListModified$Chicken = subset(nmListModified$Chicken, annotated %in% c('SAC', 'PDGFRA'))
nmListModified$Lizard = AssignAnnotations(nmListModified$Lizard, list('PDGFRA' = 36, 'SAC' = 25, 'A2' = 18, VG3 = 22), as = 'annotated', use = 'type_no')
# nmListModified$Lizard = subset(nmListModified$Lizard, annotated %in% c('SAC', 'PDGFRA'))
nmListModified$Zebrafish = AssignAnnotations(nmListModified$Zebrafish, list('PDGFRA' = 51, 'SAC' = 1, 'A2' = 14, VG3 = 10), as = 'annotated', use = 'type_no')
# nmListModified$Zebrafish = subset(nmListModified$Zebrafish, annotated %in% c('SAC', 'PDGFRA'))

pdf('figures/zebrafish_heatmap.pdf', height=3, width=10)
SAMapHeatmap2(nmListModified, 
             markers.df, 
             type_palette = colorspace::lighten(c('SAC' = 'orangered', PDGFRA = 'chartreuse', A2 = 'deepskyblue', VG3 = 'pink'), 0.2),
             species_palette = c(Zebrafish = 'darkviolet', Chicken = 'gold', Lizard = 'red3'),
             species.use = c("Zebrafish", "Chicken", "Lizard"), #names(species_ids), 
             types.use = c('SAC', 'PDGFRA', 'A2', 'VG3'),
             show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
             show_row_names = FALSE, 
             show_column_names = FALSE,
             # min.z.score = -1, 
             # max.z.score = 2,
             # width = unit(10, "in"), 
             rotate = TRUE,
             dotplot = FALSE)
dev.off()
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6}
SAMapHeatmap2(nmListModified, 
             markers.df, 
             type_palette = colorspace::lighten(c('SAC' = 'orangered', PDGFRA = 'chartreuse', A2 = 'deepskyblue', VG3 = 'pink'), 0.2),
             species_palette = c(Zebrafish = 'violet', Chicken = 'blue', Lizard = 'cyan'),
             species.use = c("Zebrafish", "Chicken", "Lizard"), #names(species_ids), 
             types.use = c('SAC', 'PDGFRA', 'A2', 'VG3'),
             show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
             show_row_names = FALSE, 
             show_column_names = FALSE,
             # min.z.score = -1, 
             # max.z.score = 2,
             # width = unit(10, "in"), 
             rotate = FALSE,
             dotplot = FALSE)
```

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
ze2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/ze2ch.rds')
li2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/li2ch.rds')

best_markers = data.frame(Chicken = c(head(subset(de, cluster == '14_SAC')$gene, 10), #'SLC5A7', 'CHAT', 'SLC18A3', 'SOX2', 'ISL1',
                                      head(subset(de, cluster == '36')$gene, 20), #'GAD2', 'PDGFRA', 'GJC2', 'TFAP2C', 'TJP1',
                                      head(subset(de, cluster == '16_A2')$gene, 10), 
                                      head(subset(de, cluster == '18_VG3')$gene, 10)))
best_markers$Zebrafish = ConvertGeneSymbolsFromMatrix(t(ze2ch), best_markers$Chicken)
best_markers$Lizard = ConvertGeneSymbolsFromMatrix(t(li2ch), best_markers$Chicken)

best_markers$row_annotation = c(rep('SAC', 10), rep('PDGFRA', 20), rep('A2', 10), rep('VG3', 10))

SAMapHeatmap2(nmListModified, 
             best_markers, 
             type_palette = c('SAC' = 'orangered', PDGFRA = 'chartreuse3', A2 = 'deepskyblue', VG3 = 'pink'),
             species_palette = c(Zebrafish = 'violet', Chicken = 'blue', Lizard = 'cyan'),
             species.use = c("Zebrafish", "Chicken", "Lizard"), #names(species_ids), 
             types.use = c('SAC', 'PDGFRA', 'A2', 'VG3'),
             show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
             show_row_names = TRUE, 
             # width = unit(4, "in"), 
             rotate = FALSE,
             dotplot = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize) # For color functions

# Create sample data
set.seed(123)
data <- matrix(rnorm(100), nrow = 10)

# Define colors for heatmap
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("blue", "white", "red"))

# Create the heatmap
heatmap <- Heatmap(data,
                   name = "Expression",
                   col = col_fun,
                   show_column_names = FALSE,
                   show_row_names = FALSE)

# Create a dot legend
lgd = Legend(labels = seq(0,100, by = 25), title = "Percentage\nexpressed",
    graphics = list(
        function(x, y, w, h) grid.circle(x, y, r=0/100 * 0.1, gp=gpar(fill = 'black', col = 'black')),
        function(x, y, w, h) grid.circle(x, y, r=25/100 * 0.1, gp=gpar(fill = 'black', col = 'black')),
        function(x, y, w, h) grid.circle(x, y, r=50/100 * 0.1, gp=gpar(fill = 'black', col = 'black')),
        function(x, y, w, h) grid.circle(x, y, r=75/100 * 0.1, gp=gpar(fill = 'black', col = 'black')),
        function(x, y, w, h) grid.circle(x, y, r=100/100 * 0.1, gp=gpar(fill = 'black', col = 'black'))
    ))

# Draw heatmap with dot legend
draw(heatmap, annotation_legend_list = lgd)

```

# Cell class non-mammal integration

## Non-mammalian atlases

```{r}
nonmammals = data.frame(species = c("Lamprey", 'Zebrafish', "Chicken", "Lizard"), 
                        path = c("Lamprey_kPetMar1", 'Zebrafish_Lyu_Injury', "Chicken_reclustered", "Lizard_ncbi"))

# Read in objects
nmList = lapply(nonmammals$path, function(path) readRDS(paste0('../../Species_Objects/', path, '_initial.rds')))
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Add species ident
nmList = lapply(names(nmList), function(species) {
  nmList[[species]]$species = species
  return(nmList[[species]])
})
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Convert rods and cones to PR
nmList[c('Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish')] = lapply(nmList[c('Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish')], function(object){
  object$cell_class[object$cell_class %in% c('Rod', 'Cone')] = 'PR'
  return(object)
})

# Add annotated slot
nmList$Chicken$assigned = nmList$Chicken$annotated
nmList[c('Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish')] = lapply(nmList[c('Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Zebrafish')], function(object) {
  object$annotated = factor(paste0(object$cell_class, '-', object$seurat_clusters))
  return(object)
})

# Make lamprey SACs as AC-0
nmList$Lamprey$annotated = nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters
nmList$Lamprey$annotated[nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters == 'SAC'] = 'AC-0'
nmList$Lamprey$cell_class = nmList$Lamprey$peng_annotation
nmList$Lamprey$cell_class[nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters == 'SAC'] = 'AC'
nmList$Lamprey$annotated = factor(nmList$Lamprey$annotated)

# Lizard_0_RGC, 13_PR, 9_BC are low quality, remove; Lizard 31,32 are unknown, remove
nmList$Lizard = subset(nmList$Lizard, seurat_clusters %in% c(0,31,32,9,13), invert = TRUE)
# VlnPlot(nmList$Lamprey, 'nFeature_RNA', group.by = 'annotated') + NoLegend()

# Chicken_31_Other is low quality; Chicken_32_Rod might be contaminated with MG; Chicken_AC-28 is contaminated with BCs
nmList$Chicken = subset(nmList$Chicken, seurat_clusters %in% c(31, 32, 28), invert = TRUE)

# Zebrafish_35 is low quality rods
nmList$Zebrafish = subset(nmList$Zebrafish, seurat_clusters %in% c(35), invert = TRUE)

# Chicken 28 subclustering
# temp = subset(nmList$Chicken, seurat_clusters == 28)
# temp = ClusterSeurat(temp)
# DotPlot2(temp, features = rev(Genes(major_annotation)))
# DimPlotLabeled(temp)

# Modified lamprey
LampreyModified = nmList$Lamprey
LampreyModified$cell_class[LampreyModified$cell_class == 'RGC'] = 'AC'
LampreyModified$cell_class[LampreyModified$annotated == 'RGC-15'] = 'RGC'
LampreyModified$annotated = as.character(LampreyModified$annotated)
LampreyModified$annotated[LampreyModified$cell_class == 'AC'] = gsub('RGC', 'AC', LampreyModified$annotated[LampreyModified$cell_class == 'AC'])

# Converting lamprey features to chicken symbols when 1:1 ortholog
pm2ze = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/pm2ze.rds')
pm2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/pm2ch.rds')
pm2li = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/pm2li.rds')
ze2li = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/ze2li.rds')
ze2ch= readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/ze2ch.rds')
li2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/li2ch.rds')
# nmList$Lamprey = ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lamprey, pm2ch)

# Make annotated the ident
nmList = lapply(nmList, function(object) {
  Idents(object) = 'annotated'
  return(object)
  })
```

```{r}
updated_objects = lapply(names(nmList), function(species){ 
  SeuratToH5ad2(nmList[[species]], filepath = paste0("../../Species_Objects/", species, "_counts_initial.h5ad"), counts.only = TRUE)
  # sceasy::convertFormat(nmList[[species]], from="seurat", to="anndata", main_layer = 'counts', outFile=paste0("../../Species_Objects/", species, "_counts_initial.h5ad"))
})
```

## High resolution atlases

```{r}
nonmammals = data.frame(species = c("Lamprey", 'Zebrafish', "Chicken", "Lizard"), 
                        path = c("Lamprey_kPetMar1_initial_v2", 'Zebrafish_full_v1', "Chicken_full_v1", "Lizard_full_v1"))

# Read in objects
nmList = lapply(nonmammals$path, function(path) readRDS(paste0('../../Full_Objects/', path, '.rds')))
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Add species ident
nmList = lapply(names(nmList), function(species) {
  nmList[[species]]$species = species
  return(nmList[[species]])
})
names(nmList) = nonmammals$species

# Lamprey cell class
nmList$Lamprey$cell_class = nmList$Lamprey$peng_annotation

# Make lamprey AC clusters glycinergic
nmList$Lamprey$annotated = nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters
nmList$Lamprey$annotated[nmList$Lamprey$cell_class == 'AC'] = paste0('gly', nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters[nmList$Lamprey$cell_class == 'AC'])

# Make lamprey SACs as AC-0
nmList$Lamprey$cell_class[nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters == 'SAC'] = 'AC'
nmList$Lamprey$annotated[nmList$Lamprey$peng_clusters == 'SAC'] = 'gabaAC-0'
nmList$Lamprey$annotated = factor(nmList$Lamprey$annotated)

# Coerce dual/ngng classifications into GABA/gly
nmList$Chicken$classification[nmList$Chicken$annotated %in% c('AC-23', 'AC-62')] = 'GABA'
nmList$Lizard$classification[nmList$Lizard$annotated %in% c('AC-16', 'AC-11')] = 'GABA'
nmList$Zebrafish$classification[nmList$Zebrafish$annotated %in% c('AC-15_SEG', 'AC-9')] = 'Gly'

# Assign ACs their subclass
nmList[c('Zebrafish', 'Chicken', 'Lizard')] = lapply(nmList[c('Zebrafish', 'Chicken', 'Lizard')], function(object) {
  object$annotated[object$cell_class == 'AC'] = paste0(gsub('both', 'dual', tolower(object$classification[object$cell_class == 'AC'])), object$annotated[object$cell_class == 'AC'])
  return(object)
})

pm2ze = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/pm2ze.rds')
pm2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/pm2ch.rds')
pm2li = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/pm2li.rds')
ze2li = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/ze2li.rds')
ze2ch= readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/ze2ch.rds')
li2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/li2ch.rds')

# Collapse chicken HCs and MGs
nmList$Chicken$annotated[nmList$Chicken$cell_class == 'HC'] = 'HC'
nmList$Chicken$annotated[nmList$Chicken$cell_class == 'MG'] = 'MG'

# Make annotated the ident
nmList = lapply(nmList, function(object) {
  
  # Add cell class that distinguishes gaba and gly AC
  object$cell_class2 = ExtractString(object$annotated, after = '-')
  
  # Sort annotated
  object$annotated = factor(object$annotated, levels = Metadata(object, 'cell_class2', 'annotated')$annotated)
  
  Idents(object) = 'annotated'
  
  return(object)
  })

lapply(nmList, function(object) table(object$annotated))

# Normalize zebrafish data (which is a chimeric object)
nmList$Zebrafish = NormalizeData(nmList$Zebrafish)

# Zebrafish all from Lyu
nmList$ZebrafishLyu = readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Zebrafish_lyu_full_v1.rds')
nmList$ZebrafishLyu$cell_class2 = nmList$ZebrafishLyu$cell_class
nmList$ZebrafishLyu$cell_class2[nmList$ZebrafishLyu$cell_class == 'AC'] = paste0(tolower(nmList$ZebrafishLyu$classification[nmList$ZebrafishLyu$cell_class == 'AC']), 'AC')

# Add cat shark
shark.full = readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Shark_full_v1.rds')
DefaultAssay(shark.full) = 'RNA'
# shark.full.2 = subset(shark.full, annotated %in% c('RGC1'), invert = TRUE)
shark.full.2 = subset(shark.full.2, cell_class %in% c('RPC', 'OL'), invert = TRUE)
shark.full.2$cell_class2[shark.full.2$annotated == 'AC_ACh'] = 'achAC'
shark.full.2$annotated = paste0(shark.full.2$cell_class2, '-', shark.full.2$annotated)
shark.full.2$animal = shark.full.2$orig.ident
shark.full.2$annotated2 = paste0(ExtractString(shark.full.2$annotated, after = '-'), '-', ExtractString(shark.full.2$annotated, after = '-'))
nmList$Shark = shark.full.2

# Killifish
kfish.full = readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Killifish_full_v1.rds')
kfish.full.2 = subset(subset(kfish.full, CellType3 %in% c('Vip Neurons', 'GABAergic/PVALB5 Amacrine Cells', 'RBCs', 'RPE'), invert = TRUE), 
                      cell_class2 %in% c('OL', 'Other', 'RPC'), invert = TRUE)
kfish.full.2$cell_class = gsub('achAC|gabaAC|glyAC', 'AC', kfish.full.2$cell_class2)
table(kfish.full.2$cell_class2, kfish.full.2$cell_class)
nmList$Killifish = kfish.full.2

# saveRDS(nmList$Lizard, '../../Full_Objects/Lizard_full_v2.rds')
```


```{r}
# Cat shark
shark.full = readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Shark_full_v1.rds')
DefaultAssay(shark.full) = 'RNA'
# shark.full.2 = subset(shark.full, annotated != 'RGC1')
shark.full.2 = shark.full
shark.full.2$cell_class2[shark.full.2$annotated == 'AC_ACh'] = 'achAC'
shark.full.2$annotated = paste0(shark.full.2$cell_class2, '-', shark.full.2$annotated)
shark.full.2$animal = shark.full.2$orig.ident
shark.full.2$annotated2 = paste0(ExtractString(shark.full.2$annotated, after = '-'), '-', ExtractString(shark.full.2$annotated, after = '-'))
table(shark.full.2$annotated2)
shark.full.2$annotated = gsub('achAC-AC_ACh', 'gabaAC-0', gsub('PR-PR_Precursor', 'PR-pre', gsub('-RPC', '-', gsub('-OL', '-1', gsub('-AC_GABA', '-', gsub('-MG', '-1', gsub('-HC', '-1', gsub('-RGC', '-', gsub('-BC', '-', gsub('PR_Rod', '', gsub('AC_Gly', '', shark.full.2$annotated)))))))))))
DimPlotLabeled(shark.full.2, group.by = 'annotated')
shark.full.2 = subset(shark.full.2, annotated %in% c('RPC-1', 'RPC-2', 'OL-1'), invert = TRUE)
SeuratToH5ad2(shark.full.2, filepath = paste0("../../Full_Objects/Shark_full_counts_v1.h5ad"), counts.only = TRUE)

# Mouse
mouse.full = readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Mouse_full_v1.rds')
table(mouse.full$annotated)
SeuratToH5ad2(mouse.full, filepath = paste0("../../Full_Objects/Mouse_full_counts_v2.h5ad"), counts.only = TRUE)

# Macaque
macaque.full = readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Macaque_full_v1.rds')
table(macaque.full$annotated)
SeuratToH5ad2(macaque.full, filepath = paste0("../../Full_Objects/Macaque_full_counts_v2.h5ad"), counts.only = TRUE)


macaque.full$cell = gsub(':', '_', gsub('x', '-1', Cells(macaque.full)))
mac.int = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/macaque_macFas6_initial.rds')
VennDiagram(Cells(mac.int), macaque.full$cell)
common.cells = intersect(Cells(mac.int), macaque.full$cell)

temp = subset(macaque.full, cell %in% common.cells)
table(temp$cell_class)
```

## Save to h5ad 

```{r}
# Only save counts to h5ad file; otherwise, scaled data is placed in X
updated_objects = lapply(names(nmList), function(species){ 
  SeuratToH5ad2(nmList[[species]], filepath = paste0("../../Full_Objects/", species, "_full_counts_v2.h5ad"), counts.only = TRUE)
  # sceasy::convertFormat(nmList[[species]], from="seurat", to="anndata", main_layer = 'counts', outFile=paste0("../../Species_Objects/", species, "_counts_initial.h5ad"))
})
```
