Zebrafish has it's own lowercase nomenclature, avoid conversion since we know which genes are important

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=20}
# AnnotatedUmap(nmList$Zebrafish, annotation = major_annotation_pr_ze, group.by = 'annotated', color.genes = FALSE, raster = FALSE, color.clusters.by = 'cell_class')
# nmList$Zebrafish$annotated = factor(nmList$Zebrafish$annotated)
nmList$Zebrafish = NormalizeData(nmList$Zebrafish)
AnnotatedDotPlot(nmList$Zebrafish, major_annotation_pr_ze, features = rev(Genes(major_annotation_pr_ze)), group.by = 'annotated', color.clusters.by = 'cell_class', color.genes = FALSE) + coord_flip() + RotatedAxis()
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=25}
# Annotations for each species
nmList$Lamprey = ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lamprey, pm2ch)

# lapply(nmList[c('Lamprey', 'Chicken', 'Lizard')], function(object) AnnotatedUmap(object, annotation = major_annotation_pr, group.by = 'annotated', color.genes = FALSE, raster = FALSE, umap.legend = TRUE))
lapply(nmList[c('Lamprey', 'Chicken', 'Lizard')], function(object) AnnotatedDotPlot(object, major_annotation_pr, features = rev(Genes(major_annotation_pr)), group.by = 'annotated', color.clusters.by = 'cell_class', color.genes = FALSE) + coord_flip() + RotatedAxis())

nmList$Lamprey = RenameFeatures(nmList$Lamprey, new.names = nmList$Lamprey@misc$orig.features)
```

## Lamprey module scores

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
top_de = lapply(nmList, function(object) {
  de = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(object, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 100)
  return(lapply(de %>% split(de$cluster), pull, 'gene'))
})

ComputeModuleScores = function(object, top_de, scale = FALSE){
  # modules on species
  object = AddModuleScore(object, features = top_de)
  colnames(object@meta.data)[(ncol(object@meta.data)-5):ncol(object@meta.data)] = paste0(names(top_de), '_score')
  # ggarrange(plotlist = FeaturePlot(object, features = paste0(c('AC', 'BC', 'HC', 'MG', 'PR', 'RGC'), '_score'), combine = FALSE), legend = 'right', common.legend = TRUE)
  
  # Z-score to make sure that scores are on the same scale
  if(scale) {
    object$AC_score = scale(object$AC_score)
    object$BC_score = scale(object$BC_score)
    object$HC_score = scale(object$HC_score)
    object$MG_score = scale(object$MG_score)
    object$PR_score = scale(object$PR_score)
    object$RGC_score = scale(object$RGC_score)
  }
  
  print(VlnPlot(object, features = paste0(c('AC', 'BC', 'HC', 'MG', 'PR', 'RGC'), '_score'), stack = TRUE, flip = TRUE))
  
  # Convert scores to probabilities using softmax
  species.avg = do.call(rbind, lapply(paste0(c('AC', 'BC', 'HC', 'MG', 'PR', 'RGC'), '_score'), function(score) MeanMetadata(object, 'annotated', score)))
  rownames(species.avg) = c('AC', 'BC', 'HC', 'MG', 'PR', 'RGC')
  species.pval = apply(species.avg, 2, softmax)
  species.predicted = apply(species.pval, 2, function(x) c('AC', 'BC', 'HC', 'MG', 'PR', 'RGC')[which.max(x)])
  # print(species.predicted)
  
  return(species.avg)
}
```

### Chicken modules

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
ComputeModuleScores(nmList$Chicken, MakeMutuallyExclusive(top_de$Chicken))
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lamprey, pm2ch), top_de$Chicken) # when using li2ch on accident for conversion, observed strange result
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lizard, li2ch), MakeMutuallyExclusive(top_de$Chicken))
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Zebrafish, ze2ch), top_de$Chicken)
```

### Lizard modules

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
ComputeModuleScores(nmList$Lizard, top_de$Lizard)
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lamprey, pm2li), top_de$Lizard) 
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Zebrafish, ze2li), top_de$Lizard)
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Chicken, t(li2ch)), top_de$Lizard)
```

### Zebrafish modules

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
ComputeModuleScores(nmList$Zebrafish, top_de$Zebrafish)
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lamprey, pm2ze), top_de$Zebrafish) 
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Chicken, t(ze2ch)), top_de$Zebrafish)
# Converting + lowercase is similar/slightly worse than just converting
# ComputeModuleScores(LowerCase_genes(nmList$Chicken), top_de$Zebrafish)
# ComputeModuleScores(LowerCase_genes(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Chicken, t(ze2ch))), top_de$Zebrafish)
ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lizard, t(ze2li)), top_de$Zebrafish)
```

## Summary of lamprey cluster statistics

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
zebrafish.scores.chicken = ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Zebrafish, ze2ch), MakeMutuallyExclusive(top_de$Chicken))
chicken.scores.chicken = ComputeModuleScores(nmList$Chicken, MakeMutuallyExclusive(top_de$Chicken))
lizard.scores.chicken = ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lizard, li2ch), MakeMutuallyExclusive(top_de$Chicken))

# # Z-score matrix
# Heatmap(apply(lamprey.scores.chicken, 1, scale) %>% setRowNames(colnames(lamprey.scores.chicken)), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE)
module.score.list = list('Zebrafish' = zebrafish.scores.chicken, 'Chicken' = chicken.scores.chicken, 'Lizard' = lizard.scores.chicken)
plot_grid(plotlist = lapply((names(module.score.list)), function(species) grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap(name = 'score', (module.score.list[[species]]), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, column_title = species, 
                                                                                                     col = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("blue", "white", "red")))))), 
          nrow = 3)
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
lamprey.scores.zebrafish = ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lamprey, pm2ze), MakeMutuallyExclusive(top_de$Zebrafish))
lamprey.scores.chicken = ComputeModuleScores(ConvertGeneSymbols2(nmList$Lamprey, pm2ch), MakeMutuallyExclusive(top_de$Chicken))

module.score.list = list('Zebrafish' = lamprey.scores.zebrafish, 'Chicken' = lamprey.scores.chicken, 'Lizard' = lamprey.scores.lizard)

                                                                                                     col = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("blue", "white", "red")))))), 
          nrow = 3) #labels = c('Zebrafish', 'Chicken', 'Lizard'), hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5)
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6}
scores.df = data.frame(zebrafish = as.vector(lamprey.scores.zebrafish), chicken = as.vector(lamprey.scores.chicken), lizard = as.vector(lamprey.scores.lizard)) %>% mutate(labels = as.vector(outer(rownames(lamprey.scores.zebrafish), colnames(lamprey.scores.zebrafish), function(x,y) paste0(x, ':', y))))
ScatterPlot(scores.df, 'zebrafish', 'chicken', labels = 'labels', max.overlaps = 10)
ScatterPlot(scores.df, 'zebrafish', 'lizard', labels = 'labels', max.overlaps = 10)
ScatterPlot(scores.df, 'lizard', 'chicken', labels = 'labels', max.overlaps = 10)
```

## Similarity between ACs and RGCs

```{r}
nmList$Lamprey = ScaleData(nmList$Lamprey, features = rownames(nmList$Lamprey))

# Too big, memory issue
# nmList$Zebrafish = ScaleData(nmList$Zebrafish, features = rownames(nmList$Zebrafish))
nmList$Chicken = ScaleData(nmList$Chicken, features = rownames(nmList$Chicken))
nmList$Lizard = ScaleData(nmList$Lizard, features = rownames(nmList$Lizard))
```

###  Chicken

```{r}
de_chicken = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Chicken, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
table(de_chicken$cluster)
chicken_de_list = lapply(de_chicken %>% split(de_chicken$cluster), pull, 'gene')
SeuratHeatmap(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Chicken, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 50), 
              group.by = 'cell_class', 
              features = unlist(chicken_de_list), 
              rotate = TRUE,
              show_column_names = FALSE, 
              show_row_names = FALSE, 
              show_heatmap_legend = FALSE)

SeuratHeatmap(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Lizard, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 50), 
              group.by = 'cell_class', 
              features = intersect(unlist(chicken_de_list), rownames(nmList$Lizard)), 
              rotate = TRUE,
              show_column_names = FALSE, 
              show_row_names = FALSE, 
              show_heatmap_legend = FALSE)

Heatmap(Iterate(chicken_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = c('white', 'red'), column_title = 'Chicken')
# VennDiagram(chicken_de_list$AC, chicken_de_list$RGC)
```

Using subclass

```{r}
table(nmList$Chicken$subclass)
de_chicken = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Chicken, group.by = 'subclass', size = 1000), group.by = 'subclass', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
table(de_chicken$cluster)
chicken_de_list = lapply(de_chicken %>% split(de_chicken$cluster), pull, 'gene')
SeuratHeatmap(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Chicken, group.by = 'subclass', size = 50), 
              group.by = 'subclass', 
              features = unlist(chicken_de_list), 
              # rotate = FALSE,
              show_column_names = FALSE,
              show_row_names = FALSE,
              show_heatmap_legend = TRUE, 
              annotate.by = 'subclass')

Heatmap(Iterate(chicken_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = c('white', 'red'), column_title = 'Chicken')
VennDiagram(chicken_de_list$gabaAC, chicken_de_list$RGC)
VennDiagram(chicken_de_list$glyAC, chicken_de_list$RGC)
```

## All together

### By cell class

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
de_lamprey = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Lamprey, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
lamprey_de_list = lapply(de_lamprey %>% split(de_lamprey$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_shark = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Shark, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
shark_de_list = lapply(de_shark %>% split(de_shark$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_kfish = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Killifish, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
kfish_de_list = lapply(de_kfish %>% split(de_kfish$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_zebrafish = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$ZebrafishLyu, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
zebrafish_de_list = lapply(de_zebrafish %>% split(de_zebrafish$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_chicken = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Chicken, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
chicken_de_list = lapply(de_chicken %>% split(de_chicken$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_lizard = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Lizard, group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
lizard_de_list = lapply(de_lizard %>% split(de_lizard$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG')]

# Sort PR -> BC -> HC -> AC -> RGC -> MG
# sort_fun = function(mat){
  # mat[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG'), c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'AC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
# }

# Together
plot_grid(
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(lamprey_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Lamprey'))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(shark_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Shark', max.value = 0.2))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(kfish_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Killifish', max.value = 0.2))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(zebrafish_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Zebrafish', max.value = 0.2))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(chicken_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Chicken'))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(lizard_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Lizard'))),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3
)
```

### By sub class

```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
de_lamprey = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Lamprey, group.by = 'cell_class2', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class2', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
lamprey_de_list = lapply(de_lamprey %>% split(de_lamprey$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'gabaAC', 'glyAC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_shark = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Shark, group.by = 'cell_class2', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class2', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
shark_de_list = lapply(de_shark %>% split(de_shark$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'gabaAC', 'glyAC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_kfish = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Killifish, group.by = 'cell_class2', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class2', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
kfish_de_list = lapply(de_kfish %>% split(de_kfish$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'gabaAC', 'glyAC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_zebrafish = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$ZebrafishLyu, group.by = 'cell_class2', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class2', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
zebrafish_de_list = lapply(de_zebrafish %>% split(de_zebrafish$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'gabaAC', 'glyAC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_chicken = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Chicken, group.by = 'cell_class2', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class2', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
chicken_de_list = lapply(de_chicken %>% split(de_chicken$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'gabaAC', 'glyAC', 'RGC', 'MG')]
de_lizard = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(nmList$Lizard, group.by = 'cell_class2', size = 1000), group.by = 'cell_class2', n = 1000, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)
lizard_de_list = lapply(de_lizard %>% split(de_lizard$cluster), pull, 'gene')[c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'gabaAC', 'glyAC', 'RGC', 'MG')]

# Together
plot_grid(
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(lamprey_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Lamprey'))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(shark_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Shark', max.value = 0.2))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(kfish_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Killifish', max.value = 0.2))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(zebrafish_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Zebrafish', max.value = 0.2))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(chicken_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Chicken'))),
  grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap2(Iterate(lizard_de_list, jaccard, return.matrix = TRUE), cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE, legend.name = 'Jaccard\nsimiliary', col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.2), c("white", "red")), title = 'Lizard'))),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3
)
```

## RGC score for each AC type

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=25}
CellClassScoring = function(object){
  de_res = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(DownsampleSeurat(object, group.by = 'annotated', size = 100), 
                                       group.by = 'cell_class', size = 1000), 
                      group.by = 'cell_class', n = 100, avg_log2FC_cutoff = 0.5)

  de_list = lapply(de_res %>% split(de_res$cluster), pull, 'gene')
  score.names = paste0(names(de_list), '.score')
  object = AddModuleScore(object, de_list)
  colnames(object@meta.data)[colnames(object@meta.data) %in% paste0("Cluster", 1:6)] = score.names
  
  print(VlnPlot(object, features = score.names, stack = TRUE, flip = TRUE))
  print(VlnPlot(subset(object, cell_class == 'AC'), features = score.names, stack = TRUE, flip = TRUE, same.y.lims = TRUE))
  
  # Null distribution computation by permuting cell type labels
  null.dist = do.call(cbind, lapply(seq_len(100), function(i) {
    object$permuted = as.character(sample(object$annotated))
    MeanMetadata(object, 'permuted', 'RGC.score')
  }))
  
  quantiles = quantile(as.vector(null.dist), probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
  print(PrettyHistogram2(as.vector(null.dist), vline = quantiles))
  
  means = MeanMetadata(object, 'annotated', 'RGC.score')
  message('Significant RGC scores:')
  # print(means[means > quantiles[2]])
  df = data.frame(type = names(means), rgc.score = means)
  print(ggbarplot(df, 'type', 'rgc.score')+
    geom_hline(yintercept = quantiles[2], linetype = 'dashed')+
    RotatedAxis())
  
  return(object)
}

nmList$Chicken = CellClassScoring(nmList$Chicken)
nmList$Lizard = CellClassScoring(nmList$Lizard)
```

```{r}
no_lamprey = readRDS('../../HahnObjects/OTs/All_classes_nolamp_v3.rds') # 4560 genes
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=16}
fullObj = readRDS(paste0(hahn.path, 'OTs/All_classes_nolamp_v3.rds'))
DefaultAssay(fullObj) = 'RNA'
fullObj = UpperCase_genes(fullObj)
DimPlotLabeled(fullObj)
VlnPlot(fullObj, features = 'nFeature_RNA', group.by = 'seurat_clusters', pt.size = 0)
manual_annotation = list(Rod = c(4), 
                         Cone = c(1), 
                         BC = c(8,15,17,11,10), # off_bc = c(10,11), on_bc= c(15,17), rod_bc = c(8),
                         AC = c(6,9,14,16,18,5,19,13), #ach_AC = c(18), 
                         RGC = c(0),
                         MG = c(2), 
                         HC = c(3), 
                         Other = c(7, 12, 20))

# Check
fullObj = AssignAnnotations(fullObj, manual_annotation)
AnnotatedUmap(fullObj, major_annotation, color.clusters.by = 'lit_type', group.by = 'seurat_clusters')

# Remove low quality cells and doublets
fullObj.clean = subset(fullObj, lit_type == 'Other', invert = TRUE)
fullObj.clean$orig.ident = factor(factor(gsub('Tree_shrew', 'TreeShrew', fullObj.clean$orig.ident), levels = phylogenetic_order))
# plot_grid(
  # PrettyUmap2(fullObj.clean, group.by = 'orig.ident', show.legend = TRUE, label = FALSE, pt.size = 0.1), 
  AnnotatedUmap(fullObj.clean, major_annotation, color.clusters.by = 'lit_type', group.by = 'seurat_clusters', pretty.umap = TRUE, rel_widths = c(1,1.5))
  # rel_widths = c(1,1.8))

# Species are already well-represented
table(fullObj.clean$orig.ident)
table(fullObj.clean$lit_type)

de_conserved = TopNDEGs(DownsampleSeurat(fullObj.clean, group.by = 'lit_type', size = 3000), group.by = 'lit_type', n = 200)
# subset(de_conserved, cluster == 'RGC')
de_list = lapply(de_conserved %>% split(de_conserved$cluster), pull, 'gene')
DotPlot2(fullObj.clean, features = de_list$RGC, coord.flip = TRUE)
saveRDS(de_list, '../../Ortho_Objects/conserved.major.class.genes.list.200.rds')
```

Compute for all AC objects!

```{r}
de_list = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/conserved.major.class.genes.list.rds')
ac.list = mclapply(names(SPECIESFILES), function(species) readRDS(paste0("../../Species_Objects/", species, "AC_v6.rds")), mc.cores = 1)
names(ac.list) = names(SPECIESFILES)

rgc.score.list = lapply(seq_along(ac.list), function(i){
  species = names(ac.list)[[i]]
  object = ac.list[[i]]
  message('Working on ', species)

  # Some objects need gene symbols converted to human symbols
  if(species %in% c('MouseLemur', 'Rat', 'Chicken', 'Lizard')) object = ConvertGeneSymbols(object, mart = '../../Orthology/martMergeRefHuman_modified.rds', species = species)
  object$annotated = object$type
  object = CellClassScoring2(object, de_list, verbose = FALSE)
  MeanMetadata(object, 'annotated', 'RGC.score', as.df = TRUE)
})

names(rgc.score.list) = names(SPECIESFILES)
saveRDS(rgc.score.list, 'metadata/rgc.score.list.rds')
```

Transfer to OTs

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=9}
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')

# Check OT presence in species
tabulation = table(BIGSEURAT$species, BIGSEURAT$type)

objectList = SplitObject(BIGSEURAT, 'species')
X.list = lapply(objectList, function(object) {
  object$species_type2 = paste0(object$species, "-", object$species_type)
  as.matrix(ConfusionMatrix(object$type_no, object$species_type2, plot = FALSE, fill.na = NULL)) # Don't fill NAs with zero
})

# Dimensions
lapply(X.list, dim)

# Check that rows sum to 1
lapply(X.list, rowSums)

class.meta = readRDS('metadata/rgc.score.list.rds')
class.meta = lapply(seq_along(class.meta), function(i) {
  class.meta[[i]]$species_type2 = paste0(names(class.meta)[[i]], '-', class.meta[[i]]$annotated)
  class.meta[[i]]$RGC.score.scaled = min_max_norm(class.meta[[i]]$RGC.score)
  return(class.meta[[i]])
})
names(class.meta) = names(SPECIESFILES)

U.list = lapply(names(X.list), function(species){
  X = as.matrix(X.list[[species]])
  V = class.meta[[species]]$RGC.score.scaled[match(colnames(X), class.meta[[species]]$species_type2)]
  X %*% V
})

U = t(do.call(cbind, U.list))
rownames(U) = names(X.list)

# Be smart when making X matrix; only include if the orthotype is robustly observed in species k (>10 cells?). 
U[tabulation < 10] = NA
dendro = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.rds')
colnames(U) = Metadata(BIGSEURAT, 'type_no', 'type')$type
col_means = colMeans(U, na.rm = TRUE)
Heatmap(U, 
        name = 'RGC\nscore',
        cluster_rows = FALSE, 
        cluster_columns = dendro, 
        # column_dend_reorder = FALSE,
        col = c('white', 'red'),
        na_col = 'grey',
        row_names_side = 'left',
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(mean = anno_barplot(col_means, 
                         gp = gpar(fill = "blue", col = "black"), 
                         border = TRUE)),
        cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) { grid.text(sprintf("%.0f", tabulation[i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 4))})
```

```{r}
saveRDS(U, '../../Ortho_Objects/rgc-scores-for-ac.rds')
```

Statistics

```{r, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=7}
U = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/rgc-scores-for-ac.rds')
stats.df = data.frame(type = names(col_means), RGC.score.scaled = col_means)
stats.df$classification = Metadata(BIGSEURAT, 'type_no', 'classification')$classification
stats.df$displacement = ifelse(Metadata(BIGSEURAT, 'type_no', 'displaced')$displaced, 'displaced', 'not displaced')

# PrettyBoxplot2(stats.df, x = 'classification', y = 'RGC.score.scaled', color = 'classification')

min.value = min(stats.df$RGC.score.scaled)-0.05
max.value = max(stats.df$RGC.score.scaled)+0.05
library(ggsignif)
TitlePlot(PrettyBoxplot2(stats.df, x = "classification", y = "RGC.score.scaled", color = 'classification')+
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("GABA", "Gly")),map_signif_level = FALSE, colour = 'black') + 
    RotatedAxis(), 'Subclass') + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min.value,max.value)) | 
  TitlePlot(PrettyBoxplot2(stats.df, x = "displacement", y = "RGC.score.scaled", color = 'displacement')+
  stat_signif(comparisons = list(c("displaced", "not displaced")), test = 'wilcox.test', map_signif_level = FALSE, colour = 'black') + RotatedAxis() + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min.value,max.value)), 'Displacement') | 
  TitlePlot(PrettyBoxplot2(subset(stats.df, classification == 'GABA'), x = "displacement", y = "RGC.score.scaled", color = 'displacement')+ stat_signif(comparisons = list(c("displaced", "not displaced")), test = 'wilcox.test', map_signif_level = FALSE, colour = 'black') + RotatedAxis() + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min.value,max.value)), 'Displacement\n(only GABA)')
```

### RGC module scoring with BC/RGC controls

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=17}
# Make bc.ac.rgc.ortho object
ac.ortho = LoadACOrtho()
ac.ortho$type = factor(paste0('AC-', ac.ortho$type), levels = paste0('AC-', levels(ac.ortho$type)))
rgc.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateRGC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
rgc.ortho$type = factor(paste0('RGC-', rgc.ortho$NOG), levels = paste0('RGC-', levels(rgc.ortho$NOG)))
rgc.ortho$classification = 'RGC'
bc.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateBC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
bc.ortho$type = factor(bc.ortho$NOG, levels = levels(bc.ortho$NOG))
bc.ortho$classification = 'BC'

# species.use = intersect(ac.ortho$species, rgc.ortho$species)
bc.ac.rgc.ortho = merge(bc.ortho, c(ac.ortho, rgc.ortho))
table(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$classification)
table(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$orig.ident)
bc.ac.rgc.ortho$annotated = factor(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$type, levels = c(levels(bc.ortho$type), levels(ac.ortho$type), levels(rgc.ortho$type)))
table(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$annotated)
bc.ac.rgc.ortho$cell_class = ifelse(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$classification == 'BC', 'BC', 
                                    ifelse(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$classification == 'RGC', 'RGC', 'AC'))
table(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$cell_class)

# Load gene lists
de_list = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/conserved.major.class.genes.list.rds')
bc.ac.rgc.ortho = CellClassScoring2(bc.ac.rgc.ortho, de_list, verbose = FALSE)
bc.ac.rgc.ortho$species_annotated = paste0(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$species, '-', bc.ac.rgc.ortho$annotated)

# Gene-set permutation testing to find significance thresholds
n.rgc.score.permutations = 10
pdf('figures/gene-set-perm.pdf')
perm.res = lapply(seq_len(n.rgc.score.permutations), function(i) {
  control.module = FindControlGenes(bc.ac.rgc.ortho, de_list)
  scored.object = AddModuleScore(bc.ac.rgc.ortho, control.module, seed = i, ctrl = 1) # default of ctrl=100 leads to positive skew in scores 
  # scored.object = AddModuleScoreDebug(bc.ac.rgc.ortho, control.module, seed = i)
  print(VlnPlot(scored.object, features = paste0('Cluster', 1:7), group.by = 'annotated', stack = TRUE, flip = TRUE, same.y.lims = TRUE))
  
  # Group permutation fails because it contaminates our null with true signal
  # bc.ac.rgc.ortho$permuted = as.character(sample(bc.ac.rgc.ortho$species_annotated))
  meta = MeanMetadata(scored.object, 'species_annotated', 'Cluster6', as.df = TRUE) %>% mutate(permutation = i)
  print(PrettyHistogram(meta$Cluster6, vline = quantile(meta$Cluster6, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))))
  
  list(results = meta, module = control.module)
})
dev.off()

saveRDS(rgc.scores.df, '../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.scores.df.rds')
saveRDS(perm.res, '../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.score.perm.res.rds')
saveRDS(bc.ac.rgc.ortho, '../../Ortho_Objects/bc.ac.rgc.ortho.rds')
```

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=15}
DotPlot2(fullList$Zebrafish, features = c('rbpms2b', 'gad2', 'tfap2b'), group.by = 'annotated')
```

```{r}
features.use = c('GAD1', 'TFAP2B', 'RBPMS')
gene_dat = lapply(fullList, function(object) {
  print(object$species[[1]])
  if(object$species[[1]] == 'Zebrafish') features.use = c('gad2', 'tfap2b', 'rbpms2b')
  df = as.data.frame(t(object@assays$RNA@data[features.use,]))
  binary_dat = df
  binary_dat[binary_dat > 0] = 1
  colnames(binary_dat) = c('GAD1', 'TFAP2B', 'RBPMS')

  # Proportion of RBPMS+ cells expressing GAD
  gad_rbpms = addmargins(table(binary_dat$GAD1, binary_dat$RBPMS))[2,2]/addmargins(table(binary_dat$GAD1, binary_dat$RBPMS))[3,2]
  tfap_rbpms = addmargins(table(binary_dat$TFAP2B, binary_dat$RBPMS))[2,2]/addmargins(table(binary_dat$TFAP2B, binary_dat$RBPMS))[3,2]
  gadtfap_rbpms = addmargins(table(binary_dat$TFAP2B & binary_dat$GAD1, binary_dat$RBPMS))[2,2] / 
    addmargins(table(binary_dat$TFAP2B & binary_dat$GAD1, binary_dat$RBPMS))[3,2]
  
  return(list(gad_rbpms = gad_rbpms, tfap_rbpms = tfap_rbpms, gadtfap_rbpms = gadtfap_rbpms))
})

gene_dat
```

## Cell class classification

```{r}
set.seed(1)
TrainTestClass = function(object, nfeatures = 2000){
  # Compute variable features and scale for model
  object = FindVariableFeatures(object, nfeatures = nfeatures)
  object = ScaleData(object)
  object.train = GetTrainingSet(object, group.by = 'annotated')
  object.test = subset(object, cells = Cells(object.train), invert = TRUE)
  
  # Predicting type gets 94.2% accuracy
  # type.model = XGBoost_train2(object.train, object.test, predict.by = 'annotated')
  
  # Predicting class gets 99% accuracy
  class.model = XGBoost_train2(object.train, object.test, predict.by = 'cell_class')
  object.test$xgb.labels = PredictLabels(object.test, class.model)
  
  # ConfusionMatrix(object.test$cell_class, object.test$xgb.labels)
  plotConfusionMatrix(table(object.test$cell_class, object.test$xgb.labels))
  return(ConfusionMatrix(object.test$annotated, object.test$xgb.labels, row.norm = TRUE) + coord_flip())
}
```

### All species, 100 features

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=18}
plotlist = lapply(c('Lamprey', 'Zebrafish', 'Chicken', 'Lizard'), function(species) TitlePlot(TrainTestClass(nmList[[species]], nfeatures = 100), species))

ggarrange(plotlist = plotlist, common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right', nrow = 2, ncol = 2)
```

```{r, fig.height=14.5, fig.width=8}
control$cell_class[control$annotated == 'AC-25'] = 'PR'
control$cell_class[control$annotated == 'BC-17'] = 'RGC'
control$cell_class[control$annotated == 'RGC-5'] = 'AC'

p1 = TrainTestClass(control, nfeatures = 1000)
p2 = TrainTestClass(control, nfeatures = 100)
p3 = TrainTestClass(control, nfeatures = 10)

ggarrange(p1, p2, p3, common.legend = TRUE, legend = 'right', nrow = 3)
```

## Seurat integration

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
pm2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/pm2ch.rds')
ze2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/ze2ch.rds')
li2ch = readRDS('../cones/orthology_graphs/li2ch.rds')
```

Cell classes integrate nicely

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
ortho = OrthotypeAnalysis2(nmList$Chicken, 
                           nmList[c("Zebrafish", "Lizard")], list(ze2ch, li2ch),
                           group.by = 'cell_class',
                           downsample = 100)

theme_umap(DimPlot(ortho, group.by = "species", shuffle = TRUE), remove.axes = FALSE) | theme_umap(DimPlot(ortho, group.by = "cell_class", label = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE), remove.axes = FALSE) + NoLegend()
# OrthotypeHeatmaps2(ortho)
```

Types integrate nicely

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
ortho.annotated = OrthotypeAnalysis2(nmList$Chicken, 
                           nmList[c("Zebrafish", "Lizard")], list(ze2ch, li2ch),
                           group.by = 'annotated',
                           downsample = 100)

theme_umap(DimPlot(ortho.annotated, group.by = "species", shuffle = TRUE), remove.axes = FALSE) | theme_umap(DimPlot(ortho.annotated, group.by = "cell_class", label = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE), remove.axes = FALSE) + NoLegend()

DefaultAssay(ortho.annotated) = 'integrated'
ortho.annotated = FindClusters(ortho.annotated, resolution = 0.1)
DimPlotLabeled(ortho.annotated)
ortho.annotated$species = factor(ortho.annotated$species, levels = c('Zebrafish', 'Chicken', 'Lizard'))
SplitJaccardMatrix(ortho.annotated, group.by = 'species', ident.1 = 'seurat_clusters', ident.2 = 'cell_class', row.order = (1:nClusters(ortho.annotated))-1, stagger.threshold = 0.2)

# ortho.annotated = AssignAnnotations(ortho.annotated, list(AC = c(0,4,6,7,9,11), BC = c(1,10), RGC = c(2), PR = 3, HC = 5, MG = 8))
ortho.annotated$lit_type = MatchClusters(ortho.annotated$seurat_clusters, ortho.annotated$cell_class)
ortho.annotated = AssignName(ortho.annotated)
DimPlotLabeled(ortho.annotated, 'lit_type')
SplitJaccardMatrix(ortho.annotated, group.by = 'species', ident.1 = 'type', ident.2 = 'cell_class', row.order = Metadata(ortho.annotated, 'lit_type', 'type')$type, stagger.threshold = 0.2)

saveRDS(ortho.annotated, '../../Ortho_Objects/nonmammal-class-seurat-ortho-zechli.rds')
```

### Cross-species cell class classification

Unfortunately, training to classify cell class in one species, and testing in other species does not work well (30% accuracy using RNA assay and 65% using integrated assay)

```{r}
ortho.annotated = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/nonmammal-class-seurat-ortho.rds')

# Scale normalized counts (not integrated counts)
DefaultAssay(ortho.annotated) = 'RNA'
ortho.annotated = ScaleData(ortho.annotated, features = rownames(ortho.annotated))

speciesSubset = subset(ortho.annotated, species == 'Zebrafish')
object.train = GetTrainingSet(speciesSubset, group.by = 'annotated')
object.test = subset(speciesSubset, cells = Cells(object.train), invert = TRUE)

# Train on x, test on x
class.model = XGBoost_train2(object.train, object.test, predict.by = 'cell_class')
object.test$xgb.labels = PredictLabels(object.test, class.model)
# plotConfusionMatrix(table(object.test$cell_class, object.test$xgb.labels))
ConfusionMatrix(object.test$annotated, object.test$xgb.labels, row.norm = TRUE) + coord_flip()

# Train on x, test on y
object.train = subset(ortho.annotated, species == 'Zebrafish')
object.test = subset(ortho.annotated, species == 'Chicken')
class.model = XGBoost_train2(object.train, object.test, predict.by = 'cell_class')

DefaultAssay(ortho.annotated) = 'integrated'
object.train = subset(ortho.annotated, species == 'Zebrafish')
object.test = subset(ortho.annotated, species == 'Chicken')
class.model = XGBoost_train2(object.train, object.test, predict.by = 'cell_class', assay = 'integrated')
```


```{r}
object = FindVariableFeatures(object, nfeatures = nfeatures)
object = ScaleData(object)
object.train = GetTrainingSet(object, group.by = 'annotated')
object.test = subset(object, cells = Cells(object.train), invert = TRUE)

# Predicting type gets 94.2% accuracy
# type.model = XGBoost_train2(object.train, object.test, predict.by = 'annotated')

# Predicting class gets 99% accuracy
class.model = XGBoost_train2(object.train, object.test, predict.by = 'cell_class')
object.test$xgb.labels = PredictLabels(object.test, class.model)

# ConfusionMatrix(object.test$cell_class, object.test$xgb.labels)
plotConfusionMatrix(table(object.test$cell_class, object.test$xgb.labels))
return(ConfusionMatrix(object.test$annotated, object.test$xgb.labels, row.norm = TRUE) + coord_flip())
```

li RGC 18 might have contamination

#### 1-nearest species neighbor classification

```{r, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=12}
samap_alignment = (read.csv("samap/nonmammals-class-mappingtable_v2.csv", row.names = 1))
species = str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,1]
types = str_split_fixed(str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,2], '-', 2)[,1]
idents = str_split_fixed(str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,2], '-', 2)[,2]
smatrix = SmartMatrix(as.matrix(samap_alignment), row.data = data.frame(species, types, idents), col.data = data.frame(species, types, idents))
smatrix

# For each lamprey cluster, find its nearest neighbor in each species
matrix.list = list(Zebrafish = smatrix[smatrix@row.data$species == 'pm', smatrix@row.data$species == 'ze'], 
                   Chicken = smatrix[smatrix@row.data$species == 'pm', smatrix@row.data$species == 'ch'],
                   Lizard = smatrix[smatrix@row.data$species == 'pm', smatrix@row.data$species == 'li'])

nn.res = do.call(cbind, lapply(matrix.list, function(smat) apply(smat@matrix, 1, function(x) smat@col.data$type[which.max(x)])))
nn.res

tabulation = do.call(gtools::smartbind, apply(nn.res, 1, function(x) t(as.data.frame.vector(table(x)))))
tabulation[is.na(tabulation)] = 0
melted = reshape2::melt(as.matrix(tabulation)) %>% setNames(c('Cluster', 'Prediction', 'nSpecies'))

max.value = 3; col.high = "#584B9FFF"; col.low = 'white'; legend_name = '# species';

melted = subset(melted, Cluster %in% paste0('pm_', objectList$Lamprey$annotated))
melted$Cluster = factor(melted$Cluster, levels = paste0('pm_', levels(objectList$Lamprey$annotated)))
melted$Prediction = factor(melted$Prediction, levels = c('PR', 'BC', 'HC', 'glyAC', 'gabaAC', 'ngngAC', 'RGC', 'MG'))
ggplot(melted, aes(x = Cluster, y = Prediction))+
    geom_point(aes(colour = nSpecies,  size=nSpecies))+
    scale_color_gradient(legend_name, low=col.low, high = col.high, limits=c(0, max.value), na.value = 'grey') +
    scale_radius(legend_name, limits=c(0, max.value)) +
    # scale_size(range = c(1, max.size), limits = c(0, max.perc))+
    theme_bw() +
    RotatedAxis() +
    # ylab('True')+
    # xlab('Predicted')+
    theme(axis.title = element_text(color = 'black'), 
          axis.text = element_text(color = 'black'),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# ggsave('figures/lamprey-1NN-predictions.pdf', height=3.5, width=12)
```

### Query nearest neighbors

```{r}
samap_alignment = read.csv("samap/nonmammals-class-mappingtable_v2.csv", row.names = 1)
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['ze_gabaAC-0_SAC']
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['ze_glyAC-18']
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['ze_gabaAC-39']
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['li_gabaAC-28']
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['pm_RGC-29']
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['li_RGC-18'] # likely has AC contamination

# Maps to glycinergic AC (ROBO3 OT)
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['pm_RGC-17']

# Maps to glycinergic AC (ROBO3 OT)
find_nearest_neighbors(as.matrix(samap_alignment), n = 10, threshold = 0.1)['pm_RGC-17']
```

#### Average alignment table

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
samap_alignment = (read.csv("samap/nonmammals-class-mappingtable_v2.csv", row.names = 1))
species = str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,1]
types = str_split_fixed(str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,2], '-', 2)[,1]
idents = str_split_fixed(str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,2], '-', 2)[,2]
smatrix = SmartMatrix(as.matrix(samap_alignment), row.data = data.frame(species, types, idents), col.data = data.frame(species, types, idents))
smatrix

# Average by species-class

# Convert matrix to data frame
df <- smatrix@matrix

# Apply aggregate to compute column means by group
averaged_df <- aggregate(. ~ group, data = data.frame(df, group = paste0(smatrix@row.data$species, '_', smatrix@row.data$types)), FUN = mean)

# Transpose back to match the matrix structure
averaged_matrix <- averaged_df[, -1]  # Remove 'group' column

print(averaged_matrix)

# Average by column
averaged_df2 <- aggregate(. ~ group, data = data.frame(t(averaged_matrix), group = paste0(smatrix@col.data$species, '_', smatrix@col.data$types)), FUN = mean)

# Transpose back to match the matrix structure
# averaged_matrix2 <- as.data.frame(averaged_df2  # Remove 'group' column
ids = averaged_df2$group
averaged_matrix2 = as.matrix(averaged_df2[,-1])
rownames(averaged_matrix2) = ids
colnames(averaged_matrix2) = ids
print(averaged_matrix2)

species = str_split_fixed(rownames(averaged_matrix2), "_", 2)[,1]
types = str_split_fixed(rownames(averaged_matrix2), "_", 2)[,2]
smatrix = SmartMatrix(averaged_matrix2, row.data = data.frame(species, types), col.data = data.frame(species, types))
smatrix = smatrix[order(smatrix@row.data$types),order(smatrix@row.data$types)]
smatrix

SAMapAlignmentHeatmap2(smatrix@matrix, major_annotation_palette, species_palette2, 
                       # width = unit(19, "in"), height = unit(19, "in"), 
                       show_annotation_legend = TRUE, 
                       show_row_names = TRUE, 
                       show_column_names = TRUE,
                       cols = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.02, 0.05), c("white", "red", "darkred")),
                       species.use = c('pm', 'ze', 'ch', 'li'))
```

Ideas:
* UMAP shows proper alignment of other cell classes with mixing of lamprey RGCs with GABAergic ACs from other species (inset)
* MDS of SAMap matrix 
* Alignment scores; most lamprey RGCs align to gabaACs and not glyACs
* Nearest neighbor annotation of clusters (weighted average of neighbor classifications)
* Number of GABAergic RGCs across species (many in lamprey, do they decrease?)
    * this did not work

next iteration: make SAC and remove nGnG/dual

### SAMap UMAP

```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=7}
samap = fread('samap/pmzechli_nonmammal_class_seed_0_leiden_4.0.csv')[,-1] %>% setNames(c('UMAP_1', 'UMAP_2', 'annotated', 'species', 'cell', 'cell_class', 'leiden_clusters'))
samap$cell = sub("-[^-]+$", "", samap$cell)
samap$leiden_clusters = factor(samap$leiden_clusters)
samap$species = convert_values(samap$species, data.frame(old.names = c('ch', 'li', 'pm', 'ze'), 
                                                         new.names = c('Chicken', 'Lizard', 'Lamprey', 'Zebrafish')))
# samap$oACs = BIGSEURAT$type[match(samap$cell, str_split_fixed(Cells(BIGSEURAT), '_', 2)[,2])]

# plot_grid(PrettyUmap2(samap, group.by = 'leiden_clusters', min.segment.length = 0.05, pt.size = 0.01), 
#           PrettyUmap2(samap, group.by = 'species', min.segment.length = 0.05, pt.size = 0.01, label = FALSE, show.legend = TRUE), 
#           PrettyUmap2(samap, group.by = 'cell_class', min.segment.length = 0.05, pt.size = 0.01), 
#           nrow = 1)

PrettyUmap2(samap, group.by = 'species', min.segment.length = 0.05, pt.size = 0.01, label = FALSE, show.legend = TRUE, cols = species_palette, alpha = 0.2) | 
  PrettyUmap2(samap, group.by = 'cell_class', min.segment.length = 0.05, pt.size = 0.01, cols = major_annotation_palette, alpha = 0.2)

ggsave('figures/nonmammal-class-umap.pdf', height=3, width=7)
```

### SAMap scores for lamprey clusters

```{r}
samap_alignment = (read.csv("samap/nonmammals-class-mappingtable_v1.csv", row.names = 1))
species = str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,1]
types = str_split_fixed(str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,2], '-', 2)[,1]
idents = str_split_fixed(str_split_fixed(rownames(samap_alignment), "_", 2)[,2], '-', 2)[,2]
# samap_alignment

# For each lamprey cluster in the column, get the annotation of the best row
# knitr::kable(data.frame(actual = types, samap.predicted = apply(samap_alignment[species %in% c('ze', 'ch', 'li'),species %in% c('ze', 'ch', 'li')], 1, function(x) types[which.max(x)])))
```


```{r}
sm.cutoff = 0.1
smatrix = SmartMatrix(as.matrix(samap_alignment), row.data = data.frame(species, types, idents), col.data = data.frame(species, types, idents))
# smatrix[c('pm_AC-0', 'pm_AC-1'),c('pm_AC.0', 'pm_AC.1')]
# smatrix[1:5,1:5]

control_smatrix = smatrix[smatrix@row.data$species %in% c('ze', 'ch', 'li'),smatrix@col.data$species %in% c('ze', 'ch', 'li')]
control_df = data.frame(actual = control_smatrix@row.data$types, samap.predicted = apply(control_smatrix@matrix, 1, function(x) control_smatrix@row.data$types[which.max(x)]))
control_df$agree = control_df$actual == control_df$samap.predicted
knitr::kable(control_df)

# For each lamprey cluster in the column, get the annotation of the best row
lamprey_smatrix = smatrix[smatrix@row.data$species %in% c('pm'),smatrix@col.data$species %in% c('ze', 'ch', 'li')]
lamprey_df = data.frame(actual = lamprey_smatrix@row.data$types, 
                        samap.predicted = apply(lamprey_smatrix@matrix, 1, function(x) lamprey_smatrix@col.data$types[which.max(x)]), 
                        samap.score = apply(lamprey_smatrix@matrix, 1, function(x) max(x)))
# lamprey_df$agree = lamprey_df$actual == lamprey_df$samap.predicted
knitr::kable(lamprey_df)

## Can add standard deviations eventually
```

Check:
* ze_AC-38 truly interesting
* li_PR-13 removed low quality 
* li_BC-9 removed low quality

pm_RGC-13 -> BC
pm_RGC-15 -> RGC (likely the only one!)
pm_RGC-29,37, -> AC
pm_AC-8,11 -> BC

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=15}
     Other = c(23, 5, 18, 12, 20, 21, 34),

     HC = c(15, 22)
```

```{r}
BC = readRDS("../../../storage/vertebrateBC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
BC$species = factor(BC$species, levels = phylogenetic_order[phylogenetic_order %in% unique(BC$species)])
```


Low to no expression in chicken, lizard, zebrafish A2s

Low expression in all A2s, but slightly higher in chicken and lizard

```{r}
chickenBC = readRDS('../../../storage/HahnObjects/BCs/ChickenBC_v1.rds')
FeaturePlot(chickenBC, 'ISL1')
chickenBC$annotated = factor(gsub('BP-', '', chickenBC$annotated), levels = c(3, 9, 22, 4, 14, 18, 19, 13, 21, 1, 10, 2, 5, 8, 6, 7, 12, 11, 15, 20, 16, 17))
chickenBC$subclass = ifelse(chickenBC$annotated %in% c(3, 9, 22, 4, 14, 18, 19, 13, 21, 1, 10), 'ON', 'OFF')
DotPlot2(chickenBC, group.by = 'annotated', features = connexins)
```

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
mouseAC = readRDS('../../Species_Reference/MouseACref_v4.rds')
macaque = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/Macaque_initial.rds')
macaqueAC = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/MacaqueAC_v6.rds')

DimPlot(mouse, group.by = 'cell_class', label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
DimPlot(mouseAC, group.by = 'seurat_clusters', label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
DimPlot(macaque, group.by = 'cell_class', label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
DimPlot(macaqueAC, group.by = 'seurat_clusters', label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
```

```{r, fig.height=20, fig.width=10}

gene_list = list()
gene_list$exp1 = c('NXPH1', 'SLC17A8', 'SLC32A1')
gene_list$exp2 = c('MAF', 'GAD1', 'SLC32A1')
gene_list$exp3 = c('TRHDE', 'SLC6A9', 'SLC32A1')
gene_list$exp4 = c('SLC35D3', 'CARTPT', 'SLC32A1')

# Experiment 1
FeaturePlot(mouse, features = gene_list$exp1, ncol = 1, order = TRUE)

# Experiment 2
FeaturePlot(mouse, features = gene_list$exp2, ncol = 1, order = TRUE)

# Experiment 3
FeaturePlot(mouse, features = gene_list$exp3, ncol = 1, order = TRUE)

# Experiment 4
FeaturePlot(mouse, features = gene_list$exp4, ncol = 1, order = FALSE)
```

### PDGFRA substitutes in primate

fGa2 = pGa9 = mac type 10 (1 base) = PDGFRA type

CBLN1 and EPHA3 are promising alternatives

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
ac.ortho = LoadACOrtho()
geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'PDGFRA')
geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'GJC1')
geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'PIEZO2')
geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'EPHA3')
geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'CBLN1')
geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'PRKCA')

JSHeatmap2(subset(ac.ortho, species == 'Macaque')$type, subset(ac.ortho, species == 'Macaque')$species_type)

top_de = TopNDEGs(ac.ortho, group.by = 'type', n = 50)
subset(top_de, cluster == '21_PDGFRA')
```



```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=15}
macaqueAC = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/MacaqueAC_v6.rds')
DotPlot2(macaqueAC, features = c('PDGFRA', 'GJC1', 'EPHA3', 'CBLN1'), group.by = 'annotated')
VlnPlot(macaqueAC, features = c('EPHA3'), group.by = 'type', split.by = 'region')
VlnPlot(macaqueAC, features = c('CBLN1'), group.by = 'type', split.by = 'region')
VlnPlot(macaqueAC, features = c('PDGFRA'), group.by = 'type', split.by = 'region')

ClusterFeaturePlot(macaqueAC, group.by = 'type', features = 'EPHA3')

macaque = readRDS('../../Full_Objects/Macaque_full_v2.rds')
DotPlot3(macaque, features = c('EPHA3', 'CBLN1', 'EPHA6'), group.by = 'annotated')

geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'EPHA3')
geneDotPlotFast(ac.ortho, 'CBLN1')
```


```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
JSHeatmap2(macaqueAC$annotated, macaqueAC$type)

top_de = TopNDEGs(macaqueAC, group.by = 'type', n = 50)

# Best alternative is CBLN1
DotPlot2(macaqueAC, features = head(subset(top_de, cluster == '34_VG3')$gene, 30), group.by = 'type')
DotPlot2(macaqueAC, features = head(subset(top_de, cluster == '9')$gene, 30), group.by = 'type')

# Good news is that they are among the most abundant AC type in macaque (about 8%)
CelltypeProportionBarplot(subset(macaqueAC, enrichment == "NONE"), x = 'type', y = 'animal') + RotatedAxis()

# Indeed it is expressed in human
humanAC = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/HumanAC_v6.rds')
DotPlot2(humanAC, features = c('PDGFRA', 'GJC1'), group.by = 'type')
```

# Export to python

```{r}
library(SeuratDisk)
bc.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateBC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
ac.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
rgc.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateRGC_BIGSEURAT.rds')

SeuratToH5ad2(bc.ortho, filepath = '../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateBC_BIGSEURAT.h5ad')
SeuratToH5ad2(ac.ortho, filepath = '../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.h5ad')
SeuratToH5ad2(rgc.ortho, filepath = '../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateRGC_BIGSEURAT.h5ad')
```

## Proportion correction

### AC all

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# Read in OT object
vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
vertebrateAC$species_cluster = as.numeric(vertebrateAC$species_cluster)

objectList = mclapply(speciesList, function(species) readRDS(paste0("../../Species_Objects/", species, "AC_v6.rds")), mc.cores = 1)
names(objectList) = speciesList

# Remove lizard HCs
objectList$Lizard = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/LizardAC_no_HCs_v6.rds')
objectList$Lizard$seurat_clusters = factor(objectList$Lizard$seurat_clusters)
saveRDS(objectList$Lizard, '../../Species_Objects/LizardAC_no_HCs_v6.rds')
```


```{r, eval = FALSE, fig.width=10}
# Calculate Xs
Xs = lapply(seq_along(speciesList), function(i) {
  this.species = speciesList[[i]]
  object = subset(vertebrateAC, species == this.species)
  ConfusionMatrix(object$seurat_clusters, object$species_cluster, row.norm = FALSE, plot = FALSE) # column-normalized (each type sums to 1)
  # return(raw_table/colSums(raw_table))
  # return(t(t(raw_table)/colSums(raw_table)))
  # return(raw_table/rowSums(raw_table))
})

# Calculate fs for only species included in OT analysis
fs = lapply(objectList, function(object) t(t(table(object$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(object$seurat_clusters)))))

# Check that proportions sum to 1
lapply(Xs, colSums)
sapply(fs, sum)

# Check that dimensions match
all(sapply(Xs, ncol) == as.vector(sapply(fs, nrow))) # were not matching bc two clusters were removed from lizard

# Compute frequency of each OT
P = t(do.call(cbind, lapply(seq_along(Xs), function(index) {
  # Check that the clusters match
  stopifnot(all(colnames(Xs[[index]]) == rownames(fs[[index]])))
  as.matrix(Xs[[index]]) %*% fs[[index]]
  })))
rownames(P) = speciesList
rowSums(P)

dendro = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.rds')
colnames(P) = Metadata(vertebrateAC, 'type_no', 'type')$type
col_means = colMeans(P, na.rm = TRUE)
BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
tabulation = table(BIGSEURAT$species, BIGSEURAT$type_no)
# P[tabulation < 10] = NA
Heatmap(P, 
        name = 'Proportion',
        cluster_rows = FALSE, 
        cluster_columns = dendro,
        # column_dend_reorder = FALSE,
        col = c('white', 'red'),
        na_col = 'grey',
        row_names_side = 'left',
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(mean = anno_barplot(col_means, 
                         gp = gpar(fill = "blue", col = "black"), 
                         border = TRUE)),
        cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) { grid.text(sprintf("%.0f", tabulation[i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 4))})

# Bar plot
# PrettyBoxplot2(reshape2::melt(P), x = 'Var2', y = 'value', color = 'Var1') + RotatedAxis()

ac.prop.summary = reshape2::melt(P) %>% setNames(c('Species', 'OrthoType', 'Proportion'))
ggplot(ac.prop.summary, aes(x = reorder(OrthoType, Proportion, FUN = median, decreasing = TRUE), y = Proportion))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linetype = "dashed")+
  stat_boxplot(aes(ymin = after_stat(lower), ymax = after_stat(upper)), outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymin = ..ymax..), width = 0.5) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymax = ..ymin..), width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = Species), color = 'black', shape = 21, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey", size = 0.5))+
  xlab(NULL)+
  ylab("Transferred proportion")+
  scale_color_discrete("Species")+
  RotatedAxis()

saveRDS(P, '../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds')
```

Ferret SEG

```{r}
# Check marmoset 29_SLC35D3
names(Xs) = speciesList
Xs$Marmoset[29,] # 0,11
sum(Xs$Marmoset[29,])

as.matrix(Xs$Marmoset[29,]) %*% fs$Marmoset

# 0 is very large cluster in marmoset, try samples without enrichment
marmoset.df = data.frame(cluster = 0:31, 
                         including_enriched = as.vector(table(objectList$Marmoset$seurat_clusters)), 
                         excluding_enriched = as.vector(table(subset(objectList$Marmoset, enrichment == 'NONE')$seurat_clusters)))
marmoset.df$including_enrichedP = marmoset.df$including_enriched/sum(marmoset.df$including_enriched)
marmoset.df$excluding_enrichedP = marmoset.df$excluding_enriched/sum(marmoset.df$excluding_enriched)
marmoset.df$diff = marmoset.df$including_enrichedP-marmoset.df$excluding_enrichedP
marmoset.df

# How many species have 1000+ unenriched cells? 
enrichment.tabulation = do.call(rbind, lapply(objectList, function(object){
  object$enrichment = factor(object$enrichment, levels = c("CD90+", "CD73-", "NEUN+", "NEUN-", "CHX10+", "NEUN-\nCHX10-", "NEUN-\nCHX10+", "NEUN+\nCHX10-", "CHX10-\nCD73-\nCD133-", "NONE"))
  table(object$enrichment)
}))
enrichment.tabulation
write.csv(enrichment.tabulation, '../../Ortho_Objects/enrichment.tabulation.csv')

species.unenriched = names(which(apply(enrichment.tabulation, 1, function(x) if(x["CD73-"] + x["NONE"] > 1000) TRUE else FALSE)))
species.unenriched
```

### AC unenriched

```{r, eval = FALSE, fig.width=10}
objectList.unenriched = objectList[species.unenriched]

# Calculate Xs
Xs = lapply(species.unenriched, function(this.species) {
  object = subset(vertebrateAC, species == this.species)
  ConfusionMatrix(object$seurat_clusters, object$species_cluster, row.norm = FALSE, plot = FALSE) # column-normalized (each type sums to 1)
})

# Calculate fs for only species included in OT analysis
fs = lapply(objectList.unenriched, function(object) {
  message(object$species[[1]])
  cells.use = WhichCells(object, expr = enrichment %in% c('NONE', 'CD73-'))
  # if(length(cells.use) > 1000){
  object = object[,cells.use]
  t(t(table(object$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(object$seurat_clusters))))
  # } 
})

# Check that proportions sum to 1
lapply(Xs, colSums)
sapply(fs, sum)

# Check that dimensions match
sapply(Xs, ncol)
as.vector(sapply(fs, nrow))
all(sapply(Xs, ncol) == as.vector(sapply(fs, nrow))) # were not matching bc two clusters were removed from lizard

# Compute frequency of each OT
P = t(do.call(cbind, lapply(seq_along(Xs), function(index) {
  # Check that the clusters match
  stopifnot(all(colnames(Xs[[index]]) == rownames(fs[[index]])))
  as.matrix(Xs[[index]]) %*% fs[[index]]
  })))
rownames(P) = species.unenriched
rowSums(P)

dendro = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.rds')
colnames(P) = Metadata(vertebrateAC, 'type_no', 'type')$type
col_means = colMeans(P, na.rm = TRUE)
# BIGSEURAT = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
# tabulation = table(BIGSEURAT$species, BIGSEURAT$type_no)
# P[tabulation < 10] = NA
Heatmap(P, 
        name = 'Proportion',
        cluster_rows = FALSE, 
        cluster_columns = dendro,
        # column_dend_reorder = FALSE, 
        col = c('white', 'red'),
        na_col = 'grey',
        row_names_side = 'left',
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(mean = anno_barplot(col_means, 
                         gp = gpar(fill = "blue", col = "black"), 
                         border = TRUE)),
        cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) { grid.text(sprintf("%.0f", tabulation[species.unenriched,][i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 4))})

P

# Bar plot
# PrettyBoxplot2(reshape2::melt(P), x = 'Var2', y = 'value', color = 'Var1') + RotatedAxis()

ac.prop.summary = reshape2::melt(P) %>% setNames(c('Species', 'OrthoType', 'Proportion'))
ggplot(ac.prop.summary, aes(x = reorder(OrthoType, Proportion, FUN = median, decreasing = TRUE), y = Proportion))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linetype = "dashed")+
  stat_boxplot(aes(ymin = after_stat(lower), ymax = after_stat(upper)), outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymin = ..ymax..), width = 0.5) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymax = ..ymin..), width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = Species), color = 'black', shape = 21, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey", size = 0.5))+
  xlab(NULL)+
  ylab("Transferred frequency")+
  scale_color_discrete("Species")+
  RotatedAxis()

saveRDS(P, '../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')
```

How different are they? 

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}
ac.all = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds')
ac.unenriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')

dim(ac.all)
dim(ac.unenriched)

ac.all.subset = ac.all[rownames(ac.unenriched),]
dim(ac.all.subset)

ac.prop.comparison = cbind(reshape2::melt(ac.all.subset), reshape2::melt(ac.unenriched)$value) %>% setNames(c('species', 'type', 'all', 'unenriched'))
ac.prop.comparison$label = paste0(substr(ac.prop.comparison$species, 0,3), '-', ac.prop.comparison$type)
head(ac.prop.comparison)

ScatterPlot(ac.prop.comparison, 'all', 'unenriched', labels = 'label', max.overlaps = 10, cor.position = c('bottom', 'right'))

summary_df <- ac.prop.comparison %>%
  group_by(type) %>%
  summarise(
    y_mean = mean(unenriched),
    y_sd = sd(unenriched),
    ymin = y_mean - y_sd,  # Lower error bar
    ymax = y_mean + y_sd,   # Upper error bar
    x_mean = mean(all),
    x_sd = sd(all),
    xmin = x_mean - x_sd,  # Lower error bar
    xmax = x_mean + x_sd   # Upper error bar
  )

ggscatter(summary_df, x = "x_mean", y = "y_mean", label = 'type')+
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + 
  labs(x = 'all', y = 'unenriched')
  # geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), width = 0.1) +  # Vertical error bars
  # geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax), height = 0.1)  # Horizontal error bars

# Add enrichment type and exp
ac.prop.comparison
```

Which species are truly affected

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=8}
# Human test: enrichment def did something
human.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/HumanAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(human.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')

ts.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/TreeShrewAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(ts.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')

# Can pig be salvaged? Doesn't seem like it
pig.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/PigAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(pig.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')

# Can ferret be salvaged? just use NONE as CD73- does not match
ferret.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/FerretAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(ferret.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')

# Can rat be salvaged?
rat.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/RatAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(rat.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')
VlnPlot(rat.ac, features = 'RBFOX3')

# Did mouse lemur work; yes
ml.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/MouseLemurAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(ml.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')

# Can cow be salvaged; cow none is usable but no cow RGCs sadly
cow.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/CowAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(cow.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')

# Can opossum neun- be salvaged
op.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/OpossumAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(op.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment') # no; no starburst amacrine cells in NEUN-
ConfusionMatrix(op.ac$type, factor(op.ac$enrichment), plot = FALSE, row.norm = FALSE)
```


```{r, fig.height=3, fig.width=12}
# Does NEUN+ plus NEUN- in equal numbers = NONE? 
names(which(apply(enrichment.tabulation, 1, function(x) if(x["NEUN+"] > 300 & x["NEUN-"] > 300 & x["NONE"] > 300) TRUE else FALSE)))

human.ac = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/HumanAC_v6.rds')
stackedBarGraph2(human.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')

# Does some combination of NEUN+ and NEUN- = NONE?
# human.prop = na.omit(stackedBarGraph2(human.ac, y = 'type', x = 'enrichment')$data)

human.prop = ConfusionMatrix(human.ac$type, factor(human.ac$enrichment), plot = FALSE, row.norm = FALSE) %>% setNames(c('NEUNp', 'NEUNn', 'NONE'))
model <- lm(NONE ~ `NEUNp` + `NEUNn`, data = human.prop)
summary(model)
human.prop$predicted = predict(model)
ScatterPlot(human.prop, 'NEUNp', 'NEUNn') | ScatterPlot(human.prop, 'NEUNp', 'NONE') | 
  ScatterPlot(human.prop, 'NEUNn', 'NONE') | ScatterPlot(human.prop, 'predicted', 'NONE') 

rat.prop = ConfusionMatrix(rat.ac$type, factor(rat.ac$enrichment), plot = FALSE, row.norm = FALSE) %>% setNames(c('NEUNp', 'NEUNn', 'CHX10p', 'NONE'))
model <- lm(NONE ~ `NEUNp` + `NEUNn`, data = rat.prop)
summary(model)
rat.prop$predicted = predict(model)
ScatterPlot(rat.prop, 'NEUNp', 'NEUNn') | ScatterPlot(rat.prop, 'NEUNp', 'NONE') | 
  ScatterPlot(rat.prop, 'NEUNn', 'NONE') | ScatterPlot(rat.prop, 'predicted', 'NONE')

op.prop = ConfusionMatrix(op.ac$type, factor(op.ac$enrichment), plot = FALSE, row.norm = FALSE) %>% setNames(c('NEUNp', 'NEUNn'))
ScatterPlot(op.prop, 'NEUNp', 'NEUNn')
```

### AC NEUN-enriched

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# Find species with many NEUN-batches
enrichment.tabulation = read.csv('../../Ortho_Objects/enrichment.tabulation.csv', row.names = 1)
enrichment.tabulation
species.use = names(which(apply(enrichment.tabulation, 1, function(x) if(x["NEUN."] > 1000) TRUE else FALSE)))
species.use

# Read in OT object
vertebrateAC = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_BIGSEURAT.rds")
vertebrateAC$species_cluster = as.numeric(vertebrateAC$species_cluster)

# Grab species objects
objectList.unenriched = mclapply(species.use, function(species) readRDS(paste0("../../Species_Objects/", species, "AC_v6.rds")), mc.cores = 1)
names(objectList.unenriched) = species.use

# Remove lizard HCs
objectList.unenriched$Lizard = readRDS('../../Species_Objects/LizardAC_no_HCs_v6.rds')
objectList.unenriched$Lizard$seurat_clusters = factor(objectList.unenriched$Lizard$seurat_clusters)
```

```{r, eval = FALSE, fig.width=10}
# Calculate Xs
Xs = lapply(species.use, function(this.species) {
  object = subset(vertebrateAC, species == this.species)
  ConfusionMatrix(object$seurat_clusters, object$species_cluster, row.norm = FALSE, plot = FALSE) # column-normalized (each type sums to 1)
})

# Calculate fs for only species included in OT analysis
fs = lapply(objectList.unenriched, function(object) {
  message(object$species[[1]])
  cells.use = WhichCells(object, expr = enrichment %in% c('NEUN+'))
  # if(length(cells.use) > 1000){
  object = object[,cells.use]
  t(t(table(object$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(object$seurat_clusters))))
  # } 
})

# Check that proportions sum to 1
lapply(Xs, colSums)
sapply(fs, sum)

# Check that dimensions match
sapply(Xs, ncol)
as.vector(sapply(fs, nrow))
all(sapply(Xs, ncol) == as.vector(sapply(fs, nrow))) # were not matching bc two clusters were removed from lizard

# Compute frequency of each OT
P = t(do.call(cbind, lapply(seq_along(Xs), function(index) {
  # Check that the clusters match
  stopifnot(all(colnames(Xs[[index]]) == rownames(fs[[index]])))
  as.matrix(Xs[[index]]) %*% fs[[index]]
  })))
rownames(P) = species.use
rowSums(P)

dendro = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/ac.dendrogram.rds')
colnames(P) = Metadata(vertebrateAC, 'type_no', 'type')$type
col_means = colMeans(P, na.rm = TRUE)
tabulation = table(vertebrateAC$species, vertebrateAC$type_no)
Heatmap(P, 
        name = 'Proportion',
        cluster_rows = FALSE, 
        cluster_columns = dendro,
        # column_dend_reorder = FALSE, 
        col = c('white', 'red'),
        na_col = 'grey',
        row_names_side = 'left',
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(mean = anno_barplot(col_means, 
                         gp = gpar(fill = "blue", col = "black"), 
                         border = TRUE)),
        cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) { grid.text(sprintf("%.0f", tabulation[species.use,][i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 4))})

P

ac.prop.summary = reshape2::melt(P) %>% setNames(c('Species', 'OrthoType', 'Proportion'))
ggplot(ac.prop.summary, aes(x = reorder(OrthoType, Proportion, FUN = median, decreasing = TRUE), y = Proportion))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linetype = "dashed")+
  stat_boxplot(aes(ymin = after_stat(lower), ymax = after_stat(upper)), outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymin = ..ymax..), width = 0.5) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", aes(ymax = ..ymin..), width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = Species), color = 'black', shape = 21, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey", linewidth = 0.5))+
  xlab(NULL)+
  ylab("Transferred frequency")+
  scale_color_discrete("Species")+
  RotatedAxis()

saveRDS(P, '../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-NEUN.rds')
```

Compare to unenriched

```{r}
prop.unenriched = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds')
prop.neun = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-NEUN.rds')
prop.unenriched

common.species = intersect(rownames(prop.unenriched), rownames(prop.neun))

prop.summary = reshape2::melt(prop.unenriched[common.species,]) %>% setNames(c('species', 'type', 'prop.unenriched'))
prop.summary$prop.neun = reshape2::melt(prop.neun[common.species,])$value

prop.summary$label = paste0(substr(gsub('MouseLemur', 'ML', prop.summary$species), 0, 3), '-', prop.summary$type)
ScatterPlot(prop.summary,  'prop.unenriched', 'prop.neun', labels = 'label', max.overlaps = 10)

prop.summary$log2.fold.enrichment = log2(prop.summary$prop.neun/(prop.summary$prop.unenriched))
prop.summary$type = factor(prop.summary$type, levels = levels(ac.ortho$type))
ggbarplot(prop.summary, x = 'type', y = 'log2.fold.enrichment', add = c("mean_se", "jitter")) + RotatedAxis()

ggplot(prop.summary, aes(x = type, y = log2.fold.enrichment))+
  geom_bar(position = 'dodge')+
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = 'species'), color = 'black', shape = 21, position=position_jitter(0.2))

ggplot(prop.summary, aes(x = type, y = log2.fold.enrichment)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = 'dodge', fill = "gray80", color = "black") +
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = species), color = 'black', shape = 21, 
              position = position_jitter(width = 0.2))

ggbarplot(prop.summary, x = 'type', y = 'log2.fold.enrichment', add = 'mean_sd') + RotatedAxis()
```

### BC

```{r}
bc.ortho = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateBC_BIGSEURAT.rds')
bc.ortho$type = bc.ortho$NOG
bc.ortho$species_type2 = substr(bc.ortho$species_type, 5, length(bc.ortho$species_type))
table(bc.ortho$type, bc.ortho$species_type2)

species.use = intersect(phylogenetic_order, bc.ortho$species)

bc.datasets.use = c(Chicken = "ChickenBC_v1", 
                    Cow = "CowBC_integrated_v3", 
                    Ferret = "FerretBC_integrated_v4", 
                    Goldfish = "GoldfishBC_integrated_v1",
                    Human = "HumanPeriphery_BC_ann_v2", 
                    Lamprey = "LampreyBC_int_v1", 
                    Lizard = "LizardBC_integrated_v1", 
                    Macaque = "MacaquePeri_BC_velo_ann_v1",
                    Marmoset = "MarmosetPeriphery_BC_int_v1",
                    Mouse = "MouseBC_int_ann_v3", 
                    Opossum = "OpossumBC_int_v3", 
                    Peromyscus = "PeromyscusBC_integrated_v3",
                    Pig = "PigBC_integrated_v3", 
                    Rhabdomys = "RhabdomysBC_int_v2",  
                    Sheep = "SheepBC_integrated_v3", 
                    Squirrel = "Squirrel_BC_v5", 
                    TreeShrew = "Tree_shrew_BC_int_v3", 
                    Zebrafish = "ZebrafishBC_v3")

objectList = lapply(bc.datasets.use[species.use], function(dataset) {
  print(dataset)
  readRDS(paste0('../../HahnObjects/BCs/', dataset, '.rds'))
  })

# Update marmoset annotations
marmoset.meta = readRDS('../BC/BC_metadata/MarmosetPeriphery_BC_int_v1_metadata.rds')
objectList$Marmoset$annotated = marmoset.meta$type
DimPlotLabeled(objectList$Marmoset, 'annotated')
```


```{r}
# Calculate orthotype table
Xs = lapply(species.use, function(this.species) {
  object = subset(bc.ortho, species == this.species)
  ConfusionMatrix(object$type, object$species_type2, row.norm = FALSE, plot = FALSE) # column-normalized (each type sums to 1)
})
names(Xs) = species.use
lapply(Xs, colnames)

# Calculate fs for only species included in OT analysis
fs = lapply(species.use, function(this.species) {
  message(this.species)
  object = objectList[[this.species]]
  if(this.species == 'TreeShrew'){
    object$seurat_clusters = factor(object$seurat_clusters)
    t(t(table(object$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(object$seurat_clusters))))
  } else if('annotated' %in% colnames(object@meta.data)) {
    object$annotated = factor(object$annotated)
    t(t(table(object$annotated)/sum(table(object$annotated))))
  } else{
    object$type = factor(object$type)
    t(t(table(object$type)/sum(table(object$type))))
  }
})

names(fs) = species.use
lapply(fs, colSums)
fs

# Check human and macaque bc object to make sure proportions are consistent
# human.bc = readRDS('../../HahnObjects/BCs/HumanPeriphery_BC_ann_v2.rds')
# table(human.bc$type)/sum(table(human.bc$type))
# macaque.bc = readRDS('../../HahnObjects/BCs/MacaquePeri_BC_velo_ann_v1.rds')
# table(macaque.bc$annotated)/sum(table(macaque.bc$annotated))

# Wrong peromyscus? No it's just that I was grabbing pero v2 instead of 3; using the objects directly now...
# pero.bc = readRDS('../../HahnObjects/BCs/PeromyscusBC_integrated_v3.rds')
# pero.meta = readRDS('../BC/BC_metadata/PeromyscusBC_integrated_v3_metadata.rds')
# pero.meta = readRDS('../BC/BC_metadata/PeromyscusBC_integrated_v2_metadata.rds')

# Compute frequency of each OT
P = t(do.call(cbind, lapply(seq_along(Xs), function(index) {
  
  print(index)
  mat1 = as.matrix(Xs[[index]])
  mat2 = fs[[index]]
  mat1 = mat1[, match(rownames(mat2), colnames(mat1))]
  
  # Check that the clusters match
  stopifnot(all(colnames(mat1) == rownames(mat2)))
  mat1 %*% mat2
  })))
rownames(P) = species.use
rowSums(P)

P
saveRDS(P, '../../Ortho_Objects/BC-frequency-all.rds')
```

```{r}
# Calculate orthotype table
Xs = lapply(species.use, function(this.species) {
  object = subset(rgc.ortho, species == this.species)
  ConfusionMatrix(object$type, object$species_type2, row.norm = FALSE, plot = FALSE) # column-normalized (each type sums to 1)
})
names(Xs) = species.use
lapply(Xs, colnames)

# Calculate fs for only species included in OT analysis
fs = lapply(species.use, function(this.species) {
  message(this.species)
  object = objectList[[this.species]]
  if('annotated' %in% colnames(object@meta.data)) {
    object$annotated = factor(object$annotated)
    t(t(table(object$annotated)/sum(table(object$annotated))))
  } else if('type' %in% colnames(object@meta.data)){
    object$type = factor(object$type)
    t(t(table(object$type)/sum(table(object$type))))
  } else {
    object$seurat_clusters = factor(object$seurat_clusters)
    t(t(table(object$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(object$seurat_clusters))))
  }
})

names(fs) = species.use
lapply(fs, colSums)
fs

# Compute frequency of each OT
P = t(do.call(cbind, lapply(seq_along(Xs), function(index) {
  
  print(index)
  mat1 = as.matrix(Xs[[index]])
  mat2 = fs[[index]]
  mat1 = mat1[, match(rownames(mat2), colnames(mat1))]
  
  # Check that the clusters match
  stopifnot(all(colnames(mat1) == rownames(mat2)))
  mat1 %*% mat2
  })))
rownames(P) = species.use
rowSums(P)

P
saveRDS(P, '../../Ortho_Objects/RGC-frequency-all.rds')
```

## Abundance correlation analysis

### All AC batches

```{r}
prop.bc = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/BC-frequency-all.rds') %>% as.data.frame
prop.ac = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.rds') %>% as.data.frame %>% rename_with(~ paste0("AC-", .x))
prop.rgc = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/RGC-frequency-all.rds') %>% as.data.frame %>% rename_with(~ paste0("RGC-", .x))

write.csv(prop.bc, '../../Ortho_Objects/BC-frequency-all.csv')
write.csv(prop.ac, '../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-all.csv')
write.csv(prop.rgc, '../../Ortho_Objects/RGC-frequency-all.csv')

common.species = intersect(intersect(rownames(prop.bc), rownames(prop.ac)), rownames(prop.rgc))

# Concatenate
props = do.call(cbind, list(prop.bc[common.species, ], prop.ac[common.species, ], prop.rgc[common.species, ]))
props
```

### Unenriched AC batches

```{r, fig.height=13, fig.width=15}
prop.bc = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/BC-frequency-all.rds') %>% as.data.frame
prop.ac = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.rds') %>% as.data.frame %>% rename_with(~ paste0("AC-", .x))
prop.rgc = readRDS('../../Ortho_Objects/RGC-frequency-all.rds') %>% as.data.frame %>% rename_with(~ paste0("RGC-", .x))

write.csv(prop.bc, '../../Ortho_Objects/BC-frequency-all.csv')
write.csv(prop.ac, '../../Ortho_Objects/AC-frequency-unenriched.csv')
write.csv(prop.rgc, '../../Ortho_Objects/RGC-frequency-all.csv')

common.species = intersect(intersect(rownames(prop.bc), rownames(prop.ac)), rownames(prop.rgc))
common.species

# Concatenate
props = do.call(cbind, list(prop.bc[common.species, ], prop.ac[common.species, ], prop.rgc[common.species, ]))
colnames(props) = gsub('-|_', '.', colnames(props))
write.csv(props, '../../Ortho_Objects/props_20250307.csv')
dendro = (hclust(as.dist(1-cor(props)), method = 'average'))
head(props)

ha = Heatmap(name = 'cor', cor(props), cluster_rows = dendro, cluster_columns = dendro)
ha
```


```{r, fig.width=13, fig.height=5}
# Modules
plot(dendro)
abline(h = 0.6, lty = 2)
row_clusters <- cutree(dendro, h = 0.6)
high.acquity.module = names(row_clusters[row_clusters == 2])

Heatmap(cor(props)[row_clusters == 2,row_clusters == 2])
```


```{r, fig.height=13, fig.width=5}
props2 = props
props2$species = rownames(props)
# Anticorrelation of RBC and A2

# props$`A2` = props$`AC-22_A2`

ScatterPlot(props2, x = "AC.22.A2", y = 'RBC', labels = 'species')

ScatterPlot(props2, x = "BC1A", y = 'AC.27.VG3', labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 10)

# BC7 - RGC4

ScatterPlot(props2, x = "AC.21.PDGFRA", y = 'RGC.4', labels = 'species', max.overlaps = 10)
```

# Conservation prediction analysis

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
bc.conservation = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/bc.conservation.summary.rds")
ac.conservation = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/vertebrateAC_conservation.rds")
rgc.conservation = readRDS("../../Ortho_Objects/rgc.conservation.summary.rds")

dim(bc.conservation)
dim(ac.conservation)
dim(rgc.conservation)

dat.expr = LogAvgExpr(ac.ortho, group.by = 'species', assay = 'RNA')
n.species.expressed = apply(dat.expr, 1, function(x) length(which(x > 0)))

merged.conservation = data.frame(gene = ac.conservation$gene, 
                                 n.species.expressed = n.species.expressed[match(ac.conservation$gene, names(n.species.expressed))],
                                 ac.conservation = ac.conservation$cor.score, 
                                 bc.conservation = bc.conservation$cor.score[match(ac.conservation$gene, bc.conservation$gene)], 
                                 rgc.conservation = rgc.conservation$cor.score[match(ac.conservation$gene, rgc.conservation$gene)]
                                 )

head(merged.conservation)

merged.conservation[merged.conservation$gene == 'TENM3',]
merged.conservation[merged.conservation$gene == 'ISL1',]

ScatterPlot(merged.conservation, x = 'bc.conservation', y = 'ac.conservation', fill = 'n.species.expressed') + NoLegend() | 
  ScatterPlot(merged.conservation, x = 'bc.conservation', y = 'rgc.conservation', fill = 'n.species.expressed') + NoLegend() | 
  ScatterPlot(merged.conservation, x = 'ac.conservation', y = 'rgc.conservation', fill = 'n.species.expressed') + NoLegend()
```
